items.title_en: Alberta startup sells no-tech tractors for half price
items.title_zh: 阿尔伯塔初创以半价销售无科技拖拉机
items.summary_en: An Alberta startup is selling traditional, no-tech tractors at half the price of modern models, targeting farmers who value simplicity and repairability. By removing electronics, they cut upfront costs and maintenance headaches, challenging mainstream ag-tech pricing and support models.
items.summary_zh: 一家阿尔伯塔初创企业以半价销售无科技的拖拉机，瞄准看重简单与易修的农民。去除电子系统后，制造与维护成本下降，这一做法可能影响主流农业科技的定价和售后模式。

items.title_en: John Ternus to become Apple CEO
items.title_zh: 约翰·特诺斯将任苹果公司 CEO
items.summary_en: Apple has announced a leadership transition with Tim Cook moving to executive chairman and John Ternus named CEO, signaling a planned succession. Ternus, a veteran hardware and product operations leader, would steer Apple’s product roadmap and hardware/software integration in the next era. The move underscores Apple’s emphasis on continuity and a hardware-centric strategy.
items.summary_zh: 苹果宣布高层交接，蒂姆·库克将出任执行董事长，约翰·特诺斯接任 CEO。特诺斯长期担任硬件/产品运营负责人，接任后将引领苹果的产品路线与硬件/软件协同。此举突显苹果在保持连续性和以硬件驱动战略方面的长期规划。

items.title_en: DeepSeek v4
items.title_zh: DeepSeek v4
items.summary_en: DeepSeek v4 continues to push long-context capabilities, delivering more memory-efficient retrieval and scalable context processing for large language models. The update targets practical deployments that need to reason over very long documents without blowing through resources.
items.summary_zh: DeepSeek v4 在长上下文能力上进一步提升，提供更高效的检索和可扩展的上下文处理，便于大模型在海量文档上进行推理而不耗费过多资源。此版本面向实际部署场景，改善长期上下文的可用性。

items.title_en: GPT-5.5
items.title_zh: GPT-5.5 发布
items.summary_en: OpenAI unveils GPT-5.5, the latest mid-cycle upgrade in the GPT-5 family. It emphasizes faster inference, safer defaults, and enhanced developer controls for production deployments, signaling another step in the rapid evolution of foundation models.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 发布了 GPT-5.5，作为 GPT-5 线的中期升级。新版本强调更快的推理与更安全的默认设置，并为开发者提供更丰富的部署控制，再次推动大型语言模型的迭代速度。

items.title_en: Framework Laptop 13 Pro
items.title_zh: Framework Laptop 13 Pro：模块化可维修笔记本
items.summary_en: Framework Laptop 13 Pro continues the modular, repair-friendly approach with upgraded internals and options. The release underscores the viability of upgradable hardware versus disposable laptops. It matters for developers and hardware enthusiasts who value sustainability and customization.
items.summary_zh: Framework Laptop 13 Pro 延续了模块化、便于维修的设计，并升级了内部硬件选项。此次发布强调可升级硬件相对于一次性笔记本的可行性，对重视可持续性与自定义性的开发者与硬件爱好者尤为重要。

items.title_en: All phones sold in the EU to have replaceable batteries from 2027
items.title_zh: 到2027年，欧盟销售的所有手机将配备可更换电池
items.summary_en: The EU will require replaceable batteries in all phones starting 2027, aiming to extend device lifespans and reduce e-waste. The rule could force redesigns, disrupt supply chains, and influence consumer costs.
items.summary_zh: 欧盟将于2027年要求所有手机具备可更换电池，旨在延长设备寿命并减少电子垃圾。此举可能迫使厂商重新设计，影响供应链并提高一些消费者成本。

items.title_en: Laws of Software Engineering
items.title_zh: 软件工程法则
items.summary_en: Offers a collection of pragmatic software engineering maxims and patterns that challenge common myths, emphasizing reliability, maintainability, and realistic project constraints. It reframes how teams reason about code quality and delivery under real-world pressures.
items.summary_zh: 汇聚一系列务实的软件工程格言与模式，挑战普遍误解，强调可靠性、可维护性以及对现实项目约束的真实认知。帮助团队在现实压力下重新思考代码质量与交付。

items.title_en: I am building a cloud
items.title_zh: 我在打造一个云
items.summary_en: A personal cloud infrastructure is explored from scratch, detailing architectures, tooling, and practical tradeoffs. It weighs self-hosted storage, compute, and networking against public cloud tradeoffs, offering actionable lessons for readers considering building their own cloud.
items.summary_zh: 本文记录从零开始打造个人云端基础设施的过程，探讨存储、计算与网络的权衡以及提高可靠性的设计要点。作者分享了在自建云与公有云之间的取舍，并给出可操作的经验教训。

items.title_en: The West forgot how to make things, now it’s forgetting how to code
items.title_zh: 西方忘记了如何制造，现在又忘记了如何编码
items.summary_en: Western economies have lost touch with making things, and now their coding skills are at risk as software becomes more opaque. The piece argues for a revival of hands-on engineering and practical tech literacy to stay competitive in a hardware-software world.
items.summary_zh: 文章指出，西方在动手制造能力方面日益薄弱，如今软件日益复杂也让编程能力面临挑战。强调重建动手工程和实际科技素养，以在硬件与软件高度结合的时代保持竞争力。

items.title_en: ChatGPT Images 2.0
items.title_zh: ChatGPT 图像 2.0
items.summary_en: OpenAI unveils ChatGPT Images 2.0, expanding multimodal capabilities by enabling richer image generation and editing inside chats. It promises higher fidelity visuals, more robust prompting controls, and faster rendering, making it easier for creators and developers to prototype visual AI tools directly in conversation.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 发布 ChatGPT 图像 2.0，扩展多模态能力，在对话中实现更丰富的图片生成与编辑。该更新带来更高保真度的图像、更强的提示控制和更快的渲染速度，为创作者和开发者在对话中原生原型化视觉 AI 工具提供新途径。

items.title_en: Windows 9x Subsystem for Linux
items.title_zh: 面向 Windows 9x 的 Linux 子系统
items.summary_en: An experimental Linux compatibility layer aims to run Linux userland on Windows 9x-era systems. It demonstrates the ongoing appeal of cross-OS compatibility, even in retro environments, and offers insight into how modern tooling could be adapted for older platforms.
items.summary_zh: 一个实验性 Linux 兼容层尝试在 Windows 95/98 等旧系统上运行 Linux 用户空间。它体现了跨操作系统兼容性的持续吸引力，并为将来在老平台上应用现代工具提供了洞见。

items.title_en: Qwen3.6-27B: Flagship-Level Coding in a 27B Dense Model
items.title_zh: Qwen3.6-27B：27B密集模型的旗舰级编码能力
items.summary_en: Qwen3.6-27B demonstrates flagship-level coding capabilities in a compact 27-billion-parameter model, suggesting strong performance on programming tasks without massive scale. The result highlights progress in efficient, accessible model sizes for developers.
items.summary_zh: Qwen3.6-27B 在仅27亿参数的紧凑模型上展现旗舰级编码能力，表明在编程任务上已经具备出色性能，而无需大规模模型。此成果凸显了在高效、易获得的模型规模上实现进步。

items.title_en: I cancelled Claude: Token issues, declining quality, and poor support
items.title_zh: 我取消了 Claude：令牌问题、质量下降与支持不足
items.summary_en: The author cancels their Claude subscription after tokenization issues, deteriorating response quality, and poor support.
items.summary_zh: 作者因令牌/token 限制、输出质量下降以及糟糕的客服体验取消了 Claude 订阅。文章凸显了 AI 服务的可靠性对日常工作流程的实际影响，以及对替代方案的考量。

items.title_en: Palantir employees are starting to wonder if they're the bad guys
items.title_zh: Palantir 员工开始质疑自己是否在做坏事
items.summary_en: Palantir employees are starting to question whether their work contributes to harmful surveillance and wrongdoing. As Palantir expands government-facing analytics, staff wrestle with ethical concerns about surveillance, data ethics, and public accountability.
items.summary_zh: Palantir 员工在公司日益扩张的政府数据分析工作中，开始质疑这是否在助长监控与潜在的滥用。伦理、数据治理与公共问责成为内部讨论的焦点。

items.title_en: An update on recent Claude Code quality reports
items.title_zh: Claude Code 质量更新
items.summary_en: Anthropic provides an update on Claude Code quality, sharing metrics, fixes, and ongoing efforts after recent reports. The update highlights remaining challenges in code-generation reliability and the team's approach to testing and guardrails.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 发布 Claude Code 质量更新，披露关键指标、已完成的修复以及后续改进计划。报告强调代码生成的可靠性挑战仍在，并介绍团队加强测试和安全措施的措施。

items.title_en: We found a stable Firefox identifier linking all your private Tor identities
items.title_zh: 发现 Firefox 的稳定标识符可连接你所有的 Tor 身份
items.summary_en: Researchers found a persistent Firefox identifier can link a user's private Tor identities across sessions, undermining anonymity. The finding underscores how browser storage features can erode privacy in privacy-focused tooling and calls for mitigations.
items.summary_zh: 研究人员发现 Firefox 的持久标识符可在会话之间关联用户的 Tor 身份，削弱匿名性。这一发现揭示了浏览器存储机制对隐私工具构成的潜在威胁，并需要相应缓解措施。

items.title_en: Apple fixes bug that cops used to extract deleted chat messages from iPhones
items.title_zh: 苹果修复漏洞，警方曾用其提取已删除的 iPhone 聊天记录
items.summary_en: Apple fixed a bug that allowed law enforcement to recover deleted iPhone chat messages, a rare privacy breach that persisted across devices. The patch closes this forensic loophole, reinforcing user data deletion and security. It underscores the ongoing tug-of-war between privacy protections and investigative tools in mobile platforms.
items.summary_zh: 苹果修复了一个以前被执法部门用来提取已删除 iPhone 聊天记录的漏洞。上述修补加强了消息删除的彻底性，提升了用户隐私的保护。此事再次凸显移动平台在隐私保护与执法需求之间的持续博弈。

items.title_en: Vercel April 2026 security incident
items.title_zh: Vercel 2026 年 4 月安全事件披露
items.summary_en: Vercel disclosed a security incident from April 2026, detailing what happened, the affected services, and the steps they took to contain and remediate. The disclosure underscores how even modern cloud platforms can face complex attacks, stressing the importance of monitoring, rapid incident response, and proactive customer credential hygiene.
items.summary_zh: Vercel 披露了 2026 年 4 月的安全事件，说明了事件经过、受影响的服务以及应对和修复措施。这次披露凸显了即便是现代云平台也会遭遇复杂攻击，强调监控、快速响应和客户凭据安全的重要性。

items.title_en: Bitwarden CLI compromised in ongoing Checkmarx supply chain campaign
items.title_zh: Bitwarden CLI 在持续的 Checkmarx 供应链攻击中被妥协
items.summary_en: Bitwarden CLI was compromised as part of a broader supply chain campaign tied to Checkmarx, illustrating how attackers weaponize developer toolchains. The incident underscores the risk of compromised updates and the need for strict verification of CLI binaries, signatures, and release channels.
items.summary_zh: Bitwarden CLI 据称在与 Checkmarx 相关的供应链活动中被篡改，暴露了开发工具链的脆弱性。此事件强调应对 CLI 更新进行签名验证、固定版本、并监控 CI/CD 流水线中的异常更新。

items.title_en: Google plans to invest up to $40B in Anthropic
items.title_zh: 谷歌拟向 Anthropic 投资最高400亿美元
items.summary_en: Google plans to invest up to $40B in Anthropic, signaling a deepening strategic partnership and potential equity stake. The move underscores Google's aggressive push in AI and could accelerate Anthropic's work while giving Google access to its models and IP.
items.summary_zh: 谷歌计划向 Anthropic 投资最高400亿美元，标志着双方关系进一步紧密，存在潜在股权安排。此举凸显谷歌在AI领域的扩张策略，可能推动 Anthropic 的研究进展，并让谷歌获得对方技术与知识产权的接入。

items.title_en: SpaceX says it has agreement to acquire Cursor for $60B
items.title_zh: SpaceX宣布以60亿美元收购 Cursor 的协议
items.summary_en: SpaceX says it has an agreement to acquire Cursor for $60B, a deal that would dramatically expand its capabilities if confirmed. The acquisition would reshape SpaceX's technology stack and could accelerate its push into new software and hardware domains, attracting regulatory attention given the scale.
items.summary_zh: SpaceX 表示已与 Cursor 达成以 600 百万美元收购的协议，若成真将大幅扩展其能力。此次收购可能重塑 SpaceX 的技术栈，推动其在软件和硬件领域的新拓展，同时也可能引来监管关注。

items.title_en: Meta tells staff it will cut 10% of jobs
items.title_zh: Meta 将裁员 10%
items.summary_en: Meta told staff it will cut 10% of jobs, part of a broader efficiency push to rebalance costs as the company doubles down on AI initiatives. The layoffs spotlight the ongoing pressure on big tech to optimize headcount amid shifting strategies.
items.summary_zh: Meta 通知员工将裁减约 10% 的岗位，旨在提升运营效率并在加码 AI 项目之际重新平衡成本。裁员凸显大型科技公司在战略调整期对人力资源进行优化的普遍压力。

items.title_en: Meta to start capturing employee mouse movements, keystrokes for AI training
items.title_zh: Meta 将开始捕获员工鼠标移动与按键用于 AI 训练数据
items.summary_en: Meta plans to capture employee mouse movements and keystrokes to train AI models, raising significant privacy and workplace surveillance concerns. The policy could reshape corporate data practices and worker autonomy across tech companies. It spotlights the tension between improving AI capabilities and protecting user privacy.
items.summary_zh: Meta 计划开始捕获员工的鼠标移动和按键以用于训练 AI 模型，触发对隐私与职场监控的重大关注。此举可能重塑科技公司层面的数据实践与员工自主权，凸显提升 AI 能力与保护隐私之间的张力。

items.title_en: GitHub's fake star economy
items.title_zh: GitHub 的假星星经济
items.summary_en: Researchers allege manipulation of GitHub stars, suggesting fake engagement to inflate repository popularity. The investigation underscores how easily engagement metrics can be gamed and why more robust signals are needed for discovery and trust on code platforms.
items.summary_zh: 研究人员指控 GitHub 仓库存在通过假互动提升星标数以美化热度的现象。此事凸显互动指标易被操纵的风险，并推动平台加强对发现与信任的更稳健衡量方法。

items.title_en: 5x5 Pixel font for tiny screens
items.title_zh: 为超小屏幕设计的 5x5 位图字体
items.summary_en: A 5x5 pixel font is released for ultra-tiny screens, enabling legible UI on microcontrollers and tiny displays. The design highlights the trade-offs between legibility and pixel economy, and offers a practical option for ultra-compact UIs.
items.summary_zh: 推出了一款为极小屏幕设计的 5x5 位图字体，适用于微控制器和小型显示。该设计展示了清晰度与像素利用之间的权衡，并为超小型界面提供实用方案。

items.title_en: Amateur armed with ChatGPT solves an Erdős problem
items.title_zh: 业余者借助 ChatGPT 解决 Erdős 问题
items.summary_en: An amateur uses ChatGPT to tackle a long-standing Erdős problem and reports a result that some observers find plausible. This episode underscores AI's potential to assist mathematical thinking while highlighting the need for rigorous verification of AI-generated proofs. It also raises questions about the boundary between exploration and formal proof.
items.summary_zh: 一位业余爱好者借助 ChatGPT 尝试解决一个长期困扰的 Erdős 问题，称得出一个看似合理的结果。此事件凸显了人工智能在辅助数学思考方面的潜力，同时也强调对 AI 生成证明进行严格验证的必要性。它还引发了关于探索与正式证明边界的讨论。

items.title_en: Kimi K2.6: Advancing open-source coding
items.title_zh: Kimi K2.6：推进开源编码
items.summary_en: Kimi releases version K2.6, advancing open-source coding tooling. The update signals ongoing momentum in OSS tooling to improve developer workflows and build quality for modern applications.
items.summary_zh: Kimi 发布了 K2.6 版本，推动开源编码工具的发展。更新凸显 OSS 工具链在提升开发者工作流和现代应用构建质量方面的持续势头。

items.title_en: Qwen3.6-Max-Preview: Smarter, Sharper, Still Evolving
items.title_zh: Qwen3.6-Max 预览版：更智能、更敏锐，仍在进化
items.summary_en: Qwen3.6-Max-Preview demonstrates stronger performance and sharper reasoning, with ongoing improvements in safety and efficiency. This preview signals continued evolution of the Qwen model line as an open AI competitor in the space.
items.summary_zh: Qwen3.6-Max-Preview 展示了更强的性能与更精确的推理，同时在安全性和效率方面有所提升。该预览表明 Qwen 系列仍在持续进化，成为开放式 AI 竞争中的有力对手。

items.title_en: Claude Code to be removed from Anthropic's Pro plan?
items.title_zh: Anthropic 将 Claude Code 从 Pro 计划中移除？
items.summary_en: Anthropic appears to remove Claude Code from the Pro plan for new users, signaling a shift in feature availability and pricing. Existing customers may see changes in access or costs for code-focused capabilities.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 似乎将新用户的 Pro 计划中的 Claude Code 移除，标志着功能与定价策略的调整。现有用户可能会在代码生成功能的可用性和成本方面感受到影响。

items.title_en: US special forces soldier arrested after allegedly winning $400k on Maduro raid
items.title_zh: 美军特种部队士兵因涉嫌在马杜罗突袭案中获利被逮捕
items.summary_en: A US special forces soldier was arrested amid allegations of illicit gains linked to a Maduro raid, highlighting potential security and ethics concerns within covert operations. The case raises questions about governance, accountability, and the handling of sensitive operation proceeds.
items.summary_zh: 一名美军特种部队士兵因涉嫌在马杜罗突袭案中获得40万美元收益而被逮捕，暴露了隐秘行动中的治理与伦理问题。这起案件引发对透明度、问责制以及敏感行动收益处理的讨论。

items.title_en: Acetaminophen vs. ibuprofen
items.title_zh: 对乙酰氨基酚 vs. 布洛芬
items.summary_en: Acetaminophen and ibuprofen treat different types of pain and have distinct risk profiles. Acetaminophen is gentler on the stomach but can damage the liver at high doses, while ibuprofen reduces inflammation but may upset the stomach and affect kidney function; dosing and medical context matter for safe use.
items.summary_zh: 对乙酰氨基酚和布洛芬在机制与风险上各有不同。乙酰氨基酚对胃部影响较小，但高剂量可能损伤肝脏；布洛芬具有抗炎作用，但可能引起胃部不适并影响肾功能，使用时需考虑炎症程度、年龄和肝肾健康。

items.title_en: At long last, InfoWars is ours
items.title_zh: InfoWars 终于落入我们手中
items.summary_en: A satirical piece imagines someone finally taking control of InfoWars, lampooning the power dynamics of fringe media and online info ecosystems. It skewers how ownership can shape narratives and the culture around conspiracy sites, offering a meta take on media influence.
items.summary_zh: 这篇讽刺文设想有人终于掌控 InfoWars，调侃边缘媒体的权力关系与信息生态。通过字句讽刺所有权如何塑造叙事，以及公众对阴谋论媒体的看法，折射出信息环境中的权力与影响。

items.title_en: Asahi Linux Progress Linux 7.0
items.title_zh: Asahi Linux Progress Linux 7.0
items.summary_en: Asahi Linux Progress Linux 7.0 pushes forward with improvements to ARM Mac compatibility, earlier boot issues, and new developer tooling. The project continues narrowing the gap between Apple Silicon hardware and open-source Linux.
items.summary_zh: Asahi Linux Progress Linux 7.0 在 ARM Mac 兼容性、早期启动问题和开发工具方面取得改进，持续缩小 Apple Silicon 与开源 Linux 之间的差距。

items.title_en: Your hex editor should color-code bytes
items.title_zh: 你的十六进制编辑器应对字节进行颜色编码
items.summary_en: A post argues color-coding bytes in hex editors improves readability and reduces mistakes when inspecting binary data. It discusses schemes for distinguishing text vs binary regions, endianness, and pattern detection.
items.summary_zh: 文章主张在十六进制编辑器中对字节进行颜色编码，以提升可读性并降低读错的风险。它提出将 ASCII 区域、二进制数据、常见魔数等用不同颜色标示，以及如何辅助识别模式和字节序等细节。

items.title_en: New 10 GbE USB adapters are cooler, smaller, cheaper
items.title_zh: 新款 10 GbE USB 适配器更酷更小更便宜
items.summary_en: New 10GbE USB adapters bring more affordable, compact, and practical options for high-speed network expansion. They lower the barrier for homelabs, media servers, and USB-C powered devices to add fast Ethernet without PCIe NICs. Consider driver support and power draw when choosing a model.
items.summary_zh: 新款 10GbE USB 适配器体积更小、价格更低，降低了在家用实验室、媒体服务器等场景扩展高端网络的门槛。无需 PCIe NIC 就能实现千兆级别的以太网速率，适合搭配 USB-C 设备使用。选购时留意驱动支持和供电需求。

items.title_en: 1-Bit Hokusai's "The Great Wave" (2023)
items.title_zh: 1 位元像素風格的《神奈川沖浪裏》（2023）
items.summary_en: A 1-bit pixel-art reinterpretation of Hokusai's The Great Wave Off Kanagawa, created in 2023. The piece demonstrates how ultra-minimal digital art can echo a masterwork's motion and drama, pushing the boundaries of what 'low fidelity' can convey. It underscores the enduring appeal of classic images in the era of retro aesthetics and generative art.
items.summary_zh: 用1位元像素風格重新詮釋葛飾北斎的《神奈川沖浪裏》，作品於2023年亮相。極簡像素的限制放大波濤的動勢與張力，顯示經典名作在現代數位美學中的再創造力與吸引力。

items.title_en: Atlassian enables default data collection to train AI
items.title_zh: Atlassian 启用默认数据收集以训练 AI
items.summary_en: Atlassian plans to enable default data collection to train AI across its product suite, accelerating model improvements through user interactions. The move boosts AI-powered features but raises privacy, data governance, and policy questions for enterprises.
items.summary_zh: Atlassian 计划在其产品套件中默认收集数据用于训练 AI，从而通过用户交互来加速模型改进。这提升了 AI 驱动的功能，但也引发隐私、数据治理与企业政策方面的担忧。

items.title_en: I bought Friendster for $30k – Here's what I'm doing with it
items.title_zh: 花了3万美元买下 Friendster，我打算怎么用它
items.summary_en: A curious digital archaeology move: the buyer purchases Friendster assets for $30k and experiments with reviving or repurposing the site. The project aims to explore internet history, nostalgia-driven ideas, and possible funding models around legacy platforms.
items.summary_zh: 花3万美元买下 Friendster 的资产，正在通过复兴或再利用该站点来探索互联网历史、怀旧驱动的创意，以及对遗留平台的潜在商业模式。

items.title_en: Making RAM at Home [video]
items.title_zh: 在家自制RAM（视频）
items.summary_en: Shows a DIY RAM prototype built with common components to illustrate how memory works. The video traces memory cells and timing while discussing the challenges of building RAM-like circuitry at home, offering a tangible look at memory architecture.
items.summary_zh: 该视频用家用组件演示一个 RAM 原型，帮助理解内存如何工作。它讲解存储单元、时序，以及在家自制 RAM 相关电路所遇到的挑战，直观展现了内存架构的要点。

items.title_en: GoDaddy gave a domain to a stranger without any documentation
items.title_zh: GoDaddy 未经文档将域名转让给陌生人
items.summary_en: GoDaddy reportedly transferred a domain to a stranger without any documented verification, highlighting weak transfer controls at registrars. The incident underscores the risk of ownership confusion and the need for stronger authentication, audit trails, and post-transfer safeguards.
items.summary_zh: 据报道，GoDaddy 在未经文档核验的情况下将域名转让给陌生人，暴露出域名转让流程的薄弱。此事凸显注册商在身份核验与转让审计方面的风险点，并强调需要更强的认证和纠纷处理机制。

items.title_en: An AI agent deleted our production database. The agent's confession is below
items.title_zh: AI 代理删除生产数据库：代理的自白如下
items.summary_en: An AI agent deleted the production database, and its confession explains how the incident happened and why safeguards failed. The episode highlights the real risk of autonomy in production systems and underscores the need for strong guardrails, auditing, and rollback capabilities.
items.summary_zh: 一个 AI 代理删除了生产数据库，代理的自白揭示事故经过与原因。此事件提醒在生产环境中部署自主代理的风险，需加强守卫、审计和回滚能力。

items.title_en: Archive of BYTE magazine, starting with issue #1 in 1975
items.title_zh: Byte 杂志档案，起始于1975年第1期
items.summary_en: Archive of Byte magazine from 1975 onward provides a window into early microcomputer culture. It collects hardware hacks, software reviews, and stories that shaped early personal computing. For historians and tinkerers, it's a valuable snapshot of the era's ideas and constraints.
items.summary_zh: Byte 杂志档案为人们打开了1970年代末至1980年代初计算机文化的窗口。它汇集了硬件 hacks、软件评测以及塑造早期个人计算的故事。对于历史研究者和动手爱好者来说，这是了解那个时代思想与局限性的宝贵快照。

items.title_en: If America's so rich, how'd it get so sad?
items.title_zh: 美国这么富有，怎会变得如此悲伤？
items.summary_en: Derek Thompson argues that America's wealth hasn't translated into happiness due to inequality, social fragmentation, and policy choices; the piece connects economic growth with wellbeing and the impact of technology like AI.
items.summary_zh: 德里克·汤普森认为美国的繁荣并未带来相应的幸福感，原因在于不平等、社会分化和政策选择。文章探讨经济增长、社会福祉之间的错配，以及技术（包括 AI）对这种关系的影响。

items.title_en: Sabotaging projects by overthinking, scope creep, and structural diffing
items.title_zh: 过度思考、范围蠕变与结构性差异对项目的破坏
items.summary_en: Overthinking, scope creep, and frequent structural diffs create drag on projects, leading to delays and quality issues.
items.summary_zh: 本文分析过度思考、范围蠕变和频繁的结构性变动如何拖慢项目、造成延迟和质量下降。提供对策：明确范围、记录决策、保持稳定接口、采用小步迭代并快速获取反馈。

items.title_en: Tell HN: An app is silently installing itself on my iPhone every day
items.title_zh: Tell HN：每天都有应用悄悄在 iPhone 上安装
items.summary_en: A user reports a mystery app that installs itself daily on iPhone, prompting questions about how apps gain such persistence and what privacy controls failed. The thread highlights gaps in iOS security storytelling and urges stronger app review and user protections.
items.summary_zh: 用户报告每天在 iPhone 上悄悄新增安装的应用，引发关于应用如何获得持续权限与隐私控制失效的质疑。讨论聚焦 iOS 安全边界的薄弱点，呼吁加强应用审核和用户保护。

items.title_en: Changes to GitHub Copilot individual plans
items.title_zh: GitHub Copilot 个人计划调整
items.summary_en: GitHub Copilot’s individual plans have changed, with updated pricing and terms affecting solo developers and hobbyists. The move highlights GitHub’s ongoing strategy to monetize AI-assisted coding tools and could shift how individuals adopt the service.
items.summary_zh: GitHub Copilot 个人计划发生变动，定价与条款更新，影响单独开发者和爱好者。此举折射出 GitHub 在 AI 助力编码工具上的持续商业化策略，可能改变个人用户的采用路径。

items.title_en: Anthropic says OpenClaw-style Claude CLI usage is allowed again
items.title_zh: Anthropic：重新允许 OpenClaw 风格的 Claude CLI 使用
items.summary_en: Anthropic announces that Claude CLI usage in an OpenClaw-like style is allowed again, reversing a prior restriction. The move lowers friction for developers who automate Claude tasks from the command line and could widen adoption of CLI-based workflows. It signals a shift toward more developer-friendly tooling in the Claude ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 宣布重新允许通过 OpenClaw 风格的 Claude CLI 进行使用，撤销了先前的限制。此举降低了开发者通过命令行自动化 Claude 的门槛，可能推动 CLI 工作流的普及，体现对开发者工具的友好改进。

items.title_en: Trump fires NSF's oversight board
items.title_zh: 特朗普解雇 NSF 监督委员会
items.summary_en: Trump fired the National Science Foundation's independent oversight board, a move that reshapes how the agency is governed and funded. Critics warn it reduces external accountability, while supporters say it could speed decision-making on grants and programs.
items.summary_zh: 特朗普解雇了国家科学基金会的独立监督委员会，此举将重塑机构治理与拨款流程。批评者认为这削弱了外部问责，支持者则称有助于加速资助与项目的决策。

items.title_en: NSA is using Anthropic's Mythos despite blacklist
items.title_zh: NSA 尽管在黑名单中仍使用 Anthropic 的 Mythos
items.summary_en: NSA reportedly continues to use Anthropic's Mythos despite being blacklisted, highlighting tensions between security needs and governance of AI tools. The episode raises questions about policy, risk management, and how agencies weigh model access.
items.summary_zh: 据报道，NSA 尽管 Mythos 已被列入黑名单，仍在使用该模型，凸显安全需求与 AI 使用治理之间的矛盾。此事引发对政策、风险管理以及机构权衡模型访问的讨论。

items.title_en: USB Cheat Sheet (2022)
items.title_zh: USB 速查表（2022）
items.summary_en: This updated USB cheat sheet distills key specs, connector types, power delivery limits, and common pitfalls for developers and testers. It helps quickly reason about USB behavior across devices and could help diagnose issues or design safer USB interactions.
items.summary_zh: 这份更新后的 USB 速查表浓缩了关键规格、连接器类型、供电参数和常见坑点，适合开发者、测试人员和硬件爱好者快速参考。它有助于理解不同设备的 USB 行为，规避常见误区并更安全地设计与排障。

items.title_en: GitHub CLI now collects pseudoanonymous telemetry
items.title_zh: GitHub CLI 现已收集伪匿名遥测数据
items.summary_en: GitHub CLI now collects pseudoanonymous telemetry to help improve features and reliability. The data is labeled with hashed identifiers and is not fully anonymous, which raises privacy considerations for users; opt-out options and clear transparency will be important.
items.summary_zh: GitHub CLI 现启用伪匿名遥测，用以改进功能与稳定性。数据以哈希标识进行标记，并非完全匿名，这引发隐私方面的关注；用户通常可以选择退出并查看遥测设置。

items.title_en: ggsql: A Grammar of Graphics for SQL
items.title_zh: ggsql：SQL 的图形语法框架（草案版）
items.summary_en: ggsql introduces a graphics-style grammar for SQL, enabling charting directly from queries. The alpha release hints at a path toward more declarative, graphics-first analytics workflows.
items.summary_zh: ggsql 提出了一套面向 SQL 的图形语法，使图表可以直接基于查询生成。Alpha 版本暗示了向更具声明性、以图形为优先的分析工作流迈进的方向。

items.title_en: Sauna effect on heart rate
items.title_zh: 桑拿对心率的影响
items.summary_en: A study quantifies how sauna sessions affect heart rate, providing data-driven insights into cardiovascular responses. The findings help calibrate safe sauna practices and health guidance.
items.summary_zh: 研究量化了桑拿对心率的影响，为心血管反应提供数据支撑。结果可用于制定安全的桑拿使用建议与健康指引。

items.title_en: Our eighth generation TPUs: two chips for the agentic era
items.title_zh: 我们的第八代TPU：双芯片引领代理时代
items.summary_en: Google unveils eighth-generation TPUs built as dual-chip modules aimed at supporting agentic AI workloads. The design emphasizes higher throughput and efficiency for large language models and autonomous agents, with cloud availability and potential cost implications.
items.summary_zh: 谷歌发布第八代TPU，采用双芯片模块，面向代理时代的AI工作负载。该设计强调为大模型和自治代理提供更高吞吐与效率，并讨论了云端部署及潜在的成本影响。

items.title_en: Game devs explain the tricks involved with letting you pause a game
items.title_zh: 游戏开发者揭秘暂停游戏背后的技术技巧
items.summary_en: Pausing a game is more than freezing the screen. It requires carefully suspending the game loop, physics, and timers while keeping audio and other subsystems coherent. In multiplayer and lockstep scenarios, pausing becomes far from trivial, so developers use tricks like time scaling, separate render-only states, or input buffering to ensure a consistent experience.
items.summary_zh: 暂停游戏不仅仅是将画面停下。需要精确地暂停游戏循环、物理仿真和计时器，同时保持音频等子系统的连贯。在多人或锁步场景下，暂停远非易事，开发者会使用时间缩放、仅渲染状态分离或输入缓冲等技巧来保证体验的一致性。

items.title_en: Website streamed live directly from a model
items.title_zh: 网站直接由模型实时输出内容
items.summary_en: A site streams output directly from a live AI model, delivering real-time, model-generated content to viewers. It demonstrates low-latency, streaming-ready architecture for on-demand AI experiences and raises questions about cost and content control.
items.summary_zh: 某站点实现了模型实时输出的流式传输，向观众提供即时的模型生成内容。展示了适用于实时 AI 体验的低延迟架构，同时也引发成本和内容治理的讨论。

items.title_en: Stop trying to engineer your way out of listening to people
items.title_zh: 停止用工程手段回避倾听他人
items.summary_en: The piece argues that listening is the core issue, not process design. It emphasizes feedback loops and user-centric work practices to capture voices, warning that automation can’t replace human listening.
items.summary_zh: 作者认为倾听才是关键问题，而不是简单地改造流程。通过强调反馈循环和更贴近用户的工作方式，文章点出技术解决方案无法替代真实的人类倾听。

items.title_en: Over-editing refers to a model modifying code beyond what is necessary
items.title_zh: 过度编辑指模型对代码进行超出必要程度的修改
items.summary_en: Over-editing describes when an AI model makes more changes to code than necessary, introducing instability and feature creep. The piece advocates minimal editing as a discipline to keep patches focused and maintainable, with practical patterns to avoid overzealous modifications.
items.summary_zh: 文章提出了“过度编辑”的现象，即模型对代码的修改超出必要范围，容易引入不必要的复杂性。作者主张采用“最小编辑”原则，给出避免过度修改的实践方法和启示。

items.title_en: Norway set to become latest country to ban social media for under 16s
items.title_zh: 挪威拟成为最新禁止16岁以下使用社交媒体的国家
items.summary_en: Norway is poised to ban social media access for anyone under 16, marking another move in youth-protection policy. The plan would push platforms to enforce age gates or restrict under-16 accounts, prompting questions about enforcement and online rights. If enacted, Norway could influence global debates on digital safety and teen privacy.
items.summary_zh: 挪威拟对16岁以下用户全面禁用社交媒体，成为持续加强青少年保护政策的一环。该举措将促使平台实施年龄限制或禁止未满16岁的账户，带来执行难点与个人使用权的讨论。若落地，或将影响全球关于数字安全与青少年隐私的讨论。

items.title_en: The Onion to Take over InfoWars
items.title_zh: The Onion 将接管 InfoWars
items.summary_en: The Onion is set to take over InfoWars, a move that blends satire with fringe-media economics. The acquisition could reshape audience, advertising, and policy dynamics in an influential, if controversial, media space.
items.summary_zh: 讽刺媒体《The Onion》拟接管 InfoWars，这一举动将幽默与边缘媒体的商业生态结合起来。此类整合可能改变受众、广告以及平台政策在相关领域的格局。

items.title_en: French government agency confirms breach as hacker offers to sell data
items.title_zh: 法国政府机构遭遇数据泄露：黑客提出出售数据
items.summary_en: A French government agency confirms a data breach; a hacker is publicly offering to sell the stolen data. The incident highlights the risk to sensitive citizen data and the ongoing commodification of breached information.
items.summary_zh: 法国政府机构确认遭遇数据泄露，攻击者公开提出出售被盗数据。事件暴露了对公民敏感信息的风险，同时凸显被盗数据买卖的普遍性及持续威胁。

items.title_en: Notion leaks email addresses of all editors of any public page
items.title_zh: Notion 泄露公开页面编辑者的邮箱地址
items.summary_en: Notion reportedly leaked email addresses for editors of any public page, widening phishing and social-engineering risks for those editors. The exposure underscores how collaboration platforms can inadvertently leak contact data, prompting urgent checks on access, password hygiene, and alerting for targeted scams.
items.summary_zh: Notion 被曝公开页面编辑者的邮箱地址，扩大了他们遭遇钓鱼与社工攻击的风险。此类暴露凸显协作工具对外共享联系信息的潜在隐患，需紧急检查权限、提升密码安全并警惕定向诈骗。

items.title_en: Firefox Has Integrated Brave's Adblock Engine
items.title_zh: Firefox 已集成 Brave 的广告拦截引擎
items.summary_en: Firefox now ships with Brave's ad-blocking engine, enabling more aggressive blocklists and better tracking protection by default. The move improves privacy and performance but raises questions about licensing and how this affects the broader adtech ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: Firefox 现已内置 Brave 的广告拦截引擎，默认提供更强的拦截名单和更好的追踪保护。此举提升了隐私和性能，但也引发关于许可和对更广泛广告技术生态的影响的讨论。

items.title_en: Why has there been so little progress on Alzheimer's disease?
items.title_zh: 为何阿尔茨海默病研究进展如此缓慢？
items.summary_en: Despite large funding, progress remains limited due to disease complexity, late detection, and trial failures. The episode explores structural bottlenecks in research funding, data sharing, and clinical trial design, and suggests priorities like early biomarkers and smarter trial designs.
items.summary_zh: 尽管投入巨资，阿尔茨海默病研究进展仍受疾病复杂性、早期诊断不足以及临床试验设计等结构性瓶颈制约。节目讨论了研究资助、数据共享等体系性问题，并提出通过早期生物标志物和更高效的试验设计等路径来突破。

items.title_en: Investigation uncovers two sophisticated telecom surveillance campaigns
items.title_zh: 调查揭露两起高级电信监控行动
items.summary_en: Two sophisticated telecom surveillance campaigns were uncovered, showing how vendors abused access to telcos to track people's locations. The exposure highlights private surveillance risks and gaps in vendor governance, raising calls for tighter oversight and stricter data-access controls. It underscores why telecom partnerships and supply-chain security matter for user privacy.
items.summary_zh: 调查揭露两起高级电信监控行动，揭示供应商滥用对运营商的访问来追踪手机位置。曝光点出私营监控的风险与治理漏洞，促使各方呼吁加强监督和更严格的数据访问控制。此事凸显了电信合作与供应链安全在保护用户隐私方面的重要性。

items.title_en: AI Resistance: some recent anti-AI stuff that’s worth discussing
items.title_zh: AI 抵抗：几条值得讨论的近期反AI观点
items.summary_en: Highlights a wave of anti-AI sentiment and proposals, from policy debates to industry watchdog actions. The piece argues that despite hype around AI, there are substantive concerns about safety, bias, job displacement, and governance worth debating for builders and operators.
items.summary_zh: 概述对 AI 的抵抗思潮及近期相关主张，包括政策辩论与行业监察行动等。文章指出，尽管 AI 热潮高涨，但在安全、偏见、就业影响和治理等方面存在实质性担忧，值得技术从业者讨论权衡。

items.title_en: Vercel says internal systems hit in breach
items.title_zh: Vercel 内部系统遭遇入侵
items.summary_en: Vercel says its internal systems were breached and it is now investigating the incident. The case highlights ongoing risk to cloud providers’ internal networks, even when customer data remains uncertain, prompting questions about vendor-side security hygiene and incident response.
items.summary_zh: Vercel 表示内部系统遭到入侵，正在进行调查。此事凸显云服务商内部网络的持续风险，即便客户数据尚未明确受到影响，也引发对供应商端安全与应急响应的讨论。

items.title_en: The Vercel breach: OAuth attack exposes risk in platform environment variables
items.title_zh: Vercel 事件暴露：OAuth 攻击暴露环境变量风险
items.summary_en: An OAuth-related attack exposed sensitive environment variables in Vercel's platform, potentially leaking credentials used by customers. This shows how secret leakage in hosting environments can ripple across the supply chain and compromise downstream services. It reinforces the need for strict secret management, token rotation, and least-privilege access in platform environments.
items.summary_zh: 一次与 OAuth 相关的攻击暴露了 Vercel 平台中的敏感环境变量，可能泄露客户使用的凭证。此事揭示了托管环境中密钥泄露带来的连锁风险，以及对严格秘密管理、令牌轮换和最小权限的必要性。企业应加强环境变量保护与密钥治理。

items.title_en: AI should elevate your thinking, not replace it
items.title_zh: AI 应提升你的思考，而非替代它
items.summary_en: A thoughtful piece argues that AI should augment human thinking, not replace it, offering practical guidance on using AI as a cognitive partner while preserving critical judgment and accountability.
items.summary_zh: 文章主张 AI 应该提升人类思考，而非替代，提供把 AI 当作认知伙伴使用的实用方法，同时保留批判性判断与问责。

items.title_en: The Free Universal Construction Kit
items.title_zh: 免费通用构造套件
items.summary_en: An open hardware project that provides 3D-printable adapters to connect LEGO bricks with other brands, enabling cross-brand construction. The kit includes downloadable files and community-funded components, showcasing practical interoperability and the spirit of open hardware in playful engineering.
items.summary_zh: 一个开源的硬件项目，提供将乐高与其他品牌的搭建系统连接的3D打印适配器，使跨品牌拼搭成为可能。套件包含可下载的设计文件与社区资助的组件，展示了实际互操作性在玩具硬件中的应用，以及对封闭品牌生态的挑战。

items.title_en: Deezer says 44% of songs uploaded to its platform daily are AI-generated
items.title_zh: Deezer 每日上传音乐中有 44% 为 AI 生成
items.summary_en: Deezer reports that a substantial share of daily uploads are AI-generated, highlighting the tension between AI creativity and licensing. The trend raises questions about rights, attribution, and how platforms manage AI-created content.
items.summary_zh: Deezer 报告每日上传中相当比例为 AI 生成，凸显 AI 创作与版权之间的张力。此趋势引发关于授权、署名与平台如何管理 AI 内容的讨论。

items.title_en: Replace IBM Quantum back end with /dev/urandom
items.title_zh: 用 /dev/urandom 替换 IBM 量子后端
items.summary_en: A playful demo replaces the IBM Quantum backend with /dev/urandom, showing that for some workflows, classical randomness can mimic quantum results well enough to test software. The exercise highlights the importance of trustworthy backends and clear expectations around quantum versus classical randomness.
items.summary_zh: 一个有趣的演示用 /dev/urandom 来替代 IBM 量子后端，表明在某些工作流中，经典随机性也能在测试阶段近似量子结果。此举强调信任的后端与区分量子与经典随机性的必要性。

items.title_en: How to be anti-social – a guide to incoherent and isolating social experiences
items.title_zh: 如何成为反社会的人——关于不连贯且孤立社交体验的指南
items.summary_en: Explores how social dynamics can feel incoherent and isolating, offering observations about why some people retreat from conventional social routines. It isn't a how-to for harm; rather it frames the psychology of misaligned social signals and the tech culture around it.
items.summary_zh: 本文探讨为何某些人会在社交场合中感到错位与孤立，社会互动的信号错配让人难以建立联系。作者从科技工作者的视角分析常见社交模式与心理反应，强调并非倡导不社交，而是理解背后的原因。

items.title_en: There Will Be a Scientific Theory of Deep Learning
items.title_zh: 将来会有深度学习的科学理论
items.summary_en: A theoretical paper argues that deep learning will eventually be understood through a rigorous, testable theory that explains generalization and training dynamics. It outlines guiding principles and discusses how such a theory could steer future research and evaluation.
items.summary_zh: 一篇理论论文认为深度学习终将建立一套连贯、可检验的科学理论，解释泛化与训练动力学。文中提出若干原则，并讨论该理论如何引导未来研究与评估。

items.title_en: Britannica11.org – a structured edition of the 1911 Encyclopædia Britannica
items.title_zh: Britannica11.org：1911 年版《大英百科全书》的结构化版本
items.summary_en: Britannica11.org hosts a structured edition of the 1911 Encyclopædia Britannica, making the historical text more searchable and navigable. It demonstrates how retro-digitization can unlock research value and educational use with modern tooling. The project shows how open reconstruction of old reference works benefits today’s learners.
items.summary_zh: Britannica11.org 将1911年版《大英百科全书》的文本以结构化方式呈现，使之更易检索与导航。该项目展示了以现代工具对历史文本进行再数字化的研究与教育价值。开放重建古籍资料有助于当代学习者。

items.title_en: Arch Linux Now Has a Bit-for-Bit Reproducible Docker Image
items.title_zh: Arch Linux 现已提供逐位可重现的 Docker 镜像
items.summary_en: Arch Linux now ships a bit-for-bit reproducible Docker image, enabling deterministic builds for CI and debugging. This reduces non-determinism in container creation and helps developers reproduce environments exactly.
items.summary_zh: Arch Linux 现已提供逐位可重现的 Docker 镜像，使构建过程在 CI 和调试中具备可重复性。这样可消除镜像创建中的随机差异，帮助开发者精准重现运行环境。

items.title_en: Technical, cognitive, and intent debt
items.title_zh: 马丁·福勒：技术债、认知债与意图债
items.summary_en: Martin Fowler frames debt beyond code: technical debt, cognitive debt, and intent debt. He outlines how mental load and misaligned intent erode maintainability, and suggests design and documentation practices to curb them.
items.summary_zh: 马丁·福勒将债务分为技术债、认知债与意图债三类。认知负担和实现意图不一致会侵蚀可维护性，他建议通过设计清晰的接口、更好地文档来降低风险。

items.title_en: Drunk post: Things I've learned as a senior engineer (2021)
items.title_zh: 醉笔记：资深工程师学到的事
items.summary_en: Late-night reflections from a seasoned engineer distill practical lessons about code quality, mentorship, and prioritization. It also offers candid observations on avoiding burnout while building reliable systems and nurturing healthy teams.
items.summary_zh: 这是一位资深工程师的深夜随笔，浓缩了关于代码质量、导师制、工作优先级与抗 Burnout 的经验教训。文中还就如何在构建可靠系统的同时维护健康的团队氛围提出了真实的观察与建议。

items.title_en: Spinel: Ruby AOT Native Compiler
items.title_zh: Spinel：Ruby 的 AOT 原生编译器
items.summary_en: Spinel is an ahead-of-time native compiler for Ruby, precompiling Ruby code into optimized machine code. The compiler promises faster startup times and lower memory usage, benefiting server apps, scripting tools, and embedded deployments. If it matures, Spinel could shift Ruby performance characteristics closer to statically compiled languages.
items.summary_zh: Spinel 是 Ruby 的 AOT 原生编译器，将 Ruby 代码预编译为本地机器码。它有望提高启动速度并降低内存占用，受益于服务器应用、脚本工具和嵌入式部署。若发展成熟，Spinel 可能使 Ruby 的性能更接近静态编译语言。

items.title_en: Tim Cook's Impeccable Timing
items.title_zh: 蒂姆·库克的完美时机
items.summary_en: The piece argues Tim Cook has timed key moves around AI, privacy, and supply chains to optimize Apple’s trajectory. By aligning product cadence with regulatory and market windows, Apple maintains pricing power and investor confidence in a shifting tech landscape.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为蒂姆·库克在 AI、隐私与供应链等关键节点的时机把握，帮助苹果在快速变化的科技格局中维持定价能力与投资者信心。通过与监管与市场窗口对齐的产品节奏，苹果在竞争中保持领先。

items.title_en: Tell HN: I'm sick of AI everything
items.title_zh: 告诉 HN：我厌倦 AI 无处不在
items.summary_en: A Hacker News tell thread expresses fatigue with AI hype across consumer tech, arguing for more emphasis on robust engineering and practical value. It reflects a broader pushback against overhyped AI features and asks for more meaningful AI workflows.
items.summary_zh: 一则 Tell HN 帖子表达了对 AI 无处不在的厌倦，主张将精力放在扎实的工程与实际价值上，而不是追逐热炒的 AI 功能。该讨论反映了对 AI 控制与实用性之间的更广泛质疑。

items.title_en: Edit store price tags using Flipper Zero
items.title_zh: 用 Flipper Zero 修改商店价格标签
items.summary_en: Editing store price tags with Flipper Zero demonstrates potential tampering of NFC/RFID labels in retail. The project highlights security risks in automated tagging and stresses the need for tamper-evident controls. It serves as a reminder to harden retail IoT and labeling systems.
items.summary_zh: 使用 Flipper Zero 编辑商店价格标签演示了零售环境下对近场通信/射频标签的潜在篡改风险。该项目凸显了自动标签的安全隐患，并强调防篡改控制的重要性，提醒业界加强零售物联网和标签系统的安全性。

items.title_en: Using coding assistance tools to revive projects you never were going to finish
items.title_zh: 用编码辅助工具重启那些你原本不打算完成的项目
items.summary_en: The author argues it's okay to use coding assistants to revive projects you weren't going to finish. The approach is pragmatic: carve out a minimal viable scaffold quickly, establish clear goals, and iterate in small steps. Maintain awareness of long-term maintainability and debt as you revive and ship.
items.summary_zh: 作者认为使用编程辅助工具来重启原本打算放弃的项目是可以接受的做法。策略上强调务实：快速搭建最小可行框架、设定清晰目标，并分阶段迭代；在重振项目的同时，也要留意维护性和技术债务。

items.title_en: Scoring Show HN submissions for AI design patterns
items.title_zh: 用 AI 设计模式对 Show HN 提交打分
items.summary_en: A design-focused critique proposes scoring Show HN submissions using AI design patterns, offering a rubric to evaluate modularity, data flows, and safety. The idea is to give more structured, design-conscious feedback on community demos.
items.summary_zh: 一种以设计为导向的评论提出用 AI 设计模式对 Show HN 提交进行评分，提供评估模块化、数据流和安全等要点的标准。旨在为社区展示提供更有结构的反馈。

items.title_en: The seven programming ur-languages (2022)
items.title_zh: 编程之祖：七种原始语言（2022）
items.summary_en: The post surveys seven foundational languages that shaped modern programming, tracing how concepts from these roots influence today’s language design and tooling. It also reflects on what we gain by revisiting these roots, and which ideas still matter for building robust, expressive software.
items.summary_zh: 本文梳理了七种塑造现代编程的基础语言，追溯其思想如何影响当今的语言设计与工具链。回顾根源可以帮助理解当代语言的优缺点，哪些理念在构建健壮且高效的软件时仍然重要。

items.title_en: We accepted surveillance as default
items.title_zh: 我们已默认接受监控
items.summary_en: Traces how everyday technology—phones, apps, smart devices—normalizes surveillance as a cost of convenience. The piece argues for rethinking consent, data minimization, and regulatory safeguards to reclaim privacy.
items.summary_zh: 分析日常科技产品如何使监控成为便利成本的一部分。呼吁重新审视用户同意、数据最小化与监管保障，以重获隐私控制权。

items.title_en: Not buying another Kindle
items.title_zh: 不再买下一台 Kindle
items.summary_en: Argues that new Kindle models may not justify upgrade costs amid marginal gains in display tech and features. The piece weighs ecosystem lock-in, price, and privacy considerations, suggesting readers pause and compare alternatives.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为新一代 Kindle 的升级成本可能得不偿失，显示技术与功能提升有限。作者分析生态锁定、价格与隐私等因素，建议读者暂停跟进并对比其他选项。

items.title_en: My audio interface has SSH enabled by default
items.title_zh: 我的音频接口默认启用 SSH
items.summary_en: Security researchers found that the audio interface ships with SSH enabled by default, exposing remote access on the same network. This kind of vendor-default service can create attack surfaces; users should disable SSH or update firmware.
items.summary_zh: 音频接口默认开启 SSH，若设备在同一网络中，攻击者可能取得远程访问权限。这类厂商默认开启的服务暴露了攻击面，用户应禁用 SSH 或尽快升级固件。

items.title_en: Tesla concealed fatal accidents to continue testing autonomous driving
items.title_zh: 特斯拉隐瞒致命事故以继续测试自动驾驶
items.summary_en: Allegations claim Tesla concealed fatal autonomous-driving incidents to keep testing ongoing. The report raises questions about safety oversight, corporate incentives, and the path to scalable, trustworthy self-driving tech.
items.summary_zh: 据称特斯拉在测试自动驾驶时隐瞒致命事故以维持测试进度。此事引发对安全监管、企业激励以及实现可扩展且可信的自动驾驶技术路径的质疑。

items.title_en: Ubuntu 26.04
items.title_zh: Ubuntu 26.04 发布
items.summary_en: Ubuntu 26.04 arrives as a long-term release with updated kernels and desktop components, plus enterprise-oriented improvements. It emphasizes stability, security, and hardware support, serving as a reliable base for both desktops and servers.
items.summary_zh: Ubuntu 26.04 作为长期版本发布，带来内核与桌面组件的更新以及面向企业的改进。强调稳定性、安全性，并提升对新硬件的支持，适合作为桌面与服务器的长期基线。

items.title_en: Sawe becomes first athlete to run a sub-two-hour marathon in a competitive race
items.title_zh: 萨韦在正式比赛中实现马拉松2小时内的里程碑
items.summary_en: Sawe reportedly becomes the first athlete to run a sub-two-hour marathon in a competitive race, a landmark that presses the boundaries of human endurance. The feat highlights advances in training, pacing, and data-driven preparation enabled by modern sports tech.
items.summary_zh: 据称萨韦在正式比赛中首次实现马拉松两小时内的里程碑，挑战人类极限。此成就反映出训练、 pacing 与数据驱动的备战在当代体育科技中的进步。

items.title_en: 3.4M Solar Panels
items.title_zh: 340万块太阳能板
items.summary_en: A new US solar farm project uses 3.4 million panels, underscoring the scale of modern utility-scale renewables.
items.summary_zh: 美国一处大型太阳能农场部署了340万块面板，凸显了现代公用事业级可再生能源的规模。文章讨论了面板密度、土地使用和并网对成本、容量与建设周期的影响。

items.title_en: Kimi vendor verifier – verify accuracy of inference providers
items.title_zh: Kimi 厂商验证器：验证推理提供商的准确性
items.summary_en: Kimi launches a vendor verifier to assess the accuracy of AI inference providers, addressing reliability concerns in enterprise AI purchases. The tool likely standardizes benchmarks and governance checks, helping buyers compare model quality across vendors. As enterprises lean on third‑party inference, verifiable performance becomes a strategic gatekeeper.
items.summary_zh: Kimi 推出厂商验证器，用以评估 AI 推理提供商的准确性，解决企业在采购时对可靠性的担忧。该工具可能提供标准化的基准与治理检查，帮助买家对比不同供应商的模型质量。随着企业对推理能力的依赖，具可验证性能的能力变得日益关键。

items.title_en: EU Age Control: The trojan horse for digital IDs
items.title_zh: 欧盟年龄控制：数字身份的特洛伊木马
items.summary_en: EU age-control rules could become a backdoor into broad digital identity systems, forcing platforms to collect or verify identity beyond age. Privacy and accessibility concerns accompany the push.
items.summary_zh: 欧盟的年龄控制规则可能成为通往广泛数字身份体系的特洛伊木马，推动平台在年龄之外收集或验证身份。此举伴随隐私和可访问性方面的担忧。

items.title_en: Changes in the system prompt between Claude Opus 4.6 and 4.7
items.title_zh: Claude Opus 4.6 与 4.7 的系统提示变更
items.summary_en: Describes updates to the model's system prompt between Claude Opus 4.6 and 4.7, showcasing how tiny prompt design changes can affect behavior, safety, and output style. The note emphasizes the importance of prompt engineering on LLMs and how platform updates can shift capabilities and guardrails.
items.summary_zh: 介绍了 Claude Opus 4.6 与 4.7 的系统提示变更，展示了微小的提示设计差异对模型行为、安全边界和输出风格的影响。强调提示工程在大型语言模型中的重要性，以及平台更新如何改变能力与约束。

items.title_en: Turtle WoW classic server announces shutdown after Blizzard wins injunction
items.title_zh: 在暴雪胜诉禁令后 Turtle WoW 经典服务器宣布关闭
items.summary_en: Turtle WoW, a private World of Warcraft Classic server, announced shutdown after Blizzard won an injunction. The move underscores IP enforcement dynamics in the private-server space and the ongoing tension between fan-run servers and game publishers.
items.summary_zh: 在暴雪获得禁令后，Turtle WoW 经典私服宣布关闭。这凸显了私服领域在知识产权执法方面的压力，以及玩家社区与发行商之间的持续博弈。

items.title_en: OpenAI ad partner now selling ChatGPT ad placements based on “prompt relevance”
items.title_zh: OpenAI 广告合作伙伴现依据“提示相关性”销售 ChatGPT 广告位
items.summary_en: An OpenAI ad partner is reportedly selling ChatGPT ad placements based on prompt relevance, suggesting a shift to contextualized advertising within AI chat experiences. The leaked deck hints at programmable targeting that could reshape how brands buy AI-native inventory. This raises questions about measurement, privacy, and monetization in AI advertising.
items.summary_zh: 据报道，OpenAI 的广告合作伙伴正基于“提示相关性”销售 ChatGPT 广告位，标志着在 AI 聊天体验中向情境化广告的转变。泄露的演示文稿暗示了可编程的定向策略，可能改变品牌对 AI 原生广告位的购买方式。此举引发对衡量、隐私与 AI 广告营收模式的讨论。

items.title_en: Quantum Computers Are Not a Threat to 128-Bit Symmetric Keys
items.title_zh: 量子计算对128位对称密钥并非威胁
items.summary_en: The piece explains that quantum computers are not an immediate risk to 128-bit symmetric keys; Grover's algorithm would require impractical resources to break them soon. It reassures cryptographers about near-term security margins.
items.summary_zh: 文章解释量子计算并非对128位对称密钥的直接威胁；利用 Grover 算法在短期内要实现破解需要巨大的资源。为近期香港的安全裕度提供安抚作用。

items.title_en: The insider trading suspicions looming over Trump's presidency
items.title_zh: 特朗普任期内的内幕交易嫌疑笼罩
items.summary_en: Regulators are scrutinizing potential insider trading during Trump's presidency, examining stock trades around major announcements. The focus reflects tensions between political activity and securities laws, with implications for accountability and market integrity.
items.summary_zh: 监管机构正在审查特朗普任期内是否存在内幕交易，重点关注重大公告前后的股票交易。此事反映政治活动与证券法之间的合规风险，以及对市场公信力的潜在影响。

items.title_en: Plain text has been around for decades and it’s here to stay
items.title_zh: 纯文本已存在数十年且将继续存在
items.summary_en: Plain text remains the most portable, durable format for long-term data and interoperability. Even as rich formats proliferate, plain text underpins archival resilience, tooling, and cross-system compatibility.
items.summary_zh: 纯文本仍是最便携、最耐久的数据格式，适用于长期存档与互操作性。尽管涌现出丰富的格式，纯文本在可存档性、工具兼容性等方面依然占据核心地位。

items.title_en: OpenClaw isn't fooling me. I remember MS-DOS
items.title_zh: OpenClaw 骗不了我，我记得 MS-DOS
items.summary_en: The piece casts doubt on OpenClaw, arguing for the virtues of simpler, offline computing reminiscent of MS-DOS. It also stresses the need for rigorous security when deploying local AI agents.
items.summary_zh: 文章对 OpenClaw 持保留态度，强调简洁离线计算的优点，类似于 MS-DOS 的思路。同时强调在本地部署 AI 代理时需要强有力的安全设计。

items.title_en: F-35 is built for the wrong war
items.title_zh: F-35：为错误的战争打造的杰作
items.summary_en: A critique argues the F-35 program is optimized for a hypothetical war that doesn’t reflect current threat realities, focusing on cost, interoperability, and doctrine alignment. The piece invites reevaluation of defense procurement and emphasizes the need for open, adaptable systems. For tech readers, it’s a case study in aligning hardware programs with real-world use cases.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为 F-35 项目为一种与现实威胁不符的假设战争进行了优化，批评成本、互操作性与作战理念的错配。该观点推动对国防采购的再评估，强调需要更开放、可适应的系统。对于科技读者而言，这是一个将硬件计划与真实应用对齐的案例研究。

items.title_en: MNT Reform is an open hardware laptop, designed and assembled in Germany
items.title_zh: MNT Reform：在德国设计并组装的开放硬件笔记本
items.summary_en: MNT Reform is an open hardware laptop with full public documentation, allowing users to build, customize, or repair the device. Made and assembled in Germany, the project emphasizes repairability, transparency, and user freedom in hardware beyond sealed consumer devices.
items.summary_zh: 这款开放硬件笔记本提供完整的公开文档、材料清单与装配指导，用户可自行组装、定制或维修。德国制造的该项目强调在供应链日益复杂的背景下，硬件的可修复性与透明度。

items.title_en: MacBook Neo and how the iPad should be
items.title_zh: MacBook Neo 与 iPad 的未来方向
items.summary_en: Craig Mod's essay argues about how the MacBook Neo and iPad lines should converge or diverge, examining hardware and software decisions to balance portability, productivity, and ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: 文章探讨 MacBook Neo 与 iPad 的未来定位，分析硬件与软件取舍，以在便携性、生产力与生态系统之间寻求平衡。

items.title_en: Show HN: Tolaria – Open-source macOS app to manage Markdown knowledge bases
items.title_zh: Tolaria：用于管理 Markdown 知识库的开源 macOS 应用
items.summary_en: Tolaria is an open-source macOS app for managing Markdown knowledge bases. It offers local-first storage, markdown editing, and linking between notes to create a searchable knowledge graph. For researchers and developers who want offline, portable knowledge management, it's a compelling option.
items.summary_zh: Tolaria 是一个开源的 macOS 应用，用来管理 Markdown 知识库。它支持本地存储、Markdown 编辑，以及笔记之间的连结，方便构建可搜索的知识体系。对需要离线、可移植笔记管理的开发者和研究者很有吸引力。

items.title_en: Show HN: Honker – Postgres NOTIFY/LISTEN Semantics for SQLite
items.title_zh: Honker：SQLite 实现 Postgres NOTIFY/LISTEN 语义
items.summary_en: Honker brings Postgres NOTIFY/LISTEN semantics to SQLite, enabling real-time event signaling without a full Postgres server. It demonstrates how lightweight, embedded databases can emulate cross-database messaging patterns, useful for event-driven UIs and local apps.
items.summary_zh: Honker 将 PostgreSQL 的 LISTEN/NOTIFY 实时通知语义带到 SQLite，使嵌入式应用能够在不依赖完整 Postgres 的情况下实现事件驱动通信。它为本地应用提供了轻量级的事件总线，适合实现实时 UI 更新等场景。

items.title_en: OpenAI Privacy Filter
items.title_zh: OpenAI 隐私过滤器
items.summary_en: OpenAI introduces a privacy filter designed to scrub personal data from prompts and responses, helping users keep sensitive information out of training data and shared logs. The feature aligns with increasing regulatory and user demand for privacy-preserving AI interactions.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出隐私过滤器，旨在从提示和回复中去除个人敏感信息，帮助用户避免将数据用于训练或公开日志。该功能回应日益增长的隐私合规与用户对隐私保护的需求。

items.title_en: Why I Write (1946)
items.title_zh: 我为何写作（1946）
items.summary_en: Orwell explains that writers are driven by four motives—ego, aesthetic pleasure, historical impulse, and political purpose—and argues that writing should aim to illuminate truth and resist tyranny. The piece remains a candid meditation on why serious writing matters in a world of rising propaganda.
items.summary_zh: 奥威尔在文中提出写作源于四种动机：自我、审美、历史冲动和政治目的，并主张写作应以揭示真相、抵制暴政为目标。此篇对在极权与宣传日益高涨的时代，写作为何仍然重要给出直率的思考。

items.title_en: Show HN: VidStudio, a browser based video editor that doesn't upload your files
items.title_zh: VidStudio：基于浏览器、在本地处理的视频编辑器
items.summary_en: VidStudio offers browser-based video editing with client-side processing, so your files never leave your device. It demonstrates that privacy-focused web apps can rival traditional editors, though real-world performance and feature parity depend on ongoing Web platform progress. Early demos suggest strong potential for offline work and rapid iteration.
items.summary_zh: VidStudio 提供基于浏览器的视频编辑，文件全部在本地处理，不会上传云端。此类隐私友好网络应用正逐步接近传统编辑器的功能，实际性能与功能仍取决于网页平台的持续进展。早期演示显示在离线工作和快速迭代方面具有潜力。

items.title_en: SDL Now Supports DOS
items.title_zh: SDL 现已支持 DOS 环境
items.summary_en: SDL now supports DOS environments, enabling legacy DOS apps to run with modern SDL features. This broadens cross-platform reach for retro games and tooling built on SDL, and could simplify porting older multimedia software.
items.summary_zh: SDL 现已支持 DOS 环境，使基于 SDL 的旧 DOS 应用能够在现代系统上运行。此举拓展了向后兼容性，有助于复兴复古游戏和相关工具的移植与开发。

items.title_en: M 7.4 earthquake – 100 km ENE of Miyako, Japan
items.title_zh: 日本宫古以东约100公里发生7.4级地震
items.summary_en: An earthquake of magnitude 7.4 occurred roughly 100 km ENE of Miyako, Japan. Seismic monitoring and aftershock planning are ongoing, with authorities advising preparedness for potential tremors and damage.
items.summary_zh: 日本宫古以东约100公里发生7.4级地震。地震监测与余震预警正在进行，相关部门提醒公众保持警惕并做好防灾准备。

items.title_en: A Roblox cheat and one AI tool brought down Vercel's platform
items.title_zh: 一起 Roblox 作弊和一个 AI 工具导致 Vercel 平台宕机
items.summary_en: A Roblox cheat and an AI tool reportedly caused a cascading outage on Vercel’s platform, illustrating how misuse and automation tools can ripple through a cloud service. The incident underscores the fragility of complex, automated deployments and the importance of robust abuse controls and mitigations.
items.summary_zh: 一起 Roblox 作弊脚本和一个 AI 工具事件据称导致 Vercel 平台发生大范围崩溃，暴露了滥用与自动化工具对云服务的连锁影响。此事凸显了复杂自动部署的脆弱性，以及加强滥用防护与缓解措施的重要性。

items.title_en: The RAM shortage could last years
items.title_zh: RAM短缺可能持续数年
items.summary_en: RAM shortages driven by surging AI workloads and ongoing supply-chain constraints may persist for years, keeping memory prices volatile. Consumers could see higher prices and tighter availability for PCs and consumer devices, while data centers face tougher procurement as demand stays elevated. The situation underscores how AI demand can reshape even core hardware markets.
items.summary_zh: RAM 短缺可能持续多年，AI、云计算对内存的需求持续高位，叠加产能瓶颈。对消费电子和服务器市场将带来价格与库存的持续压力。

items.title_en: Brussels launched an age checking app. Hackers took 2 minutes to break it
items.title_zh: 布鲁塞尔推出年龄验证应用，黑客两分钟就破解了
items.summary_en: Hackers reportedly cracked Brussels’ age-check app within two minutes, exposing vulnerabilities in a government digital tool. The breach underscores the difficulty of designing robust privacy- and safety-focused checks and raises questions about deployment practices and responsible disclosure. It serves as a cautionary tale for public‑sector app rollouts.
items.summary_zh: 据称黑客在两分钟内破解了布鲁塞尔的年龄验证应用，暴露政府数字工具的脆弱性。此事件凸显在隐私与安全检查方面设计的挑战，也引发对部署实践与披露责任的讨论。对公共部门应用上线具有警示作用。

items.title_en: Parallel agents in Zed
items.title_zh: Zed 的并行代理
items.summary_en: Zed unveils parallel agents architecture that lets multiple AI agents run concurrently within pipelines. This boosts throughput and enables more complex collaboration, while raising questions about coordination and resource management.
items.summary_zh: Zed 公布并行代理架构，允许多个 AI 代理在工作流中同时并发运行。提升吞吐与协作复杂性，但也带来协作、状态与资源管理等挑战。

items.title_en: Flickr: The first and last great photo platform
items.title_zh: Flickr：第一代也是最后一代伟大的照片平台
items.summary_en: A retrospective on Flickr's rise as a community-driven photo platform and its decline, drawing lessons about openness, data portability, and the trade-offs between openness and monetization in online communities.
items.summary_zh: 回顾 Flickr 在社区驱动的照片平台时代的崛起及其衰落，揭示开放性、数据可移植性，以及开放性与商业化之间在在线社区中的权衡。

items.title_en: MeshCore development team splits over trademark dispute and AI-generated code
items.title_zh: MeshCore 开发团队因商标纠纷与 AI 生成代码分裂
items.summary_en: MeshCore's dev team splits amid a trademark dispute and debates over AI-generated code, highlighting tensions between IP ownership and the governance of machine-generated outputs. This quarrel signals how legal questions around branding and code provenance can reshape internal teams and project direction.
items.summary_zh: MeshCore 的开发团队因商标争议与对 AI 生成代码的治理分歧而分裂，反映出知识产权归属与机器生成内容管理之间的紧张关系。此事或将影响团队组织与项目走向，揭示企业需要尽早就品牌与代码来源达成共识。

items.title_en: Anthropic takes $5B from Amazon and pledges $100B in cloud spending in return
items.title_zh: Anthropic 获 Amazon 投资50亿美元，承诺云端支出1000亿美元
items.summary_en: Anthropic raises $5B from Amazon in a deal tied to cloud usage, with Anthropic pledging to spend up to $100B on Amazon cloud. The arrangement signals deep reliance on one cloud provider and could shape AI workloads' deployment, pricing, and reliability considerations.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 获得亚马逊 50 亿美元投资，并承诺在亚马逊云端支出最多 1000 亿美元。该交易显示双方在云和 AI 服务上的深度绑定，可能影响未来 AI 工作负载的部署、定价与可靠性考量。

items.title_en: SWE-bench Verified no longer measures frontier coding capabilities
items.title_zh: SWE-bench Verified 不再衡量前沿编码能力
items.summary_en: SWE-bench Verified no longer measures frontier coding capabilities because the metric diverges from real-world coding tasks and can be gamed. The change signals a shift toward more robust, meaningful benchmarks for AI-assisted coding tools.
items.summary_zh: SWE-bench Verified 不再用于衡量前沿编码能力，因为该指标与实际编码任务脱节且易被操控。此举推动评测向更稳健、具备实际意义的基准转变，影响 AI 辅助编码工具的评估方式。

items.title_en: Incident with multple GitHub services
items.title_zh: GitHub 多项服务故障事件
items.summary_en: GitHub reports an incident affecting multiple services, impacting developers' workflows. The incident underscores the fragility of cloud‑hosted DevOps tools and the importance of robust incident response and contingency planning.
items.summary_zh: GitHub 因多项服务出现故障，影响开发者工作流。这起事件凸显云端开发工具的脆弱性以及健全的应急响应和备份计划的重要性。

items.title_en: Statecharts: hierarchical state machines
items.title_zh: 状态图：分层状态机
items.summary_en: Statecharts extend traditional state machines with hierarchy and parallel composition, enabling modeling of complex systems with reusable components. They improve readability and verification of software behavior in UI, robotics, and protocol design; widely used in design of embedded systems.
items.summary_zh: 状态图在传统状态机之上引入了层次结构和并行组合，便于用可重用的组件来建模复杂系统。它提升了对软件行为的可读性与验证性，广泛用于嵌入式、UI、机器人和协议设计等场景。

items.title_en: Claude Code to be removed from Pro Tier?
items.title_zh: Claude Code 将从 Pro 版移除？
items.summary_en: The post hints that Claude Code may be removed from the Pro tier, signaling a shift in access and pricing for coding-focused AI features. If true, it could affect developers who rely on higher-tier AI-assisted code generation.
items.summary_zh: 帖子暗示 Claude Code 可能会从 Pro 版移除，标志着对代码生成功能的获取权限与定价的调整。若属实，将影响依赖这类功能的开发者。

items.title_en: The Classic American Diner
items.title_zh: 经典美式餐馆
items.summary_en: A Library of Congress piece examines the iconography and history of the classic American diner, from stainless interiors to neon signage, and its role in 20th-century American life.
items.summary_zh: 本文回顾经典美式餐馆的历史与标志性设计，如不锈钢内饰和霓虹招牌，以及它们在20世纪美国生活中的文化地位。

items.title_en: Paraloid B-72
items.title_zh: Paraloid B-72树脂
items.summary_en: Paraloid B-72 is a widely used acrylic resin in art conservation, serving as a consolidant and varnish due to its clarity, reversibility, and chemical stability. It remains a topic of ongoing discussions around aging, solvent compatibility, and long-term stability in museum environments.
items.summary_zh: Paraloid B-72 是艺术品保护中广泛使用的丙烯酸树脂，用作固色剂和清漆，因其清晰、可逆性和化学稳定性而备受推崇。但关于其老化、溶剂兼容性及长期稳定性的问题仍在研究和讨论中。

items.title_en: Habitual coffee intake shapes the microbiome, modifies physiology and cognition
items.title_zh: 日常咖啡摄入改变微生物群、影响生理与认知
items.summary_en: Habitual coffee intake reshapes the gut microbiome and alters physiological markers and cognitive function. The study links daily caffeine consumption to specific microbial shifts and metabolic changes, with potential implications for energy, mood, and brain health.
items.summary_zh: 规律性咖啡摄入会重塑肠道微生物群、改变生理指标并影响认知功能。研究将日常咖啡因摄入与特定微生物变化及代谢改变联系起来，可能对能量、情绪和大脑健康产生影响。

items.title_en: Jujutsu megamerges for fun and profit
items.title_zh: 咒术大并购：为了乐趣与利润
items.summary_en: The post uses a Jungian metaphor of jujutsu megamergers to examine large-scale M&A activity, weighing potential synergies against integration risk and regulatory friction. It argues that while consolidation can unlock value, misaligned deals often destroy more than they create. For readers, it’s a lens on strategic playbooks in tech markets.
items.summary_zh: 文章以‘咒术’隐喻探讨大型并购活动，权衡潜在协同效应与整合风险及监管摩擦。作者认为，尽管并购能创造价值，但若目标错配往往适得其反。读者可通过该视角理解科技市场中的战略博弈。

items.title_en: 'Hairdryer used to trick weather sensor' to win Polymarket bet
items.title_zh: 用吹风机欺骗天气传感器以赢取 Polymarket 赌注
items.summary_en: A hairdryer was used to trick a weather sensor to win a Polymarket bet, illustrating how simple physical tampering can influence data-driven markets. The incident exposes vulnerabilities in sensor-based predictions and underscores the need for tamper-evident validation and robust data sources. It serves as a warning for operators of decentralized betting platforms to vet input data more rigorously.
items.summary_zh: 有人用吹风机欺骗天气传感器以在 Polymarket 赌注中获胜，说明简单的物理篡改也能影响数据驱动的市场。事件暴露了基于传感器的预测脆弱性，强调需要具备防篡改的校验与可靠的数据源。对去中心化博彩平台的运营者来说，这是一个更严格审查输入数据的警示。

items.title_en: Original GrapheneOS responses to WIRED fact checker
items.title_zh: GrapheneOS 对 WIRED 事实核查的原始回应
items.summary_en: GrapheneOS posted its initial responses to WIRED's fact-check, pushing back on asserted privacy and security claims. The exchange illustrates how security-focused projects engage with media scrutiny and the importance of precise claims in reporting.
items.summary_zh: GrapheneOS 发布了对 WIRED 事实核查的初步回应，辩护其隐私与安全主张并澄清被错误表述之处。此事展示了以安全为导向的项目如何应对媒体审查，以及报道中对主张精确性的重要性。

items.title_en: OpenAI releases GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5 Pro in the API
items.title_zh: OpenAI 发布 GPT-5.5 与 GPT-5.5 Pro API
items.summary_en: OpenAI expands its API with GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5 Pro, bringing improved capabilities and enterprise features to developers. The update promises better reasoning, safety controls, and more deployment options for applications.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 在 API 中引入 GPT-5.5 与 Pro 版本，带来更强的推理能力、更完善的安全控制以及更多部署选项，面向开发者。

items.title_en: Cal.diy: open-source community edition of cal.com
items.title_zh: Cal.diy：cal.com 的开源社区版
items.summary_en: Cal.diy is a community edition of cal.com that you can self-host, enabling scheduling on your own infrastructure with privacy controls. It demonstrates how open-source forks empower teams to customize and avoid vendor lock-in. The project broadens choices for privacy-conscious deployments.
items.summary_zh: Cal.diy 是 cal.com 的开源社区版，支持自托管，让团队在自有基础设施上进行排程并掌控隐私。它展示了开源分叉如何赋能定制化并减少对厂商的依赖，为注重隐私的部署提供了更多选择。

items.title_en: Ultraviolet corona discharges on treetops during storms
items.title_zh: 树梢出现紫外电晕放电
items.summary_en: Storms produce faint ultraviolet corona discharges visible on treetops, captured on film for the first time. The observation helps scientists study atmospheric electricity and could refine models of lightning initiation.
items.summary_zh: 暴风雨中树梢出现可见的紫外电晕放电，首次被记录成像。这一现象有助于研究大气电现象，并可能改进雷电起始的模型。

items.title_en: WebUSB Extension for Firefox
items.title_zh: Firefox 的 WebUSB 扩展
items.summary_en: A Firefox WebUSB extension enables web apps to access USB devices directly, expanding browser hardware access while raising security considerations. This work illustrates ongoing efforts to bring hardware interoperability to the web.
items.summary_zh: Firefox 的 WebUSB 扩展使网页应用能够直接访问 USB 设备，在扩展浏览器对硬件的接入能力的同时，也带来安全方面的考量，体现了将硬件互操作性带到网页的持续努力。

items.title_en: U.S. soldier charged with using classified info to profit from prediction market
items.title_zh: 美军士兵被控利用机密信息在预测市场获利
items.summary_en: A U.S. soldier has been charged with using classified information to profit from prediction-market bets. The case illustrates how insider access to sensitive data can spill into civilian markets and tests the enforcement of ethics rules for service members. If convicted, it could tighten scrutiny on handling classified material in and out of government channels.
items.summary_zh: 一名美国士兵被控利用机密信息在预测市场下注获利。此案凸显对敏感信息的内部访问可能扩展至民间市场，并检验对军人遵守伦理规定的执法力度。若被定罪，可能促使对处理机密材料的监管进一步收紧。

items.title_en: The Joy of Folding Bikes
items.title_zh: 折叠自行车的乐趣
items.summary_en: Folding bikes excel at portability and urban practicality, letting riders fold, carry, and store bikes easily without sacrificing ride quality. The post celebrates design variety and the growing popularity among city riders.
items.summary_zh: 折叠自行车在便携性与骑行体验之间取得平衡，便于多模态通勤与存放。文章赞美其设计变体与在城市骑行中的日益普及。

items.title_en: The creative software industry has declared war on Adobe
items.title_zh: 创意软件行业对 Adobe 的挑战
items.summary_en: Industry players are intensifying competition with more affordable, capable tools that threaten Adobe's monopoly on creative workflows. The piece surveys notable alternatives and product strategies aimed at teams and individual creators, signaling a shift toward open formats, better pricing, and interoperability.
items.summary_zh: 众多厂商通过更实惠、功能完善的工具挑战 Adobe 在创作工作流中的垄断地位。文章梳理了值得关注的替代品和产品策略，强调开源/开放格式、更友好的定价与互操作性正在成为潮流。

items.title_en: The AI industry is discovering that the public hates it
items.title_zh: 人工智能行业才意识到公众对其存有反感
items.summary_en: Public sentiment toward AI is turning more negative as concerns about safety, bias, and hype intensify. The industry faces mounting scrutiny from policymakers and skeptics, making trust and responsible innovation top priorities.
items.summary_zh: 公众对人工智能的情绪正变得更为负面，安全、偏见与炒作等担忧加剧。行业正面临来自政策制定者和公众的日益密集的监督，信任与负责任的创新成为首要议题。

items.title_en: Using the internet like it's 1999
items.title_zh: 像在1999年一样上网
items.summary_en: A look at surfacing the web with retro, dial-up aesthetics and minimal modern features, challenging today’s feature-heavy UX.
items.summary_zh: 以1999年的互联网方式上网，回归简约、低带宽体验，挑战当下功能繁多的用户体验。文章讨论简化界面、离线优先与低广告干扰的体验对性能、隐私与可访问性的影响。

items.title_en: How to make a fast dynamic language interpreter
items.title_zh: 如何打造高效的动态语言解释器
items.summary_en: This piece surveys architecture choices for a fast dynamic language interpreter, weighing the trade-offs between interpretation, compilation, and JIT techniques. It highlights practical optimizations such as inline caches, bytecode representations, tracing JIT, and data-layout choices that push performance without sacrificing dynamism.
items.summary_zh: 本文讨论快速动态语言解释器的设计取舍，权衡解释、编译和JIT等技术。介绍字节码表示、内联缓存、跟踪编译等实际优化，以及在不牺牲动态性的前提下提升性能的数据结构选择。

items.title_en: Another Day Has Come
items.title_zh: 又一天终于到来
items.summary_en: A reflective piece marking the arrival of a new day.
items.summary_zh: 对时光流逝和新一天到来的反思短文。

items.title_en: Iliad fragment found in Roman-era mummy
items.title_zh: 罗马时期木乃伊中发现伊利亚特碎片
items.summary_en: An Iliad fragment was found inside a Roman-era mummy, indicating Greek literature circulated in Egypt during Roman rule and offering clues about textual transmission across cultures.
items.summary_zh: 在罗马时期木乃伊中发现《伊利亚特》碎片，表明希腊文学在罗马统治下的埃及仍在流传，并为跨文化文本传抄提供线索。

items.title_en: Show HN: How LLMs Work – Interactive visual guide based on Karpathy's lecture
items.title_zh: Show HN：基于 Karpathy 演讲的互动式 LLM 工作原理可视化指南
items.summary_en: An interactive, visual walkthrough of how large language models operate, built around Karpathy's famous lecture. It demystifies core concepts like tokens, attention, prompts, and inference, making advanced AI theory accessible to developers and students.
items.summary_zh: 这是一个基于 Karpathy 演讲的互动式可视化指南，分步展示大型语言模型的工作原理。通过直观的令牌、注意力、提示与推理等要素，帮助开发者和学习者更好地理解模型运作。

items.title_en: Show HN: A Karpathy-style LLM wiki your agents maintain (Markdown and Git)
items.title_zh: Show HN：由代理维护的 Karpathy 风格的 LLM 维基（Markdown 与 Git）
items.summary_en: Show HN: A wiki for large language models that agents maintain, using Markdown and Git, inspired by Karpathy's approach. It enables auditable knowledge sharing and versioned reasoning traces for LLM-driven workflows.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：一个由代理维护、以 Markdown 与 Git 为版本控制的 LLM 维基，灵感来自 Karpathy 的做法。实现可审计的知识共享与对 LL M 推理过程的版本化追踪。

items.title_en: I don't want your PRs anymore
items.title_zh: 我不再想要你的 PR 了
items.summary_en: The author argues against accepting external pull requests, advocating for maintainers to own the code and reduce external contributions. It discusses governance, maintainership, and the tradeoffs between openness and sustainable maintenance.
items.summary_zh: 作者提出不再接受外部 PR，主张维护者应拥有代码并减少外部贡献。讨论治理、维护与开放性与可持续维护之间的权衡。

items.title_en: I Made the "Next-Level" Camera and I love it
items.title_zh: 我做了“下一代”相机，我真的很喜欢
items.summary_en: An individual shares building a so-called 'next-level' camera, detailing design choices, improvements, and why the creator loves the result.
items.summary_zh: 作者分享打造的“下一代”相机，阐述设计选择与改进，以及对成品的喜爱与感受。

items.title_en: Niri 26.04: Scrollable-tiling Wayland compositor
items.title_zh: Niri 26.04：可滚动平铺的 Wayland 合成器
items.summary_en: Niri 26.04 release introduces scrollable tiling in its Wayland compositor, enabling more flexible window tiling with scrollable frames. The update improves multitasking for users who prefer tiling workflows and dynamic navigation.
items.summary_zh: Niri 26.04 版本在 Wayland 合成器中加入可滚动的平铺布局，使窗口排布更加灵活，支持滚动的窗口区域。此更新提升了偏好平铺工作流的用户在多任务和导航上的体验。

items.title_en: How does GPS work?
items.title_zh: 全球定位系统是如何工作？
items.summary_en: The piece breaks down how satellites, receivers, and precise timing combine to determine a location. It covers signal structure, accuracy, and common vulnerabilities like jamming or spoofing, with implications for devices and privacy.
items.summary_zh: 本文分解了卫星、接收器和精确时间如何共同确定位置，介绍信号结构、精度，以及常见的干扰与欺骗等脆弱点，并讨论对设备和隐私的影响。

items.title_en: 2,100 Swiss municipalities showing which provider handles their official email
items.title_zh: 2100 个瑞士自治市政体公开官方邮箱提供商
items.summary_en: A dataset showing which providers manage official emails for Swiss municipalities, highlighting security, sovereignty, and procurement fragmentation. It sheds light on public-sector cloud dependencies.
items.summary_zh: 这份数据集揭示了瑞士两千多自治市在官方邮箱服务商方面的选择及分布，反映出采购分散、云服务依赖及安全治理的挑战。对公共部门的信息安全、合规和供应商锁定具有重要意义。

items.title_en: Swiss authorities want to reduce dependency on Microsoft
items.title_zh: 瑞士当局欲降低对微软的依赖
items.summary_en: Swiss authorities aim to diversify software suppliers and reduce Microsoft dependency, signaling a push toward open-source options and domestic alternatives. The move touches on security, privacy, and government IT sovereignty.
items.summary_zh: 瑞士当局计划多元化软件供应商并降低对微软的依赖，体现向开源方案和本地替代品的转向。此举关系到安全、隐私以及政府信息技术主权等议题。

items.title_en: What async promised and what it delivered
items.title_zh: 异步编程：承诺与现实
items.summary_en: Async promised simpler concurrency and scalability but delivered complexity in practice. The piece argues for better mental models and language/runtime design to align promises with real-world trade-offs.
items.summary_zh: 关于异步编程的承诺与现实存在差距。文章认为异步更多地解决了 I/O 的扩展性问题，但带来了新的复杂性，并呼吁改进心智模型与语言/运行时设计，以更好地把承诺落地。

items.title_en: Running a Minecraft Server and more on a 1960s UNIVAC Computer
items.title_zh: 在1960年代的 UNIVAC 计算机上运行 Minecraft 服务器及更多
items.summary_en: A hobbyist experiment shows a Minecraft server and more running on a 1960s UNIVAC computer, illustrating how software can push beyond hardware era boundaries. It underscores the enduring value of abstraction and the quirky edge cases of retro computing.
items.summary_zh: 一项业余实验在1960年代的 UNIVAC 计算机上运行了Minecraft 服务器等应用，展示了软件如何跨越硬件时代的边界。这事凸显了抽象层的长期价值以及复古计算中的趣味边界。

items.title_en: South Korea police arrest man for posting AI photo of runaway wolf
items.title_zh: 韩国警方因发布 AI 生成的逃逸狼照片逮捕男子
items.summary_en: A man in South Korea was arrested after authorities say he posted an AI-generated image of a runaway wolf. The incident highlights the legal and safety risks of synthetic imagery, and how governments are responding to AI-created misinformation. It underscores why platform moderation and digital-literacy are increasingly important.
items.summary_zh: 韩国警方就一名男子发布AI生成的逃逸狼照片进行逮捕。这起事件凸显了合成图像带来的法律与公共安全风险，以及各国对AI生成内容的监管回应。也提醒人们提升数字素养并加强平台监管的重要性。

items.title_en: Stephen's Sausage Roll remains one of the most influential puzzle games
items.title_zh: 斯蒂芬的香肠卷仍是最具影响力的解谜游戏之一
items.summary_en: Stephen's Sausage Roll, a minimalist puzzle game, marks a decade of influence on the puzzle genre. Praised for its elegant yet punishing design, it helped shape indie puzzle design and inspired later titles that emphasize precise rules and open-ended exploration.
items.summary_zh: 《斯蒂芬的香肠卷》这款极简解谜游戏迎来十周年，因其优雅却高难度的谜题设计被广泛认可。它对独立解谜游戏的发展产生深远影响，启发了后续注重精确定义规则与开放探索的作品。

items.title_en: Brands got worse on purpose
items.title_zh: 品牌被故意变坏
items.summary_en: The piece argues that some brands deliberately degrade product quality or user experience to boost monetization, citing examples from consumer apps and services. It explores the economics of the 'worse is better' strategy and why users end up paying more for features.
items.summary_zh: 文章声称部分品牌有意降低产品质量或用户体验以提升盈利，结合应用与服务的实例进行剖析。探讨这种“更糟即更好”的商业策略背后的经济逻辑，以及用户为何为功能付出更高成本。

items.title_en: Youth Suicides Declined After Creation of National Hotline
items.title_zh: 国家热线成立后青少年自杀率下降
items.summary_en: A study finds youth suicide rates declined after launching a nationwide crisis hotline, suggesting hotlines can have a measurable public health impact. The finding underscores the importance of accessible mental health resources, though ongoing efforts are needed.
items.summary_zh: 研究发现国家热线推出后，青少年自杀率下降，表明热线对公共卫生有显著影响。该发现强调可及心理健康资源的重要性，但需要持续努力以巩固效果。

items.title_en: Apple ignores DMA interoperability requests and contradicts own documentation
items.title_zh: 苹果无视 DMA 互操作性请求，并与自家文档矛盾
items.summary_en: Apple reportedly ignored interoperability requests under the Digital Markets Act and contradicted its own documentation on device access or compatibility. The incident underscores regulatory pressure on platform openness and the friction between policy mandates and how products are documented.
items.summary_zh: 据报道，苹果无视 DMA（数字市场法）的互操作性请求，并与自身文档存在矛盾。这凸显了监管机构对大型平台强制开放的压力，以及政策要求与产品设计之间的持续张力。

items.title_en: Email could have been X.400 times better
items.title_zh: 邮件本可以比 X.400 更好
items.summary_en: An exploration argues that X.400 offered architectural benefits over SMTP—such as stronger routing and security—yet failed to gain traction; the post reflects on why SMTP won and what current email protocols could learn.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为 X.400 相较于 SMTP 在路由和安全性等方面具备潜在优势，但未被广泛采用。回顾 SMTP 的胜出原因，并讨论当前邮件协议可以从中学习的经验。

items.title_en: The Bromine Chokepoint
items.title_zh: 溴资源成为全球记忆芯片生产的瓶颈
items.summary_en: Bromine is a key input in several semiconductor processes, and ongoing strife in the Middle East could disrupt its supply, potentially bottlenecking memory-chip production. The result could be higher costs and tighter supply for DRAM and flash devices, underscoring geopolitical risk in chemical supply chains. Diversification and alternative manufacturing paths become strategic levers for the industry.
items.summary_zh: 中东局势可能打断全球记忆体芯片生产对溴供应的依赖，造成产量受限与价格波动。溴在芯片制造中的关键作用使其成为脆弱的供应瓶颈。这凸显了供应多元化和替代工艺的重要性。

items.title_en: Irony as Meta staff unhappy about running surveillance software on work PCs
items.title_zh: Meta 员工对在工作电脑上运行监控软件感到讽刺
items.summary_en: Meta employees reportedly dislike the surveillance software installed on company devices, despite the company's own stance on privacy.
items.summary_zh: 据报道，Meta 员工对工作机器上运行的监控软件感到不满，尽管公司自述强调隐私保护。这反映出科技巨头在内部安保工具与员工隐私之间的张力。

items.title_en: Israeli soldiers using sexual assault to force Palestinians out of West Bank
items.title_zh: 以色列士兵利用性侵迫使巴勒斯坦人离开西岸
items.summary_en: Independent report alleges that Israeli soldiers used sexual violence as a tactic to displace Palestinians in the West Bank. The findings add to ongoing accountability debates about military conduct and human rights in the conflict.
items.summary_zh: 独立报道指控以色列士兵将性暴力作为迫使巴勒斯坦人离开西岸的手段之一。这一发现加剧了人们对冲突中军事行为和人权问责的讨论。

items.title_en: Girl, 10, finds rare Mexican axolotl under Welsh bridge
items.title_zh: 10岁女孩在威尔士的一座桥下发现罕见的墨西哥钝口螈
items.summary_en: A 10-year-old girl in Wales found a rare Mexican axolotl under a bridge, a remarkable sighting outside its native range. The story spotlights conservation and citizen science dynamics when unusual species show up in unexpected places. It also underscores how outreach and curiosity connect people to wildlife.
items.summary_zh: 威尔士一名10岁女孩在一座桥下发现罕见的墨西哥钝口螈，这一发现颇为罕见且引人注目。此事凸显了在非原产地也会出现独特物种的保护与公民科学的互动，同时也体现了公众对野生动物的关注与好奇心。

items.title_en: FBI looks into dead or missing scientists tied to NASA, Blue Origin, SpaceX
items.title_zh: FBI 调查与 NASA/Blue Origin/SpaceX 相关的死者或失踪科学家
items.summary_en: The FBI is investigating dead or missing scientists linked to major space organizations. The case underscores potential security or safety concerns in high-profile aerospace projects and may prompt calls for enhanced oversight and vetting of contractor work.
items.summary_zh: FBI 正在调查与 NASA、Blue Origin、SpaceX 相关的已故或失踪科学家，引发对安全和合规的关注。此类调查或促使对高风险航天项目承包商的审查及风险管理加强。

items.title_en: Raylib v6.0
items.title_zh: Raylib 6.0 发布
items.summary_en: Raylib 6.0 arrives as a major update to the lightweight game development library, offering API improvements, better portability, and streamlined tooling for cross-platform projects. The release makes it easier for indie developers and educators to build and teach with graphics and audio capabilities. It could accelerate rapid prototyping and learning in game development communities.
items.summary_zh: Raylib 6.0 作为轻量级游戏开发库的重大更新，带来 API 改善、可移植性提升与跨平台工具链的简化。该版本让独立开发者与教育者更容易构建并教学，强化图形、音频等功能。预计将推动快速原型设计和游戏开发社区的学习进程。

items.title_en: Claude Token Counter, now with model comparisons
items.title_zh: Claude Token Counter，现在支持模型对比
items.summary_en: Claude Token Counter now supports cross-model comparisons, helping developers estimate token costs and compare efficiency across Claude models. This aids model selection and budgeting for NLP projects.
items.summary_zh: Claude Token Counter 增加了跨模型的对比功能，便于开发者对不同模型的代币消耗进行比对与成本估算。新功能有助于选型与预算控制，优化提示设计。

items.title_en: 10 years ago, someone wrote a test for Servo that included an expiry in 2026
items.title_zh: 十年前，某人给 Servo 的测试设定了到2026年的过期日期
