items.summary_en: A quirky note from a decade ago reveals a Servo test embedded with an expiry date in 2026, illustrating long-running projects and their testing lifecycles.
items.summary_zh: 十年前的一条有趣记录显示，Servo 的一个测试设定了在2026年过期，揭示了长期运行的项目在测试与维护周期上的趣味性与挑战。

items.title_en: Palantir Wants to Reinstate the Draft
items.title_zh: Palantir 想要重启征兵
items.summary_en: Reports that Palantir lobbies or advocates for reinstating conscription, linking tech firms to national service in a way that could reshape the talent pipeline and civil-liberties considerations. The piece prompts readers to consider the governance questions around private sector influence over public policy.
items.summary_zh: 报道 Palantir 倡议重新征兵，或游说推动国家征兵制度，暗示科技企业与公共政策之间的影响力重组以及对公民自由的潜在考量。引发对私企对公共政策影响力的治理问题的思考。

items.title_en: XOR'ing a register with itself is the idiom for zeroing it out. Why not sub?
items.title_zh: 把寄存器与自身进行异或以清零是经典写法，为什么不用减法？
items.summary_en: XORing a register with itself is the classic zeroing trick in low-level code. It avoids data dependencies and typically maps to the cleanest, fastest zeroing instruction across architectures. The piece argues that subtraction is a slower or less portable alternative, making XOR the preferred technique in practice.
items.summary_zh: 把寄存器与自身做异或来清零是经典技巧。它避免数据依赖且在大多数架构上实现简单、效率高；而直接用减法清零往往性能较差且可移植性较低，因此不太被推荐。

items.title_en: GitHub unwanted UX change: issue links now open in a popup
items.title_zh: GitHub 的 UX 变动：问题链接现在在弹窗中打开
items.summary_en: Users report that clicking issue links opens a popup window instead of navigating, disrupting workflow and increasing context-switching. The change showcases how UI decisions in developer platforms can impact productivity and friction, and suggests better ways to surface issue details.
items.summary_zh: 用户反馈称点击问题链接会弹出一个对话框，导致无法直接跳转，提高了切换成本。此 UX 改动暴露了开发者平台在功能暴露上的取舍，也提醒改动应更好地兼顾工作流连续性和信息可用性。

items.title_en: San Diego rents declined following surge in supply
items.title_zh: 圣地亚哥租金在供应激增后下降
items.summary_en: San Diego rents declined more than 19% following a surge in housing supply, placing it among markets with notable rent falls. The data suggests a cooling demand and rising vacancy as new units hit the market.
items.summary_zh: 圣地亚哥在住房供应激增后，租金下降超过 19%，成为租金降幅显著的市场之一。数据表明需求放缓与空置率上升，随着新单位投放市场。

items.title_en: Ternary Bonsai: Top Intelligence at 1.58 Bits
items.title_zh: 三值盆景：以1.58比特实现的顶级智能
items.summary_en: Ternary Bonsai showcases an ultra-efficient AI model that operates with only 1.58 bits of information per decision, challenging assumptions about model size and performance. The approach combines ternary quantization and sparsity with principled optimization to enable smaller, cheaper models that still perform well on real tasks.
items.summary_zh: 三值盆景展示一种极致高效的AI模型，利用仅1.58比特的信息量来做出决策，挑战对模型大小与性能的传统认知。通过三值量化和稀疏化等技巧实现更小、更省资源的模型，同时保持在真实任务上的表现。

items.title_en: A programmable watch you can actually wear
items.title_zh: 可穿戴的 DIY 手表
items.summary_en: A DIY wearable watch project demonstrates turning off-the-shelf parts and open firmware into a functional wearable. It showcases accessible hardware hacking and could inspire others to build their own wearables.
items.summary_zh: 这个可穿戴 DIY 手表项目展示了如何用现成组件和开源固件组装出一块可佩戴的设备。它体现了硬件黑客的门槛正在降低，或将激发更多人尝试自制可穿戴设备。

items.title_en: Clay PCB Tutorial
items.title_zh: Clay PCB 教程
items.summary_en: Clay PCB Tutorial offers a DIY approach to making printed circuit boards using clay-based materials, outlining steps, tools, and safety considerations. It demonstrates how hobbyists can prototype circuits on a budget, while noting trade-offs in precision and durability.
items.summary_zh: Clay PCB Tutorial 提供一种用黏土材料制作简易 PCB 的实操指南，涵盖所需工具、步骤与安全注意事项。为爱好者以低成本原型电路提供途径，同时也提醒在精度和耐久性之间的权衡。

items.title_en: Google to invest up to $40B in Anthropic in cash and compute
items.title_zh: 谷歌将向 Anthropic 投资最多400亿美元，含现金与算力
items.summary_en: Google plans to invest up to $40 billion in Anthropic, combining cash with compute credits. The move deepens a strategic AI partnership and could give Google earlier access to Anthropic’s models and tools, strengthening its cloud AI capabilities amid the race for next-gen AI.
items.summary_zh: 这笔交易加深了双方的战略合作，可能让谷歌更早获得Anthropic模型和工具的使用权，强化云端AI能力，推动对新一代AI的竞争格局。

items.title_en: Show HN: Turning a Gaussian Splat into a videogame
items.title_zh: Show HN：将高斯斑点变成一款电子游戏
items.summary_en: A practical exploration turning 2D Gaussian splats—simple, soft-blurred particles—into a full game aesthetic. The approach highlights how lightweight rendering primitives can yield rich visuals and performance, useful for indie devs and rapid prototyping.
items.summary_zh: 通过将简单的高斯斑块用于游戏美术，展示了如何用轻量渲染基元实现丰富的视觉效果与高性能。此做法对独立游戏开发者和快速原型设计具有实用价值。

items.title_en: The Beauty of Bonsai Styles
items.title_zh: 盆栽风格之美
items.summary_en: The Beauty of Bonsai Styles explores the diverse aesthetics and techniques of bonsai, from formal upright to windswept and cascade forms.
items.summary_zh: 《盆栽风格的美》介绍了盆栽美学的多样性与技法，从直立式到风吹式等形式。文章解释修剪、盆器选择与容器几何如何共同塑造微型树木的气质。

items.title_en: Bodega cats of New York
items.title_zh: 纽约杂货店里的店猫
items.summary_en: A project catalogs the famous cats living in New York bodegas, offering a portrait of a quirky urban ritual. Beyond cute photos, it reveals how these feline mascots become local icons and online personalities.
items.summary_zh: 一个项目记录纽约杂货店里的著名店猫，呈现一种独特的城市文化。除了可爱照片，它们也成为当地的偶像与网络明星，讲述社区故事。

items.title_en: Scores decline again for 13-year-old students in reading and mathematics (2023)
items.title_zh: 2023年13岁学生阅读和数学成绩再次下降
items.summary_en: NAEP 2023 highlights show a continued decline in reading and math scores for 13-year-olds, widening gaps and raising concerns about the long-term effects of disrupted schooling. The trend adds urgency to targeted interventions.
items.summary_zh: 2023年全国评估显示，13岁学生在阅读和数学上的分数再次下滑，拉大了一些教育差距并引发对长期影响的担忧。此趋势凸显了对有针对性干预措施的紧迫需求。

items.title_en: To Protect and Swerve: NYPD Cop Has 547 Speeding Tickets
items.title_zh: 为保护与规避：NYPD 警员累积 547 张超速罚单
items.summary_en: A New York Police Department officer has racked up 547 speeding tickets while on duty, yet remains on the force. The case raises questions about accountability, supervisory oversight, and how fleet safety policies are enforced. It highlights tensions between public safety duties and personal driving behavior within law enforcement.
items.summary_zh: 一名纽约警察在在职期间累积了547张超速罚单，仍留任于警队。此事引发关于问责、监督以及车队安全规定执行的质疑，凸显执法部门在公共安全职责与个人驾驶行为之间的张力。

items.title_en: A Brief History of Fish Sauce
items.title_zh: 鱼露的简史
items.summary_en: A concise tour of fish sauce's history, from ancient fermentation to modern industrial production. Regional methods and long aging times built a globally distributed condiment that underpins Southeast Asian cuisine and today’s flavor economics.
items.summary_zh: 鱼露从古代发酵到现代工业化生产的简要演变。文章梳理了区域做法和漫长熟成如何让这一调味品走向全球，并影响了亚洲菜肴的风味与贸易格局。

items.title_en: Mahjong: A Visual Guide
items.title_zh: 麻将：可视化指南
items.summary_en: A visual guide that explains Mahjong basics—tiles, hands, and common winning patterns—through diagrams and annotated illustrations. It serves as a practical quick-start for beginners and a handy reference for players brushing up on rules.
items.summary_zh: 这份可视化指南用图解介绍麻将的牌型、和牌模式及常见役种，直观易懂。适合初学者快速入门，也为玩家复习规则提供便捷参考。

items.title_en: What physical ‘life force’ turns biology’s wheels?
items.title_zh: 什么样的物理‘生命力’让生物学运转？
items.summary_en: Quanta Magazine delves into the physics behind biology, examining what fundamental energy and information flows drive living systems. The piece connects thermodynamics, metabolism, and information processing to explain how life sustains order amid chaos.
items.summary_zh: 量子杂志探讨生物学背后的物理学，研究驱动生命系统的基本能量和信息流。文章将热力学、代谢与信息处理联系起来，解释生命在紊乱中维持有序的机制。

items.title_en: Show HN: GoModel – an open-source AI gateway in Go
items.title_zh: Show HN: GoModel——用 Go 实现的开源 AI 网关；比 LiteLLM 轻量 44 倍
items.summary_en: GoModel is a lightweight open-source AI gateway written in Go, boasting a footprint far smaller than competing LLM gateways. It targets easier deployment of small-to-midscale AI services, especially for edge or on-prem setups.
items.summary_zh: GoModel 是用 Go 编写的轻量级开源 AI 网关，声称体积要比 LiteLLM 等实现低几十倍。它面向在边缘或本地部署的小到中等规模的 AI 服务，降低门槛与运维成本。

items.title_en: I'm done making desktop applications (2009)
items.title_zh: 我不再做桌面应用（2009）
items.summary_en: In his 2009 essay, Patrick McKenzie argues that the era of desktop applications is fading in favor of web apps due to distribution, maintenance, and reach advantages. He outlines forces shaping software delivery and monetization.
items.summary_zh: 在 2009 年的博文中，作者认为桌面应用的时代正在消退，网页应用因更易分发、维护与覆盖玩家更广而成为主流。他分析了塑造软件交付与盈利模式的驱动因素。

items.title_en: Hear your agent suffer through your code
items.title_zh: 让你的智能体在你的代码里痛苦地折腾
items.summary_en: An experimental setup where an AI agent repeatedly runs and debugs code, exposing how brittle software and ambiguous interfaces force costly problem-framing. It underscores the need for reliable tooling, better error messages, and structured prompts to reduce toil when AI-assisted coding.
items.summary_zh: 这是一个让人工智能代理不断执行、调试代码的实验场景，揭示了脆弱代码和模糊接口会带来高成本的问题。文章强调需要更可靠的工具、清晰的错误信息，以及结构化的提示以降低 AI 辅助编码时的工作量。

items.title_en: Our newsroom AI policy
items.title_zh: Ars Technica：新闻编辑部的 AI 政策
items.summary_en: Ars Technica lays out rules for how the newsroom uses AI, including disclosure, verification, and limits on relying on AI for reporting. The policy signals a cautious, transparency-first approach to AI in journalism that could influence newsroom standards industry-wide.
items.summary_zh: 《Ars Technica》的新闻编辑部在 AI 使用方面提出了规则与底线，包括披露、核实和对报道的限制。该政策体现了在新闻业中以透明和谨慎为先的态度，可能影响行业的AI使用标准。

items.title_en: Humpback whales are forming super-groups
items.title_zh: 座头鲸正形成超群群体
items.summary_en: Humpback whales are forming larger 'super-groups' on feeding grounds, aggregating multiple pods into long-lasting social networks. These groups may boost foraging efficiency and info exchange about prey patches, challenging the view of whales as solitary; reveals new social complexity in large marine mammals.
items.summary_zh: 座头鲸在某些觅食场所聚成更大的“超群”，由多个群体组成并持续一段时间。这些社交聚集提升了觅食效率和信息交流，揭示了大型海洋哺乳动物中复杂的社会结构。

items.title_en: Fast16: High-precision software sabotage 5 years before Stuxnet
items.title_zh: Fast16：比 Stuxnet 早5年的高精度软件破坏
items.summary_en: New evidence ties Fast16 to a high-precision sabotage capability years before Stuxnet, suggesting sophisticated cyber-physical attack capabilities existed well ahead of that famous incident. The finding underscores long-running threats to industrial control systems and the need for deeper defense in supply chains.
items.summary_zh: 新证据将 Fast16 与比 Stuxnet 早现的高精度破坏能力联系起来，表明对工业控制系统的高端攻击能力早已存在。此发现凸显对供应链与控制网络的长期威胁，以及更深层防御的必要性。

items.title_en: TorchTPU: Running PyTorch Natively on TPUs at Google Scale
items.title_zh: TorchTPU：在 Google 规模的 TPUs 上原生运行 PyTorch
items.summary_en: TorchTPU enables PyTorch to run natively on Google-scale TPUs, bringing PyTorch’s dynamic features to TPU hardware. This unlocks large-scale training with the ease of PyTorch APIs while leveraging the efficiency of TPUs in cloud environments.
items.summary_zh: TorchTPU 让 PyTorch 能在 Google 规模的 TPU 上原生运行，将 PyTorch 的动态图特性带到 TPU 硬件。借助云端 TPU 的高效，开发者可以在大规模训练中继续使用 PyTorch APIs。

items.title_en: Show HN: Run TRELLIS.2 Image-to-3D generation natively on Apple Silicon
items.title_zh: Show HN：在 Apple Silicon 上原生运行 TRELLIS.2 的图像转3D 生成
items.summary_en: TRELLIS.2 enables image-to-3D generation, and this build runs natively on Apple Silicon, suggesting optimized performance for Macs with M-series chips. This lowers hardware barriers for offline, on-device AI content creation and could influence Mac-focused AI tooling.
items.summary_zh: TRELLIS.2 实现图像到3D 的生成，且在 Apple Silicon 上实现原生运行，表现在对 M1/M2 的优化能显著提升速度与离线工作能力。此举降低了对高端云算力的依赖，利于本地创作和跨平台工具链的开发。

items.title_en: Turbo Vision 2.0 – a modern port
items.title_zh: Turbo Vision 2.0：现代移植
items.summary_en: Turbo Vision 2.0 is a modern port that keeps the classic terminal UI library alive with updated builds and cross-platform support. It enables lightweight, text-based interfaces for tools and utilities, appealing to retro enthusiasts and systems programmers. The project demonstrates how legacy tooling can evolve without abandoning its roots.
items.summary_zh: Turbo Vision 2.0 是对经典终端 UI 库的现代移植，更新构建并扩展跨平台支持。它为轻量级工具提供文本界面，吸引复古爱好者和系统开发者。该项目显示出传统工具在不放弃根基的前提下也能持续进化。

items.title_en: UK Biobank health data keeps ending up on GitHub
items.title_zh: UK Biobank 健康数据持续被上传至 GitHub
items.summary_en: Health data from the UK Biobank continues to appear on GitHub, raising concerns about data governance, privacy, and access controls in open repositories. The incident spotlights the tension between reproducible science and safeguarding sensitive health information. It also underscores the need for robust data-sharing policies and tooling.
items.summary_zh: 英国生物库的健康数据持续出现在 GitHub 上，引发对数据治理、隐私和开放仓库访问控制的担忧。此事凸显了可重复科学与保护敏感健康信息之间的矛盾，也提醒加强数据共享政策和工具的必要性。

items.title_en: UK Biobank leak: Health details of 500k people offered for sale on Alibaba
items.title_zh: UK Biobank 数据泄露：约50万名个人健康信息在阿里巴巴平台上架出售
items.summary_en: A leak of the UK Biobank dataset exposed health details for about 500,000 people and were offered for sale on Alibaba. The incident raises urgent questions about consent, data governance, and the risks of commodifying sensitive medical information. It underscores the need for stricter data controls and oversight in large biobank-like datasets.
items.summary_zh: 英国 Biobank 数据集约有50万人的健康信息被泄露并在阿里巴巴平台上架出售。事件暴露出同意、数据治理以及将敏感健康信息商品化的风险等问题，凸显加强大型生物样本库数据规范和监管的必要性。

items.title_en: Fusion Power Plant Simulator
items.title_zh: 聚变电厂仿真器
items.summary_en: A fusion power plant simulator lets researchers explore dynamics, control, and design trade-offs without building a real reactor. By modeling plasma physics, heat exhaust, and economics, it clarifies the engineering challenges of scaling fusion to commercial power.
items.summary_zh: 聚变电厂仿真器让研究者在不建造真实反应堆的情况下，探索动力学、控制策略与设计权衡。通过对等离子体物理、热排放与经济性的建模，揭示了将聚变推向商业规模所需面对的工程挑战。

items.title_en: Waymo says can't avoid bike lanes because riders want to be dropped off in them
items.title_zh: Waymo 表示无法完全避开自行车道，因为乘客希望在自行车道附近下车
items.summary_en: Waymo notes that rider expectations and infrastructure realities may lead AVs to occasionally use bike lanes, highlighting safety, policy, and road design tensions in autonomous taxi deployment.
items.summary_zh: Waymo 指出乘客期望与基础设施现实可能导致自动驾驶车在下车点接近自行车道，引发关于安全、政策及道路设计的矛盾。

items.title_en: Ping-pong robot beats top-level human players
items.title_zh: 乒乓机器人击败顶尖人类选手
items.summary_en: A ping-pong robot defeated top-level human players, marking a milestone for robotics and AI-enabled sports. The result demonstrates rapid adaptation and precision in robotic control, with implications for research and future competition.
items.summary_zh: 一台乒乓球机器人击败了顶尖人类选手，标志着体育领域机器人与AI的一项重要里程碑。该成就展示了机器人对高速对打的控制与学习能力，对机器人研究、人与机器人的竞争以及运动训练系统具有启发意义。

items.title_en: My phone replaced a brass plug
items.title_zh: 我的手机取代了一枚黄铜塞
items.summary_en: A personal tech anecdote about how a smartphone interrupted a hardware repair workflow by substituting for a brass plug, illustrating how modern devices increasingly blur between tools and components. The piece reflects on hardware minimalism, repair culture, and the limits of gadget-driven tinkering.
items.summary_zh: 一则个人科技趣闻，讲述智能手机在硬件维修中替代一枚黄铜塞的场景，显示现代设备让工具与部件的界线变得模糊。文章思考硬件极简、修理文化以及小工具时代的局限性。

items.title_en: Simulacrum of Knowledge Work
items.title_zh: 知识工作的拟像
items.summary_en: Knowledge-work simulacrum explores how modern work can feel like rote, dashboard-driven automation rather than meaningful contribution. It argues for rethinking work around authentic impact, human judgment, and more transparent metrics in a world increasingly augmented by AI.
items.summary_zh: 知识工作的拟像批评当代工作往往被仪表板和自动化流程所支配，而非真正的有意义产出。作者主张在人工智能时代重新思考工作，将重点放在人类判断和真实影响上，而非空洞的指标。

items.title_en: Work with the garage door up (2024)
items.title_zh: 在车库门敞开时工作
items.summary_en: An essay argues for transparency in work by keeping the 'garage door up'—sharing progress publicly to invite feedback, with trade-offs on privacy.
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章主张在工作中保持透明，通过公开进展来获取反馈，探讨开放与隐私之间的权衡。

items.title_en: Windows Server 2025 Runs Better on ARM
items.title_zh: Windows Server 2025 在 ARM 上运行更佳
items.summary_en: Windows Server 2025 shows improved performance on ARM64 hardware, including better virtualization density and energy efficiency. This signals growing momentum for ARM in data centers and could influence future cloud architecture and licensing.
items.summary_zh: Windows Server 2025 在 ARM64 硬件上性能提升，虚拟化密度和能效也有所改善。这标志着 ARM 在数据中心的应用日益增多，或将影响未来的云架构与许可策略。

items.title_en: In the UK, EVs are cheaper than petrol cars, thanks to Chinese competition
items.title_zh: 在英国，电动汽车因中国竞争而比汽油车更便宜
items.summary_en: UK EVs are cheaper than petrol cars, driven by intense Chinese competition, lower battery costs, and policy incentives. The shift reshapes consumer choice and tightens the race to accelerate the UK’s electrification and industrial strategy.
items.summary_zh: 英国电动汽车因中国厂商的强力竞争、更低的电池成本与政策激励而已成为更便宜的选择。这一变化改变了消费者偏好，也为英国的新能源转型与产业战略带来新的压力点。

items.title_en: Mechanical Keyboard Sounds – A listening Museum
items.title_zh: 机械键盘声音——一个聆听博物馆
items.summary_en: A data-driven collection of acoustic profiles for different keyboard switches and keycaps, exploring how hardware design shapes sound. The project invites readers to explore the sonic textures of typing.
items.summary_zh: 该项目以数据可视化方式收集不同机械键盘的声音特征，展示按键声与触感之间的关系。通过声音档案，读者可以直观比较不同开关、结构对音色的影响。

items.title_en: Martin Galway's music source files from 1980's Commodore 64 games
items.title_zh: Martin Galway 的1980年代 Commodore 64 遊戲音樂源檔
items.summary_en: Archive release of Martin Galway's music source files from 1980s Commodore 64 games. The materials offer a rare glimpse into early chiptune composition, revealing how Galway layered simple waveforms and timing tricks to craft catchy tunes within severe hardware constraints. For vintage-game enthusiasts and reproducible retro sound design, it's a goldmine.
items.summary_zh: 公開了 Martin Galway 在1980年代 Commodore 64 遊戲的音樂源檔，提供珍貴的早期像素音樂創作見解。這些檔案揭示了在有限硬體下，如何運用簡單波形與節奏技巧創作出上癮的音樂。對復古遊戲音效與重現者而言，這是寶貴資源。

items.title_en: Show HN: I've built a nice home server OS
items.title_zh: Show HN：我做了一个好用的家用服务器操作系统
items.summary_en: Show HN: a polished home server operating system designed for hobbyists, emphasizing simplicity, low power, and modular services like storage, backups, and media.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：为爱好者设计的高质量家用服务器操作系统，强调易用性、低功耗，以及存储、备份和媒体等模块化服务。

items.title_en: Self-updating screenshots
items.title_zh: 自更新截图
items.summary_en: Explores techniques for keeping screenshots in sync with live apps, enabling true-time demonstrations without manual re-captures. The piece weighs automation, determinism, and integration with recording tooling to streamline documentation and demos. This matters for faster, more reliable product showcases.
items.summary_zh: 介绍让截图自动跟随实时应用变化的技术与工具，避免人工重复截屏以展示最新界面。讨论自动化、确定性以及与录制工具的集成对加速文档与演示的影响。

items.title_en: SPEAKE(a)R: Turn Speakers to Microphones for Fun and Profit [pdf] (2017)
items.title_zh: SPEAKE(a)R：将扬声器变成麦克风以实现乐趣与盈利（2017）
items.summary_en: Demonstrates that loudspeakers can be repurposed as microphones, enabling covert data capture via acoustic channels. The paper analyzes the hardware and signal-processing tricks that make this possible and discusses privacy and security implications for consumer devices and embedded systems.
items.summary_zh: 展示了扬声器可以被逆向用作麦克风，从而通过声学信道实现隐蔽数据获取。论文解析了实现这一方法的硬件与信号处理要点，并讨论了对消费电子和嵌入式系统的隐私与安全隐患及应对思路。

items.title_en: Open source memory layer so any AI agent can do what Claude.ai and ChatGPT do
items.title_zh: 开源记忆层：让任意 AI 代理具备长期记忆，达到 Claude/ChatGPT 的能力
items.summary_en: An open-source memory layer aims to give AI agents long-term context and recall, bridging the gap to proprietary chat models. By persisting knowledge across sessions, agents can deliver more coherent and capable interactions.
items.summary_zh: 一个开源的记忆层旨在让 AI 代理具备长期上下文与记忆能力，填补与专有聊天模型之间的差距。跨会话持久化知识使代理能提供更连贯、更强的交互能力。

items.title_en: Butterflies are in decline across North America, a look at the Western Monarch
items.title_zh: 北美蝴蝶数量下降：以西部君蝶为例
items.summary_en: Butterflies are in decline across North America, with Western Monarchs emblematic of broader pollinator losses. Habitat loss, pesticide exposure, and climate shifts are central pressures, signaling ecosystem-wide consequences that extend beyond butterflies.
items.summary_zh: 北美蝴蝶数量持续下降，西部君蝶成为更广泛传粉者损失的缩影。栖息地消失、农药暴露和气候变化是主要压力，预示着对生态系统的广泛影响。

items.title_en: Tariffs Raised Consumers' Prices, but the Refunds Go Only to Businesses
items.title_zh: 关税提高了消费者价格，退税却主要发放给企业
items.summary_en: Tariffs raised the price of goods for consumers, but refunds appear to go mainly to businesses rather than individuals. The outcome highlights how policy levers can transfer costs away from consumers and prompts questions about who truly benefits from tariff relief and how to improve equity.
items.summary_zh: 关税抬高了消费者的购买成本，退税却主要发放给企业而非个人。此现象凸显贸易政策对普通消费者的实际影响及其公平性，引发对改进退税机制的讨论。

items.title_en: Writing a C Compiler, in Zig (2025)
items.title_zh: 用 Zig 编写 C 编译器（2025）
items.summary_en: A reflective piece detailing the author's journey implementing a C compiler in Zig, exploring language features, compiler design challenges, and performance trade-offs. It offers insights into language design, metaprogramming, and why Zig's safety/guile helps in compiler construction.
items.summary_zh: 作者在文章中记录了用 Zig 编写 C 编译器的过程，讨论了实现中的架构设计、挑战与性能权衡。通过这个案例，展示了 Zig 在系统级工具开发中的优势，以及对编译器实现的启示。

items.title_en: Modern Rendering Culling Techniques
items.title_zh: 现代渲染裁剪技术
items.summary_en: Modern rendering relies on advanced culling to skip unseen geometry, boosting frame rates. The piece reviews techniques from occlusion to frustum and mesh-level pruning, with tradeoffs for real-time graphics.
items.summary_zh: 现代渲染通过先进的裁剪技术跳过不可见几何体，提升帧率。文章回顾从遮挡剔除到视锥裁剪、网格级别剔除等方法及其在实时图形中的权衡。

items.title_en: SDF Public Access Unix System
items.title_zh: SDF 公共访问 UNIX 系统
items.summary_en: Spotlights SDF, a long-running public UNIX system offering shell access, mail, and other services, highlighting its community-driven resilience and ongoing relevance for hobbyists and researchers.
items.summary_zh: 聚焦 SDF——一个历史悠久的公共 UNIX 系统，提供 shell 访问、邮件等服务，展示其社区驱动的韧性与对爱好者、研究者的持续吸引力。

items.title_en: Up to 8M Bees Are Living in an Underground Network Beneath This Cemetery
items.title_zh: 墓园地下网络中的蜂群：多达800万只蜜蜂
items.summary_en: Scientists have mapped an underground bee network under a cemetery housing up to eight million bees, revealing a surprisingly complex subterranean ecosystem. The find informs urban pollinator habitats and resilience of city ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: 科学家在墓园下方发现一个地下蜂群网络，数量高达800万只，揭示了一个相当复杂的地下生态系统。此发现为城市授粉者栖息地及城市生态的韧性提供新视角。

items.title_en: Refuse to let your doctor record you
items.title_zh: 拒绝让医生记录你的就诊信息
items.summary_en: This piece argues for patients to refuse let doctors record certain parts of their medical visits, citing privacy risks and potential misuse of recorded data. It offers practical steps for asserting control over one’s medical information, including consent choices and data retention limits.
items.summary_zh: 文章提出在就诊时应拒绝让医生对部分内容进行记录，以降低隐私风险与数据滥用的可能。作者给出实用的做法，帮助患者掌控自己的就医信息，包括明确同意、限制数据保留等措施。

items.title_en: Dillo Browser Release 3.3.0
items.title_zh: Dillo 浏览器 3.3.0 版本发布
items.summary_en: Dillo Browser 3.3.0 brings stability and compatibility updates to the ultra-lightweight browser, with enhancements to HTML/CSS rendering, memory usage, and security fixes. It remains a practical option for embedded devices, kiosks, and retro setups where a minimal footprint matters.
items.summary_zh: Dillo 浏览器 3.3.0 带来稳定性和兼容性改进，增强 HTML/CSS 渲染、内存利用率和安全修复。作为极简浏览器，它在嵌入式设备、信息亭和追求低资源占用的场景中仍具实用性。

items.title_en: Isopods of the world
items.title_zh: 世界的等足纲动物全览
items.summary_en: A comprehensive primer on isopods, covering diversity, habitats, and notable species. It may include taxonomy, ecological roles, and interesting facts about crustaceans found in marine and terrestrial environments.
items.summary_zh: 对等足纲动物的多样性、栖息地与代表性物种进行了全面介绍，覆盖海洋与陆地环境中的分类与生态作用，并分享有趣的生物学细节。

items.title_en: Kefir C17/C23 Compiler
items.title_zh: Kefir C17/C23 编译器
items.summary_en: Kefir announces a C17/C23 compiler, highlighting efforts to explore alternative toolchains in the C ecosystem. The project hints at potential gains in safety, performance, and standard conformance for developers.
items.summary_zh: Kefir 公布面向 C17/C23 的编译器，凸显对 C 生态中替代工具链的探索。此项目或在安全性、性能与标准兼容性方面为开发者带来潜在收益。

items.title_en: We got 207 tok/s with Qwen3.5-27B on an RTX 3090
items.title_zh: 在 RTX 3090 上用 Qwen3.5-27B 达到了 207 千 tokens/秒
items.summary_en: Demonstrates impressive inference speed with a 27B parameter model using optimization on consumer GPUs, hitting 207k tokens per second. This benchmark matters for on-device or small-scale deployments and signals how affordable hardware enables more capable LLM experimentation.
items.summary_zh: 展示了在消费级 GPU 上对 Qwen3.5-27B 的推理优化，达到约 207 千 tokens/秒的速度。该基准对本地或小规模部署意义重大，体现硬件成本下降也在推动更强大模型的实验与应用。

items.title_en: IEA: Solar overtakes all energy sources in a major global first
items.title_zh: IEA：全球首次太阳能超越所有能源来源
items.summary_en: The IEA reports solar overtook all energy sources as the largest source of global electricity, a historic first.
items.summary_zh: 国际能源署宣布太阳能成为全球最大的电力来源，首次超越所有能源。文章讨论对电网、储能和政策的影响，随着太阳能份额持续增长。

items.title_en: Discret 11, the French TV encryption of the 80s (2020)
items.title_zh: Discret 11：80年代法国电视加密
items.summary_en: Discret 11 is a vintage French TV encryption scheme from the 1980s examined in depth. The write-up analyzes how the system worked, including its key management and hardware implementation, and why it ultimately failed to stop piracy, highlighting the era's cryptographic limits.
items.summary_zh: Discret 11 是上世纪80年代法国电视的加密方案，文中对其工作原理、密钥管理和实现方式进行了分析。并解释了为何该系统未能有效阻止盗版，反映了当时加密技术的局限。

items.title_en: DuckDB 1.5.2 – SQL database that runs on laptop, server, in the browser
items.title_zh: DuckDB 1.5.2：可在笔记本、服务器和浏览器中运行的 SQL 数据库
items.summary_en: DuckDB 1.5.2 expands cross-environment support, including browser WASM execution, enabling analytics without a backend. This release makes it easier to ship data tooling offline or in client-side apps, aligning with portable analytics trends.
items.summary_zh: DuckDB 1.5.2 扩展跨环境支持，新增在浏览器中通过 WASM 运行的能力，使在无后端环境下也能进行分析成为现实。该版本让数据工具更易离线或在客户端应用中使用，符合便携式分析的趋势。

items.title_en: US Department of Justice has officially reclassified cannabis as less dangerous
items.title_zh: 美国司法部正式将大麻降级为风险较低
items.summary_en: The U.S. Department of Justice has officially reclassified cannabis as less dangerous, signaling a shift in federal stance on a substance long treated as high-risk. The move could affect research access, banking, and state-federal policy alignment, while inviting continued policy debates. Expect downstream changes in enforcement priorities and public health programs.
items.summary_zh: 美国司法部正式将大麻降级为风险较低，标志着联邦层面对该物质的态度发生转变。此举可能影响研究许可、银行业务以及州与联邦政策的协调，同时引发持续的政策辩论。未来在执法重点和公共卫生规划方面可能出现变化。

items.title_en: Air is full of DNA
items.title_zh: 空气中充满 DNA 的发现
items.summary_en: Nature piece discusses pervasive DNA in the air, enabling environmental and forensic insights while raising privacy and biosafety considerations.
items.summary_zh: Nature 的论文揭示空气中普遍存在的 DNA，为环境监测与取证等提供新途径，同时引发隐私与生物安全方面的关切。

items.title_en: Do I belong in tech anymore?
items.title_zh: 我还能在科技行业待下去吗？
items.summary_en: A candid discussion about burnout in tech amid accelerating AI adoption and shifting job expectations. It explores whether long-term careers in tech are sustainable and how to manage mental health and skill relevance.
items.summary_zh: 直言不讳地讨论了在 AI 加速、岗位期望变化之下的科技行业职业倦怠问题。探讨在科技领域长期职业是否可持续，以及如何管理心理健康与技能相关性。

items.title_en: GnuPG – post-quantum crypto landing in mainline
items.title_zh: GnuPG——后量子加密进入主线
items.summary_en: GnuPG is incorporating post-quantum cryptography into its mainline, signaling real-world readiness for quantum-era security. This move strengthens open-source crypto and could influence how people securely exchange emails and sign data at scale.
items.summary_zh: GnuPG 的主线代码现已接纳后量子加密算法，标志着量子时代安全的实际落地。此举提升了开源密码学的能力，可能影响大规模邮件加密与数据签名的实际应用。

items.title_en: A Periodic Map of Cheese
items.title_zh: 奶酪的周期性地图
items.summary_en: A playful data visualization maps cheeses onto a periodic-table-like grid, sorting varieties by flavor notes, texture, and origin. The project showcases how familiar scientific visuals can make culinary diversity approachable.
items.summary_zh: 一个有趣的数据可视化项目，将奶酪按风味、质地和产地等特征排成类似元素周期表的网格。这样的展示让美食世界以科学化的方式变得更易理解，也展示了数据可视化在食品领域的潜力。

items.title_en: The Super Nintendo Cartridges (2024)
items.title_zh: 超级任天堂卡带
items.summary_en: A technical tour of SNES cartridges, examining ROM layouts, memory mappers, and how hardware decisions shaped compatibility and preservation.
items.summary_zh: 对 SNES 卡带进行技术性解读，涵盖 ROM 布局、映射芯片以及硬件设计对兼容性与保存的影响。展现了卡带设计的巧思，以及对仿真与数字保存的意义。

items.title_en: DeepSeek-V4: Towards Highly Efficient Million-Token Context Intelligence
items.title_zh: DeepSeek-V4：迈向高效百万令牌上下文智能
items.summary_en: DeepSeek-V4 demonstrates an approach to highly efficient million-token context intelligence, enabling long-context reasoning at scale. By optimizing memory usage and retrieval, it supports richer document understanding and long-horizon dialogue. This advancement could empower enterprise search, AI assistants, and research tools that must reference extensive histories.
items.summary_zh: DeepSeek-V4 展示了在百万级上下文下实现高效推理的思路，通过优化内存和检索能力，支持对大规模文档的理解与长时对话。此进展可能推动企业检索、AI 助手和需要大量历史信息参考的研究工具的发展。

items.title_en: A type-safe, realtime collaborative Graph Database in a CRDT
items.title_zh: 基于 CRDT 的类型安全实时协作图数据库
items.summary_en: A graph database built with CRDTs enables real-time collaboration while preserving type safety. The approach supports conflict-free editing and offline work, offering robust collaboration for complex graph schemas.
items.summary_zh: 这款基于 CRDT 的图数据库实现了类型安全的实时协作，能够在离线场景下实现冲突自由的并发编辑。对于复杂图结构的应用场景，提供更鲁棒的协作体验。

items.title_en: At Long Last, InfoWars Is Ours
items.title_zh: InfoWars 终于成了我们的
items.summary_en: A satirical note imagining InfoWars as finally under our control, underscoring the meme-like ideas around information sovereignty and media power.
items.summary_zh: 一则讽刺笔记，设想 InfoWars 终于落入我们掌控之中，凸显信息主权与媒体力量的梗式讨论。

items.title_en: Ex-CEO, ex-CFO of iLearningEngines charged with fraud
items.title_zh: iLearningEngines 前任CEO 与 CFO 因欺诈被起诉
items.summary_en: Former CEO and CFO of iLearningEngines have been charged with fraud tied to the bankrupt AI company, signaling ongoing scrutiny of leadership and finances in AI startups. The case underscores governance challenges in the sector.
items.summary_zh: iLearningEngines 的前任CEO与CFO因涉及欺诈而被起诉，聚焦于这家AI公司的领导与财务治理问题。此案凸显人工智能初创领域的治理挑战。

items.title_en: What killed the Florida orange?
items.title_zh: 佛州橙子死因何在？
items.summary_en: The piece traces how Florida oranges fell from prominence as diseases and drought, pests, and real estate-driven land-use squeezed growers; it connects agricultural decline with housing booms and farmland value shifts. It highlights complex ecosystems of farming, property markets, and policy.
items.summary_zh: 文章梳理了佛州橙子产业衰落的原因——柑橘黄化病、虫害、气候变化与土地使用等因素交织，以及其对地产和劳动市场的连锁影响，揭示农业、房地产与政策之间的复杂关系。

items.title_en: Focused microwaves allow 3D printers to fuse circuits onto almost anything
items.title_zh: 定向微波让3D打印机在几乎任何材料上融合电路
items.summary_en: Focused microwaves enable 3D printers to fuse circuits onto a wide range of substrates, enabling rapid electronic prototyping and new form factors.
items.summary_zh: 定向微波技术使3D打印机能够在广泛材料基底上融合电路，显著提升快速原型设计和定制化外形的潜力。

items.title_en: America's Geothermal Breakthrough
items.title_zh: 美国地热领域的突破或引发150吉瓦能源革命
items.summary_en: A geothermal breakthrough could unlock up to 150 GW of clean, baseload power if deployed at scale. The advancement highlights geothermal as a reliable complement to solar and wind, with implications for grid reliability and energy policy.
items.summary_zh: 地热技术实现突破，若大规模部署，理论上可提供多达约150GW的清洁基荷发电。此进展显示地热能源在稳定电网、与风光互补方面的潜力，以及对能源政策的潜在影响。

items.title_en: Workspace Agents in ChatGPT
items.title_zh: ChatGPT 的工作区代理
items.summary_en: ChatGPT adds workspace agents to orchestrate tasks across apps from within the chat interface. This enables cross-tool automation and collaboration, with governance and privacy considerations for enterprise use.
items.summary_zh: ChatGPT 增加工作区代理，可在对话界面内跨应用编排任务，推动跨工具的自动化与协作，同时需关注企业级治理与隐私。

items.title_en: I learned Unity the wrong way
items.title_zh: 我用错法学习 Unity
items.summary_en: The author reflects on learning Unity the hard way, sharing rookie pitfalls like skipping fundamentals, overreliance on templates, and neglecting performance profiling. The piece advocates a steadier approach: start small, understand the component model, and prioritize performance and cross-platform considerations. Practical tips help newcomers build robust, scalable Unity projects.
items.summary_zh: 作者分享在学习 Unity 时走的弯路，提醒初学者避免对组件模型、场景层级和性能分析的忽视。文章给出更稳妥的学习路径与开发实践要点。

items.title_en: Framework Laptop 13 Pro: Major Upgrades and Linux Front and Center
items.title_zh: Framework Laptop 13 Pro：重大升级，Linux 成为核心
items.summary_en: The Framework Laptop 13 Pro arrives with significant hardware upgrades and a focus on Linux compatibility, including easier repairability and extensibility. The release underscores growing demand for open hardware and open-source software in premium laptops.
items.summary_zh: Framework Laptop 13 Pro 进入市场，带来硬件的大幅升级，并将对 Linux 的兼容性和可维护性放在核心位置，强调可维修性与扩展性。此次发布凸显了高端笔记本对开源硬件与开源软件日益增长的需求。

items.title_en: Astronomers find the edge of the Milky Way
items.title_zh: 天文学家发现银河系边缘
items.summary_en: Astronomers have traced the edge of the Milky Way, refining our understanding of the galaxy's size and structure. The finding informs models of mass distribution and the Milky Way’s interaction with its surroundings, with implications for dark matter estimates.
items.summary_zh: 天文学家确认了银河系的边界，进一步明确了银河的大小与结构。该发现有助于改进对质量分布的模型，以及银河与周边天体的相互作用，从而影响对暗物质分布的推断。

items.title_en: Japan's cherry blossom database, 1,200 years old, has a new keeper
items.title_zh: 日本樱花数据库有新守护者，延续1,200年记录
items.summary_en: A 1,200-year cherry blossom phenology database in Japan gets a new custodian, signaling continuity for climate research and cultural records. The transfer underscores how long-running datasets enable trend analysis in bloom timing amid changing seasons.
items.summary_zh: 日本跨越1200年的樱花开花观测数据库迎来新管理员，确保长期数据的连续性。该数据对研究极端气候影响与季节性趋势具有重要价值，同时也是日本文化记忆的一部分。

items.title_en: GPT‑5.5 Bio Bug Bounty
items.title_zh: GPT‑5.5 生物领域漏洞赏金计划
items.summary_en: OpenAI launches a GPT-5.5 bio bug bounty to surface vulnerabilities in how the model handles biological content and bio prompts. The move signals growing emphasis on bio-safety and responsible disclosure in AI development.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出 GPT‑5.5 生物领域漏洞赏金计划，鼓励研究者发现模型在处理生物内容与提示时的风险点。此举凸显在 AI 发展中对生物安全与负责任披露的日益重视。

items.title_en: SFO Quiet Airport (2025)
items.title_zh: SFO 2025：安静机场
items.summary_en: San Francisco International Airport has removed about 90 minutes of daily noise, improving passenger comfort and productivity. The change reflects ongoing airport design choices aimed at quieter, more predictable travel experiences.
items.summary_zh: 旧金山国际机场 daily 噪音减少约90分钟，提升了旅客舒适度和工作效率。这一改动反映了旨在创造更安静、可预测旅行体验的机场设计取向。

items.title_en: Scientific datasets are riddled with copy-paste errors
items.title_zh: 科学数据集普遍存在拷贝粘贴错误
items.summary_en: Discusses pervasive quality issues in scientific datasets due to copy-paste errors, undermining reproducibility and ML training. Calls for stronger data curation, automated checks, and richer metadata practices.
items.summary_zh: 文章指出科学数据集中普遍存在拷贝粘贴等质量问题，严重影响结果的可复现性和机器学习模型的训练效果。提出通过数据清洗、自动化验证与元数据治理等手段提高数据质量。

items.title_en: Can you stop beans from making you gassy?
items.title_zh: 如何让豆子不胀气？
items.summary_en: Serious Eats tests practical methods to reduce bean-related gas, including soaking, cooking times, and enzyme considerations. The results offer actionable tips for smoother digestion when eating legumes.
items.summary_zh: Serious Eats 测试了多种减少豆类胀气的方法，包括浸泡、烹煮时间和酶处理等，并给出可操作的建议，帮助更顺畅地消化豆类。

items.title_en: ChatGPT Images 2.0
items.title_zh: ChatGPT 图像 2.0
items.summary_en: OpenAI introduces ChatGPT Images 2.0, expanding multimodal capabilities with improved image understanding, generation, and editing within ChatGPT. The upgrade enables more seamless visual tasks and could boost workflows in design, data annotation, and content creation.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出 ChatGPT 图像 2.0，提升多模态能力，增强在 ChatGPT 内对图像的理解、生成与编辑。此次升级将使设计、数据标注与内容创作等场景中的视觉任务更高效。

items.title_en: Show HN: Shader Lab, like Photoshop but for shaders
items.title_zh: Show HN：Shader Lab——像 Photoshop 一样的着色器编辑器
items.summary_en: A browser-based shader editor with live preview and a familiar workflow to create and iterate shader code. The project showcases approachable tooling for graphics programmers, lowering the barrier to experiment with complex visual effects.
items.summary_zh: 这是一个基于浏览器的着色器编辑器，支持实时预览、直观的工作流，便于快速创作和调试着色器代码。该工具降低了图形程序员尝试复杂视觉效果的门槛，展示了面向一般开发者的可用性设计。

items.title_en: Education must go beyond the mere production of words
items.title_zh: 教育不能止于词句的产出
items.summary_en: A critique arguing that education should cultivate comprehension and practical skill beyond rote word production. The piece advocates reforms that emphasize critical thinking, application, and resilience.
items.summary_zh: 对教育的批评认为教育应超越单纯的词句输出，培养理解力与实际技能。文章倡导强调批判性思维、应用能力与韧性的改革。

items.title_en: Less human AI agents, please
items.title_zh: 请减少人类化 AI 代理
items.summary_en: As AI systems grow more capable, the author argues against stacking too many human-like AI agents. Simpler, more auditable autonomous agents reduce risk and confusion. The post advocates practical design principles for trustworthy AI that avoids unnecessary human-on-the-loop complexity.
items.summary_zh: 随着 AI 系统能力的提升，作者主张减少使用拟人化的 AI 代理。更简单、可审计的自主代理能降低风险与复杂性，为构建可信的 AI 系统提供实用思路。

items.title_en: Math Is Hard – OpenBSD Stories
items.title_zh: 数学很难——OpenBSD 故事
items.summary_en: OpenBSD anecdotes reveal the challenges of correctness and reliability in systems software, with math and numeric mishaps illustrating why formal correctness matters. The stories blend humor and depth about low-level programming.
items.summary_zh: OpenBSD 故事揭示了在系统软件中追求正确性与可靠性的挑战，涉及数学与数值错误，凸显形式正确性的重要性。这些故事将幽默与对底层编程的深刻理解结合起来。

items.title_en: Google Flow Music
items.title_zh: Google Flow Music
items.summary_en: A Google project named Flow Music explores a new approach to music playback and organization, signaling an experimental push from Google into how we discover and listen to music.
items.summary_zh: 谷歌推出 Flow Music 项目，探索音乐播放与组织的新模式，标志着其在音乐发现与聆听方式上的一次实验性尝试。

items.title_en: Show HN: Mediator.ai – Using Nash bargaining and LLMs to systematize fairness
items.title_zh: Show HN：Mediator.ai — 用 Nash 讨价与大语言模型来系统化公平性
items.summary_en: Mediator.ai combines Nash bargaining with large-language models to formalize notions of fairness in negotiation and decision-making. The project aims to systematize fair outcomes by encoding bargaining principles into AI-assisted workflows, potentially improving governance of collaborative systems.
items.summary_zh: Mediator.ai 将 Nash 讨价原理与大语言模型结合起来，将公平性概念形式化，用于谈判与决策。通过把博弈论原理编码进 AI 驱动的工作流，旨在提升协作系统的公平性与可解释性。

items.title_en: Clojure: Transducers
items.title_zh: Clojure：Transducers（转换器）
items.summary_en: Clojure's transducers are composable data transformation abstractions that decouple processing from input and output collections. They enable efficient, reusable pipelines and reduce boilerplate. This concept is central for functional programming enthusiasts.
items.summary_zh: Clojure 的 Transducers（转换器）是一组可组合的数据转换抽象，能够将处理与输入/输出集合解耦，提升效率并实现可复用的流水线。对函数式编程爱好者而言，这是核心概念。

items.title_en: Diatec, known for its mechanical keyboard brand FILCO, has ceased operations
items.title_zh: 曾以 FILCO 闻名的 Diatec 停止运营
items.summary_en: Diatec's shutdown ends the FILCO brand's long run in mechanical keyboards, signaling broader churn among hardware makers amid market consolidation and supply-chain pressures.
items.summary_zh: 以 FILCO 闻名的 Diatec 停止运营，标志着机械键盘硬件厂商在市场整合与供应链压力下的持续动荡。

items.title_en: Monero Community Crowdfunding System
items.title_zh: Monero 社区众筹系统
items.summary_en: The Monero community launches a crowdfunding system to solicit ideas and fund proposals from within the ecosystem, with a transparent process for proposal submission and voting. It aims to mobilize developer and researcher support while keeping the project's decentralized ethos.
items.summary_zh: Monero 社区推出众筹系统，用于征集并资助生态系统内的提案，采用透明的提案提交与投票机制。旨在动员开发和研究者参与，同时保持去中心化货币的理念。

items.title_en: Soul Player C64 – A real transformer running on a 1 MHz Commodore 64
items.title_zh: Soul Player C64：在1MHz Commodore 64上运行的真实 Transformer
items.summary_en: A retro AI project demonstrates a Transformer model running on a 1 MHz Commodore 64, pushing the boundaries of what’s possible on vintage hardware. The effort highlights optimization tricks, memory management, and low-power inference strategies that make AI feasible on extreme constraints. It’s a playful yet instructive reminder that edge AI can start with hardware you already own.
items.summary_zh: 一项复古 AI 项目在 1MHz 的 Commodore 64 上实现了 Transformer 模型，挑战了这类老旧硬件的边界。该工作展示了内存管理、模型优化和低功耗推理等技巧，使 AI 推理在极限约束下成为可能。这个案例既有趣又具启发性，提醒我们边缘 AI 的起点可以是手边的旧设备。

items.title_en: PM Carney declares U.S. ties now a 'weakness' in address to Canadians
items.title_zh: 卡尼总理在对加拿大人的讲话中称美方关系为‘弱点’
items.summary_en: Canadian Prime Minister Carney characterizes U.S. ties as a weakness in a speech to Canadians, signaling a shift in tone toward the U.S. relationship. The remark could reshape tech policy, cross-border collaboration, and security considerations.
items.summary_zh: 卡尼总理在对加拿大人的讲话中将美方关系称为“弱点”，释放出对美加关系重新评估的信号。这一表态可能影响科技政策、跨境合作与安全议题的优先级。

items.title_en: The mail sent to a video game publisher
items.title_zh: 致游戏出版商的邮件
items.summary_en: A notable cold email/ pitch to a video game publisher reveals what resonated with editors and can lead to partnership or funding. The piece analyzes tone, structure, and timing of outreach, offering practical lessons for indie devs and studios.
items.summary_zh: 一封发给游戏出版商的引人注目的冷邮件揭示了编辑偏好与潜在合作机会。文章分析了语气、结构和时机等要素，为独立开发者和工作室提供实用的 outreach 指南。

items.title_en: Even 'uncensored' models can't say what they want
items.title_zh: 即使是‘不受审查’的模型也说不出它们想说的内容
items.summary_en: The article argues that even uncensored AI models operate under hard constraints—through training data, alignment efforts, and policy defaults—limiting what they can output. It discusses implications for freedom of expression and the design of future language models.
items.summary_zh: 即便是“未审查”的模型，也受到训练数据、对齐目标和安全策略等硬性约束的影响，导致它们无法随心所欲输出内容。文章讨论对未来语言模型设计的影响与取舍。

items.title_en: Lambda Calculus Benchmark for AI
items.title_zh: AI 的λ演算基准
items.summary_en: A benchmark suite using lambda calculus tasks to stress test AI reasoning and symbolic processing. It provides a lens into how models handle functional abstractions and compositional reasoning.
items.summary_zh: 以 λ 演算任务为基础的 AI 基准测试集合，用于评估模型在符号推理与函数式抽象上的表现。

items.title_en: CATL's new LFP battery can charge from 10 to 98% in less than 7 minutes
items.title_zh: 宁德时代新型 LFP 电池7分钟内完成从10%到98%充电
items.summary_en: CATL unveils a lithium iron phosphate battery that can recharge from 10% to 98% in under seven minutes, signaling a potential leap for fast-charging EVs. Real-world performance will depend on thermal management and charger availability.
items.summary_zh: 宁德时代宣布一种新型 LFP 电池，能够在不到七分钟的时间内完成10%到98%的充电，或将推动电动车快充技术的突破。实际表现受热管理与充电基础设施等因素影响，需要在真实场景中验证。

items.title_en: Salmon exposed to cocaine and its main byproduct roam more widely
items.title_zh: 暴露于可卡因及其副产物的鲑鱼迁徙范围扩展
items.summary_en: New research finds salmon exposed to cocaine and its main byproduct exhibit increased wandering, altering migratory routes. The study highlights how trace contaminants affect aquatic behavior and ecosystem dynamics, with implications for pollution management and wildlife conservation.
items.summary_zh: 研究显示暴露于可卡因及其副产物的鲑鱼会增加游荡，迁徙路径因此改变。这项研究揭示微量污染物对水生动物行为和生态系统的影响，对污染治理和野生动物保护具有意义。

items.title_en: Highlights from Git 2.54
items.title_zh: Git 2.54 要点
items.summary_en: Summarizes the notable changes in Git 2.54, including performance improvements, new commands, and fixes that affect everyday workflows. The piece helps developers decide whether to upgrade and how to adjust automation to leverage new features.
items.summary_zh: 总结了 Git 2.54 的关键变更，包括性能改进、新命令以及修复，帮助开发者评估升级并相应优化自动化流程。

items.title_en: WireGuard for Windows Reaches v1.0
items.title_zh: Windows 版 WireGuard 达到 1.0 版本
items.summary_en: WireGuard for Windows hits version 1.0, delivering a native kernel-backed VPN experience on Windows with improved performance and simpler configuration. The milestone matters for enterprise and personal security, enabling faster, leaner VPN deployments across Windows devices.
items.summary_zh: Windows 版 WireGuard 达到1.0 版本，带来原生内核支持的 VPN 体验，性能更好、配置更简洁。这一里程碑对企业与个人的安全通信尤为重要，便于在 Windows 设备上更高效地部署 VPN。

items.title_en: The operating cost of adult and gambling startups
items.title_zh: 成人与赌博初创企业的运营成本
items.summary_en: Stigma adds a real operating tax on adult and gambling startups, influencing risk appetites, pricing, and partnerships. The piece argues that social stigma translates into tangible costs across customer acquisition, financing, and compliance.
items.summary_zh: 污名化成为成人及赌博领域初创企业的真实运营成本，影响风险偏好、定价与合作关系等多方面。文章认为社会污名会在获客、融资与合规等环节转化为具体成本。

items.title_en: Show HN: Agent Vault – Open-source credential proxy and vault for agents
items.title_zh: Agent Vault – 面向代理的开源凭据代理与保管库
items.summary_en: Agent Vault is an open-source credential proxy and vault designed for agents. It centralizes secret management, rotates credentials, and provides auditing for tool usage, aiming to simplify secure automation workflows. If you operate AI or software agents, this could reduce credential sprawl and improve security posture.
items.summary_zh: Agent Vault 是一个为代理设计的开源凭据代理与保管库。它集中管理机密、轮换凭证并提供审计，旨在简化安全自动化工作流。对于运行 AI 或软件代理的团队，可以减少凭证碎片并提升安全性。

items.title_en: You don't need advice from editors on rejected manuscripts
items.title_zh: 被拒稿的稿件不需要编辑的建议
items.summary_en: A provocative take arguing editors aren’t the fix for every rejected manuscript; writers should trust their own judgment, revise independently, or start anew rather than wait for editorial salvage. It highlights tensions between author autonomy and editorial gatekeeping in the publishing process.
items.summary_zh: 这条推文提出“被拒稿的稿件不需要编辑的建议”这一观点，主张作者应独立自我修订或直接重新起草，而不依赖编辑来挽救被拒稿的作品，凸显作者自主与编辑指导之间的张力。

items.title_en: Nanopass Framework: Clean Compiler Creation Language
items.title_zh: Nanopass 框架：干净的编译器创建语言
items.summary_en: Nanopass provides a modular, low-friction approach to writing compilers by composing passes. It emphasizes separation of concerns, enabling easier reasoning about correctness and transformations, and has influenced language tooling design by making compiler pipelines more approachable.
items.summary_zh: Nanopass 通过将编译过程拆分为可组合的阶段，提供模块化、低耦合的编译器构建方式。它强调职责分离，便于验证正确性并简化变换逻辑，对语言工具链设计产生了持续影响。

items.title_en: Hokusai and Tesselations
items.title_zh: 北斎与镶嵌图案
items.summary_en: This collection explores how Hokusai's prints intersect with tessellation ideas—repeating motifs, grids, and spatial tiling in Edo-era art. It reveals a dialogue between Japanese aesthetics and early geometric thinking that informs both art history and mathematics.
items.summary_zh: 本集藏品探讨北斎作品与镶嵌图案之间的关系——重复的几何风格、网格与平铺在他的版画中的应用。通过展现日本美学与早期几何思维之间的对话，带来艺术史与数学的交叉视角。

items.title_en: As oceans warm, great white sharks are overheating
items.title_zh: 海洋变暖使大白鲨过热
items.summary_en: Global ocean warming is pushing great white sharks toward higher body temperatures and stressed metabolism, with shifts in distribution and hunting behavior. The trend could reshape predator-prey dynamics and shark habitats, with broader ecosystem implications.
items.summary_zh: 全球海洋变暖使大白鲨体温升高、代谢受压，导致分布和捕猎行为出现变化。此趋势可能改变捕食者与猎物的动态以及鲨鱼栖息地，对生态系统产生更广泛的影响。

items.title_en: Why Not Venus?
items.title_zh: 为何不是金星？
items.summary_en: A provocative argument that Venus deserves serious consideration as a space frontier, challenging common assumptions about Mars as the default destination.
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章挑衅性地主张金星应被认真考虑作为太空前沿，挑战将火星视为默认目的地的常规观点。

items.title_en: Ask HN: How to solve the cold start problem for a two-sided marketplace?
items.title_zh: Ask HN：如何解决双边市场的冷启动问题？
items.summary_en: A discussion on strategies to tackle cold-start for two-sided marketplaces, including demand seeding, onboarding incentives, and growth loops to kickstart network effects.
items.summary_zh: 讨论应对双边市场冷启动的策略，涵盖需求引导、入驻激励和增长循环等，推动早期网络效应的建立。

items.title_en: A web-based RDP client built with Go WebAssembly and grdp
items.title_zh: 基于 Go WebAssembly 和 grdp 的网页 RDP 客户端
items.summary_en: Demonstrates a web-based RDP client built with Go WebAssembly and the grdp library, enabling remote desktop access directly in the browser. The project illustrates how WASM can bring near-native UI responsiveness and performance to browser-based remote sessions, with considerations for security and user experience.
items.summary_zh: 展示一個以 Go WebAssembly 與 grdp 驅動的網頁 RDP 客戶端，實現在瀏覽器中進行遠端桌面連線的可能性。這類實作顯示 WASM 在網頁端的性能與回應性，並需關注安全性與使用者體驗的取捨。

items.title_en: Show HN: Prompt-to-Excalidraw demo with Gemma 4 E2B in the browser (3.1GB)
items.title_zh: Show HN：Prompt 转 Excalidraw 的浏览器演示（Gemma 4 E2B，3.1GB）
items.summary_en: Demonstrates a browser-based pipeline that turns natural language prompts into Excalidraw sketches using Gemma 4 E2B models loaded in WASM. With a hefty 3.1GB model, it showcases the feasibility of offline, in-browser creative generation and the practical limits of client-side AI tools.
items.summary_zh: 展示了一个在浏览器中运行的管线，能将自然语言提示转化为 Excalidraw 草图，使用 Gemma 4 E2B 模型以 WASM 形式加载。模型体积达到 3.1GB，体现了离线、浏览器端创作生成的可行性，同时也揭示了客户端 AI 工具在资源和性能上的现实限制。

items.title_en: Iran caused more extensive damage to U.S. military bases than publicly known
items.title_zh: 伊朗对美军基地造成的损害比公开信息更广泛
items.summary_en: New assessments indicate Iran caused more extensive damage to U.S. bases than officially disclosed, affecting deterrence calculations and regional security dynamics.
items.summary_zh: 最新评估显示，伊朗对美军基地造成的损害程度比官方披露的更广泛，影响威慑评估和区域安全格局。

items.title_en: The 1944 Warsaw Uprising, in Color
items.title_zh: 1944 年华沙起义：彩色影像
items.summary_en: Colorized footage of the 1944 Warsaw Uprising provides a visceral view of a pivotal World War II event, helping audiences comprehend scale, emotion, and human experience beyond monochrome archives.
items.summary_zh: 彩色还原的1944年华沙起义影像为观众带来更直观的战争关键场景、情感与人类经历，超越单色档案的观感。

items.title_en: Three constraints before I build anything
items.title_zh: 在动手前的三个约束
items.summary_en: Advocates three non-negotiables before starting any build: define the core problem, constrain scope, and set measurable success criteria. The framework helps prevent scope creep and accelerates delivery by focusing on what truly matters.
items.summary_zh: 在动手前，作者提出三个不可谈判的约束：明确核心问题、限定范围、设定可衡量的成功标准。通过聚焦要点，这一框架有助于防止范围蔓延并加速落地。

items.title_en: A 3D Body from Eight Questions – No Photo, No GPU
items.title_zh: 无需照片、无 GPU 的八问就能生成3D人体
items.summary_en: A 3D body can be generated from eight questions without needing photos or a GPU. This approach highlights privacy-preserving, computation-light pathways for personal avatar creation, with potential use in games and metaverses. It also raises questions about accuracy and bias in de-identified data.
items.summary_zh: 通过八个问题就能生成3D人体模型，无需照片或显卡驱动。这种方法为个人化头像的隐私友好、低算力实现提供了可行路径，适合游戏与元宇宙场景。也需关注生成结果的准确性与偏差问题。

items.title_en: Show HN: Browser Harness – Gives LLM freedom to complete any browser task
items.title_zh: Show HN：Browser Harness 让 LLM 自由完成任意浏览器任务
items.summary_en: Browser Harness provides a framework for LLMs to control a browser directly, enabling a wide range of automated tasks without brittle wrappers. It lowers friction for building end-to-end browser automation.
items.summary_zh: Browser Harness 提供一个直接让 LLM 控制浏览器的框架，使自动化任务覆盖面更广且不易出错。降低了构建端到端浏览器自动化的门槛。

items.title_en: CrabTrap: An LLM-as-a-judge HTTP proxy to secure agents in production
items.title_zh: CrabTrap：将 LLM 作为裁判的 HTTP 代理，用于在生产环境中保护代理
items.summary_en: CrabTrap is an HTTP proxy that uses an LLM as a judge to enforce safety policies for production agents. It can veto actions, provide explainable decisions, and help secure deployments, though it may introduce latency and reliance on the model.
items.summary_zh: CrabTrap 是一个将 LLM 作为裁判的软件代理，通过 HTTP 代理实现对生产环境中代理行为的安全策略强制执行。它能够拒绝不安全操作、提供可解释的决策，并提升部署安全，但可能带来延迟与对模型的依赖。

items.title_en: Show HN: Free textbook on engineering thermodynamics
items.title_zh: 工程热力学免费教材
items.summary_en: A comprehensive, open-access textbook on engineering thermodynamics is freely available online, spanning fundamentals, cycles, and practical applications. It can save students money and serve as a reliable reference for courses, labs, and self-study.
items.summary_zh: 一部工程热力学的免费电子教材现已在线开放获取，涵盖基础、循环与实际应用等内容。为学生、教师和自学者提供了省钱且可靠的参考资料。

items.title_en: Louis Zocchi, games industry pioneer, has died
items.title_zh: 游戏业先驱路易斯·佐基奇去世
items.summary_en: Louis Zocchi, a cornerstone in dice design and game accessibility, has passed away. His contributions helped shape the hobby and industry for decades.
items.summary_zh: 路易斯·佐基奇，游戏行业的里程碑人物之一，去世。他在骰子设计和让游戏更易获得方面的贡献影响了数十年的业界与爱好者。

items.title_en: The Visible Zorker: Zork 1
items.title_zh: 可视化 Zorker：Zork I
items.summary_en: The Visible Zorker showcases Zork I in a visible/interactive format that reveals the game's state and parser workings as you play. It serves as a folk-history glimpse into interactive fiction and makes classic text adventures approachable for newcomers.
items.summary_zh: ‘可视化 Zorker’ 将 Zork I 以可视化/交互的形式呈现，揭示玩家操作时解析器和游戏状态的运作。它为交互式小说的历史提供直观展示，也让新玩家更易接触这类文本冒险游戏。

items.title_en: Mounting tar archives as a filesystem in WebAssembly
items.title_zh: 在 WebAssembly 中将 tar 存档挂载为文件系统
items.summary_en: A WebAssembly project mounts tar archives as a filesystem, letting WASM apps access archive contents as if they were on disk. This enables streaming access, random I/O, and offline packaging for web apps without server round-trips. It demonstrates WASM filesystem interoperability and could simplify data packaging for browser apps.
items.summary_zh: 一个 WebAssembly 项目把 tar 存档挂载成一个文件系统，WASM 应用可以像访问真实磁盘一样访问归档内容。这样的实现支持流式访问、随机 I/O，以及网页应用的离线打包，减少服务器往返。也展示了 WASM 的文件系统互操作性，可能简化浏览器端的数据打包与访问。

items.title_en: How to Implement an FPS Counter
items.title_zh: 如何实现帧率计数器
items.summary_en: A practical guide to implementing an FPS counter, covering time delta measurement, smoothing, and integration with render loops. It weighs accuracy against overhead and shows simple code patterns you can adapt in game or graphics apps.
items.summary_zh: 提供實作帧率計數器的實用指南，說明如何計算時間增量、進行平滑處理，以及與渲染循環的整合。討論在準確性、開銷與響應性之間的取捨，並給出可直接套用的範例程式碼。

items.title_en: Zero-copy protobuf and ConnectRPC for Rust
items.title_zh: Rust 的零拷贝 Protobuf 与 ConnectRPC
items.summary_en: A technical overview of zero-copy protobuf patterns in Rust using ConnectRPC, showing how to minimize allocations and copies in RPC workloads. It highlights practical gains in latency and memory safety, and discusses tradeoffs when adopting zero-copy patterns.
items.summary_zh: 介绍在 Rust 中通过零拷贝 Protobuf 与 ConnectRPC 来减少 RPC 场景中的拷贝和分配，展示对延迟与内存安全的实际提升，并讨论采用零拷贝模式的取舍。

items.title_en: Desmond Morris has died
items.title_zh: Desmond Morris 去世
items.summary_en: Desmond Morris, the influential anthropologist and author of The Naked Ape, has died at 92. His interdisciplinary work connected biology, psychology, and culture, shaping how popular audiences think about human nature.
items.summary_zh: Desmond Morris，这位影响深远的人类学家及《裸体猿》的作者，已去世，享年92岁。他将生物学、心理学与文化研究相融合，深刻影响了公众对人性的理解。

items.title_en: Books are not too expensive
items.title_zh: 书并非太贵
items.summary_en: Argues that books aren’t prohibitively expensive when you consider value, digital access, and libraries. It emphasizes that a healthy reading habit pays dividends and that price alone shouldn’t deter readers.
items.summary_zh: 作者辩称就价值、数字化获取和图书馆资源等因素来看，书籍并非昂贵。阅读的长期收益远超成本，价格不应成为读者的主要障碍。

items.title_en: A Renaissance gambling dispute spawned probability theory
items.title_zh: 文艺复兴赌博纠纷催生概率论
items.summary_en: A historical vignette shows how a dispute over gambling odds among Renaissance mathematicians contributed to the development of probability theory. The piece connects early games of chance to foundational ideas of statistics and risk.
items.summary_zh: 一场文艺复兴时期关于赌博赔率的争论促进了概率论的发展。该文将早期赌博中的不确定性与统计与风险的基础思想联系起来。

items.title_en: Composition shouldn't be this hard
items.title_zh: 组合不应如此困难
items.summary_en: An announcement about simplifying software composition with a new approach or tool that reduces boilerplate and makes assembling components easier. It argues current practices force brittle, ad-hoc architectures and offers a path toward more modular, scalable design.
items.summary_zh: 该帖公布了一种简化软件组成的方案，提出通过新工具或方法降低样板代码并提升组件拼接的易用性。作者批评现有做法容易让架构变得脆弱，提出更模块化、可扩展的设计方向。

items.title_en: Eden AI – European Alternative to OpenRouter
items.title_zh: Eden AI：OpenRouter 的欧洲替代方案
items.summary_en: Eden AI positions itself as a privacy-conscious, Europe-based AI services platform, offering alternatives to OpenRouter's model deployment and data handling.
items.summary_zh: Eden AI 作为欧洲本土的 AI 服务平台，强调隐私保护与本地化基础设施，定位为对 OpenRouter 等美欧服务的欧洲替代方案。

items.title_en: Show HN: Faceoff – A terminal UI for following NHL games
items.title_zh: Show HN: Faceoff — 跟踪 NHL 比赛的终端界面
items.summary_en: Faceoff is a terminal UI that lets fans follow NHL games from the command line. It emphasizes lightweight, real-time updates and keyboard-centric navigation, appealing to power users who prefer terminal workflows over web dashboards. The project illustrates how hobby CLIs can compete with polished GUI apps for niche needs.
items.summary_zh: Faceoff 是一个在终端跟踪 NHL 比赛的界面，提供实时更新和以键盘为中心的导航，面向偏好命令行工作流的用户。它展示了爱好者级 CLI 也能在小众场景与成熟 GUI 应用竞争。

items.title_en: Magic: The Gathering took me from N2 to Japanese fluency
items.title_zh: 魔法风云会让我从日语能力测试 N2 提升到日语流利
items.summary_en: A personal narrative shows how Magic: The Gathering communities can accelerate language learning, turning hobby-driven immersion into practical gains. The piece reflects how niche communities foster real-world skill development.
items.summary_zh: 一个以 Magic: The Gathering 为线索的语言学习故事，展示爱好驱动的沉浸式体验如何转化为实际的语言能力提升。此文也反映了小众社群在现实世界技能发展中的作用。

items.title_en: Surveillance Pricing: Exploiting Information Asymmetries
items.title_zh: 监控定价：利用信息不对称
items.summary_en: The article explains how surveillance-based pricing exploits information asymmetry to extract more value from users through personalized pricing. It discusses implications for platform fairness, transparency, and protections against data misuse.
items.summary_zh: 文章阐述监控定价如何利用信息不对称对用户实施个性化定价，从而榨取更多价值。讨论其对平台公平性、透明度和数据滥用防护的影响。

items.title_en: Kernel code removals driven by LLM-created security reports
items.title_zh: 内核代码移除由LLM创建的安全报告推动
items.summary_en: Kernel maintainers are removing code in response to security reports generated with or by LLMs, reflecting a shift toward AI-assisted vulnerability discovery influencing core code. The trend raises questions about trust, automation in security review, and risk of overcorrection.
items.summary_zh: 内核维护者基于由LLM创建的安全报告，移除了部分代码，体现了AI 辅助的漏洞发现对核心代码的影响。这一趋势引发对信任、自动化安全审查以及过度修正风险的讨论。

items.title_en: All your agents are going async
items.title_zh: 所有代理都在走向异步化
items.summary_en: AI agents are transitioning to asynchronous architectures to improve throughput, concurrency, and fault tolerance in orchestration systems. The shift affects how developers design agent flows, handle promises, and coordinate between components.
items.summary_zh: AI 代理正向异步架构过渡，以提升吞吐量、并发性和编排系统的容错性。这一转变将影响开发者在设计代理流程、处理异步调用以及跨组件协作时的方式。

items.title_en: Show HN: Gova – The declarative GUI framework for Go
items.title_zh: Show HN：Gova — Go 的声明式 GUI 框架
items.summary_en: Gova is a declarative GUI framework for Go that aims to simplify building user interfaces by expressing UI as declarative trees bound to Go data. It enables rapid UI development with less boilerplate and a more predictable rendering model.
items.summary_zh: Gova 是一个供 Go 使用的声明式 GUI 框架，旨在通过将界面表达为与 Go 数据绑定的声明性树来简化界面开发。它提供更少的样板代码和更可预测的渲染模型，提升开发效率。

items.title_en: Columnar Storage Is Normalization
items.title_zh: 列式存储就是规范化
items.summary_en: The piece argues that columnar storage achieves normalization-like benefits by organizing data for columnar access rather than row-oriented normalization alone. It explains why columnar layouts improve compression, IO efficiency, and analytics workloads.
items.summary_zh: 文章提出列式存储在面向列访问的数据组织上实现了类似规范化的效果，相对于传统行存的规范化。它解释了列式布局如何提升压缩率、IO 效率以及分析型工作负载的性能。

items.title_en: Smoking ban for people born after 2008 in the UK agreed
items.title_zh: 英国同意对2008年以后出生的人实施禁烟
items.summary_en: Britain agrees to a policy that effectively creates a tobacco-free generation by restricting smoking for cohorts born after 2008, reflecting public health goals and potential long-term societal impact.
items.summary_zh: 英国同意通过限制2008年以后出生人群的吸烟权利来实现准禁烟代际的目标，体现公共卫生愿景及对社会长期影响的考量。

items.title_en: How a subsea cable is repaired (2021)
items.title_zh: 海底光缆修复
items.summary_en: Subsea cable repair is a high-stakes, specialized operation involving ship-based spooling, careful trenching, and remotely operated vehicles. The piece outlines the logistical choreography, risk management, and the criticality of underwater fiber connectivity to global networks.
items.summary_zh: 海底光缆修复属于高风险的专业作业，涉及船载铺设、谨慎开沟和遥控水下机器人等技术。文章概述了这一作业的物流调度、风险控制，以及海底光纤连接对全球网络的重要性。

items.title_en: Tindie store under "scheduled maintenance" for days
items.title_zh: Tindie 商店长期处于计划维护状态
items.summary_en: A Tindie store has stayed in scheduled maintenance mode for days, affecting visibility and sales for makers. The outage highlights the fragility of niche hardware marketplaces and the need for clearer status indicators.
items.summary_zh: 一个 Tindie 商店多日处于计划维护状态，影响创客的曝光和销售。此事凸显了小众硬件市场的脆弱性以及对透明状态更新的需求。

items.title_en: Quirks of Human Anatomy
items.title_zh: 人体解剖学的怪癖
items.summary_en: An exploration of quirks in human anatomy—from rare variations to unusual features—that challenge standard textbook narratives. The discussion underscores how exceptions inform medical understanding and education.
items.summary_zh: 介绍人体解剖中的罕见变异与有趣特征，挑战标准教材的叙述。强调这些例外对医学理解与教育的启示。

items.title_en: Figma's woes compound with Claude Design
items.title_zh: Figma 的困境因 Claude Design 而加剧
items.summary_en: The piece argues that Figma’s challenges are compounded by Claude Design’s entry, intensifying competition in design tooling and AI-assisted workflows. It discusses implications for pricing, feature parity, and platform strategy as AI features blur tool boundaries. Readers should watch how Figma adapts to this evolving AI-enabled design landscape.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为 Figma 的挑战因 Claude Design 的进入而加剧，扩大了设计工具市场的竞争与 AI 辅助工作流的压力。讨论定价、功能对等与平台战略的影响，因为 AI 特性正在模糊工具边界。读者应关注 Figma 如何应对日益 AI 化的设计生态。

items.title_en: Garbage Collection Without Unsafe Code
items.title_zh: 在不使用不安全代码的情况下实现垃圾回收
items.summary_en: Rust's safe garbage collector demonstrates you can implement memory management without unsafe blocks, by using safe abstractions and tracing/GC techniques. This approach improves safety guarantees for systems programming while showing practical performance parity with unsafe implementations.
items.summary_zh: 在纯安全 Rust 中实现垃圾回收，证明无需 unsafe 代码也能完成内存管理。通过安全抽象实现跟踪/回收等技术，为系统编程提供更安全的内存方案。

items.title_en: Mine, an IDE for Coalton and Common Lisp
items.title_zh: Mine：为 Coalton 与 Common Lisp 打造的 IDE
items.summary_en: Mine is an IDE tailored for Coalton and Common Lisp, offering integrated editing, a REPL, and tooling designed for Lisp workflows. It showcases ongoing work in Coalton and Lisp toolchains, aiming to improve productivity for power users. This matters for developers who want modern tooling without leaving Lisp ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: Mine 是专为 Coalton 与 Common Lisp 打造的集成开发环境，提供编辑、REPL 与工具链，旨在提升 Lisp 开发的效率。它体现了 Lisp 生态的活跃与 Coalton 与 CL 的互操作性。对想要保留 Lisp 生态同时追求现代工作流的开发者尤为有用。

items.title_en: MuJoCo – Advanced Physics Simulation
items.title_zh: MuJoCo：高级物理仿真
items.summary_en: MuJoCo is a high-fidelity physics simulator used in robotics and AI research, enabling fast, accurate dynamics for articulated agents and environments. The project continues to evolve to support more complex models and integration with ML workflows.
items.summary_zh: MuJoCo 是用于机器人与人工智能研究的高保真物理仿真器，支持对关节式代理和环境的快速、准确动力学计算。该项目持续发展，进一步支持更复杂的模型及与机器学习工作流的整合。

items.title_en: I prompted ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, and Gemini and watched my Nginx logs
items.title_zh: 我向 ChatGPT、Claude、Perplexity 与 Gemini 发出提示并查看 Nginx 日志
items.summary_en: A practical look at how prompts to multiple AI models appear in Nginx logs, revealing patterns in AI traffic versus referrals. It highlights implications for measuring AI usage and mitigating bot traffic.
items.summary_zh: 实操观察向多家 AI 模型提示在 Nginx 日志中的表现，揭示 AI 流量与推荐流量的模式。强调对 AI 使用量的度量与流量治理的启示。

items.title_en: Aspartame is not that bad? (2022)
items.title_zh: 阿斯巴甜并没有那么糟糕？（2022）
items.summary_en: A review suggests aspartame may be safer than popular belief within recommended daily limits, challenging some health scare narratives. It discusses toxicology and epidemiological evidence.
items.summary_zh: 综述表明在推荐摄入量范围内，阿斯巴甜可能并不像某些观点所说那样有害，挑战了部分健康恐慌叙事，讨论了毒理学与流行病学证据。

items.title_en: The purist's guide to phở in Hanoi
items.title_zh: 河内正宗牛肉河粉指南
items.summary_en: A purist’s guide to pho in Hanoi highlights traditional broth, flat rice noodles, and iconic toppings from local eateries. It’s a practical read for travelers seeking authentic flavor over touristy substitutions.
items.summary_zh: 面向 purists 的河内牛肉河粉指南，聚焦正宗高汤、扁平米粉与当地经典配料，适合追求真实风味的旅客。

items.title_en: Six Levels of Dark Mode (2024)
items.title_zh: 深色模式的六个层级
items.summary_en: Six levels of dark mode provide a practical framework that ranges from basic contrast tweaks to adaptive, accessible, and brand-aligned themes. Each level guides decisions about contrast, color temperature, readability, and motion to balance usability with consistency across platforms. The framework helps teams implement thoughtful, scalable theming.
items.summary_zh: 六个层级的深色模式为界面美学与可用性提供了一个实用分级框架，从对比度、色温到无障碍性与品牌一致性都给出设计路线。帮助团队在多平台间保持一致性，同时提升可用性。

items.title_en: Tempest vs. Tempest: The Making and Remaking of Atari's Iconic Video Game
items.title_zh: Tempest 与 Tempest：雅达利经典电子游戏的诞生与再造
items.summary_en: A retrospective on the making of Atari's Tempest and its later remakes or reinterpretations. It examines how the game's design, hardware, and legacy have shaped modern arcade design and preservation culture.
items.summary_zh: 回顾雅达利经典射击游戏 Tempest 的诞生与再造，分析其设计、硬件与遗产如何影响现代街机设计与游戏保存文化。

items.title_en: New study compares growing corn for energy to solar production
items.title_zh: 新研究：以玉米生物能源对比太阳能发电，结论显而易见：太阳能更具优势
items.summary_en: A new study finds solar power outperforms using corn for energy in terms of land use and efficiency, challenging the idea that crop-based energy is competitive with solar. It underscores photovoltaics as a scalable, low-carbon solution.
items.summary_zh: 最新研究显示，从玉米生物能源转化的土地利用与效率方面，太阳能发电远优于玉米生物能源，挑战以作物生产能源的观点，强调光伏在大规模低碳能源中的优势。

items.title_en: Cosmology with Geometry Nodes
items.title_zh: Blender：用几何节点构建的宇宙学场景
items.summary_en: Cosmology with Geometry Nodes demonstrates using Blender's geometry nodes to procedurally generate cosmic structures. It showcases artists and scientists leveraging procedural tools to visualize galaxies, nebulae, and spacetime phenomena, enabling repeatable experiments and educational visuals.
items.summary_zh: 演示如何用 Blender 的几何节点来流程化生成宇宙结构，如星系、星云和时空现象。示例表明艺术家与科学家都能利用流程化工具实现可重复的天文视觉效果，适合教育与科学可视化。

items.title_en: Mine, a Coalton and Common Lisp IDE
items.title_zh: Mine：Coalton 与 Common Lisp 的集成开发环境
items.summary_en: Mine is an IDE bridging Coalton and Common Lisp, focusing on enabling Lisp-like development with modern tooling. It demonstrates how language ecosystems can co-exist and how IDEs can tailor experiences for niche languages.
items.summary_zh: Mine 是一款为 Coalton 与 Common Lisp 设计的集成开发环境，强调在现代工具链中对这类 Lisp 生态的支持。它展示了语言生态并存与面向特定语言的 IDE 自定义体验的可能性。

items.title_en: Show HN: Alien – Self-hosting with remote management (written in Rust)
items.title_zh: Show HN：Alien——用 Rust 编写的远程管理自托管解决方案
items.summary_en: Show HN introduces Alien, a Rust-based self-hosting platform with remote management capabilities. It demonstrates how Rust and orchestration tools can simplify running personal servers at scale.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 介绍 Alien，这是一个用 Rust 编写的自托管平台，具备远程管理能力。展示了 Rust 与编排工具如何在大规模运行个人服务器时简化运维。

items.title_en: Agentic AI systems violate the implicit assumptions of database design
items.title_zh: 代理性 AI 系统违反数据库设计的隐性假设
items.summary_en: Agentic AI systems challenge implicit database design assumptions, raising concerns about data integrity, governance, and accountability as autonomous agents access and modify data.
items.summary_zh: 代理性 AI 系统挑战数据库设计中的隐性假设，引发对数据完整性、治理与问责的关注，尤其在自治代理访问和修改数据时。

items.title_en: Theseus, a Static Windows Emulator
items.title_zh: Theseus：一个静态的 Windows 模拟器
items.summary_en: Theseus is a static Windows emulator exploring lightweight paths to Windows compatibility without dynamic binaries. The project highlights research directions in OS emulation, safety, and portability. It appeals to systems researchers and enthusiasts exploring alternative compatibility models.
items.summary_zh: Theseus 是一个静态的 Windows 模拟器，探索用轻量化方式实现 Windows 兼容性的可能性，无需动态二进制。该项目指向操作系统仿真、安全性与可移植性的研究方向，吸引系统研究者与对另类兼容模型感兴趣的爱好者。

items.title_en: Prove you are a robot: CAPTCHAs for agents
items.title_zh: 证明你是机器人：为代理设计的验证码
items.summary_en: CAPTCHAs are being contemplated as a gatekeeping tool for AI agents, raising questions about how to distinguish automated agents from humans in dynamic environments. The concept highlights security, privacy, and governance considerations for AI-enabled systems. Practical implications include how to design robust tests that don’t hinder legitimate use.
items.summary_zh: 将 CAPTCHA 用作区分人类与代理的认证机制，反映出对AI代理安全与信任框架的探索。该思路将影响人工智能代理的设计、隐私与可用性，并对系统治理提出挑战。

items.title_en: Dear friend, you have built a Kubernetes (2024)
items.title_zh: 亲爱的朋友，你已经构建了一个 Kubernetes（2024）
items.summary_en: A reflective piece about the perception and responsibility of operating Kubernetes-like systems, highlighting the complexity and maintenance costs of Kubernetes and urging simpler architectures or clearer ownership.
items.summary_zh: 文章用幽默笔触反思若你自称‘构建了 Kubernetes’的说法背后的责任感，强调 Kubernetes 等系统的复杂性与运维代价。

items.title_en: Box to save memory in Rust
items.title_zh: Rust 中的 Box：节省内存的思路
items.summary_en: Examines how Box<T> can reduce memory usage in Rust in certain patterns, weighing heap allocation costs against layout improvements and potential performance gains. The guidance helps readers decide when boxing is beneficial or避免不必要的装箱.
items.summary_zh: 探讨在特定模式下，Box<T> 如何降低 Rust 的内存占用，权衡堆分配成本与布局优化及潜在性能收益，帮助读者判断何时值得使用 Box，何时应避免不必要的装箱。

items.title_en: Diverse organic molecules on Mars revealed by the first SAM TMAH experiment
items.title_zh: 火星上首次 SAM TMAH 实验揭示多样有机分子
items.summary_en: Mars' SAM TMAH experiment revealed a diverse suite of organic molecules, expanding what we know about organics on the planet's surface. While this supports ongoing questions about past habitability, interpretation must carefully account for Martian chemistry and potential contamination.
items.summary_zh: 通过首个 SAM TMAH 实验，在火星发现了多种有机分子。这一发现拓展了对火星表面有机物的认识，表明曾经存在能够保持有机物的环境，但解读需谨慎，因为表面氧化剂和风化过程可能混淆信号。

items.title_en: Colorado Adds Open-Source Exemption to Age-Verification Bill
items.title_zh: 科罗拉多州在年龄验证法案中加入开源豁免
items.summary_en: Colorado adds an open-source exemption to its age-verification bill, letting open-source tools satisfy age checks and avoiding vendor lock-in. The change helps privacy-preserving, auditable identity workflows.
items.summary_zh: 科罗拉多州在年龄验证法案中加入开源豁免，允许使用开源工具完成年龄检查，减少对单一供应商的依赖，并支持更可审计的隐私身份工作流。

items.title_en: Different language models learn similar number representations
items.title_zh: 不同语言模型学习到相似的数字表示
items.summary_en: Different language models converge on similar numerical representations despite architectural differences, indicating shared inductive biases in how they process numbers. This alignment may enable cross-model transfer of number-related reasoning and suggests robust numeric grounding across models. The result informs how we probe, compare, and compose AI systems for math-heavy tasks.
items.summary_zh: 尽管架构不同，语言模型在数字表示上趋于一致，显示出对数字处理的共性偏置。这种对齐或为跨模型的数值推理迁移带来机会，表明模型在数值理解方面具有更稳定的基础。研究也为在数学相关任务中对AI系统进行比较与组合提供了参考。

items.title_en: Contact Lens Uses Microfluidics to Monitor and Treat Glaucoma
items.title_zh: 隐形眼镜利用微流控监测并治疗青光眼
items.summary_en: Prototype smart contact lens uses microfluidics to monitor glaucoma biomarkers in tears and can deliver drug treatment through microchannels. The technology aims to enable continuous monitoring of biomarkers and on-demand treatment, potentially improving adherence and disease control.
items.summary_zh: 原型智能隐形眼镜集成微流控系统，能够从泪液中监测青光眼相关生物标志物，并通过微通道分发药物治疗。此类设计旨在实现持续监测与按需治疗，提升依从性与疾病控制。

items.title_en: Familiarity is the enemy: On why Enterprise systems have failed for 60 years
items.title_zh: 熟悉感是敌人：企业系统为何60年来屡次失败
items.summary_en: Longstanding familiarity with legacy architectures is blamed for persistent enterprise-system failures. The piece calls for abandoning dogmatic habits in favor of pragmatic observability, composable services, and fresh mental models to modernize.
items.summary_zh: 作者主张长期以来对现有架构的依赖和熟悉感是企业系统长期失败的根源。文章呼吁抛弃守旧思维，转向以可观测性、可组合服务和新思维模式为核心的现代化路径。

items.title_en: Monumental ship burial beneath ancient Norwegian mound predates the Viking Age
items.title_zh: 挪威古墩下的巨型船葬早于维京时代
items.summary_en: Archaeologists have uncovered a monumental ship burial beneath an ancient mound in Norway, dating to before the Viking Age. The discovery shifts the timeline of Norse burial practices and maritime capabilities, offering new clues about prehistoric social structure.
items.summary_zh: 考古学家在挪威一座古墩下发现一座大型船葬，年代早于维京时代。这一发现将挪威早期葬俗与海上工艺的时间线向前推进，提供关于史前社会结构的新线索。

items.title_en: OpenAI's response to the Axios developer tool compromise
items.title_zh: OpenAI 对 Axios 开发者工具被入侵事件的回应
items.summary_en: OpenAI outlines measures after a security incident involving a popular developer tool from Axios, emphasizing risk mitigation, credential rotation, and monitoring. The response highlights ongoing concerns about supply-chain and third-party tooling in AI workflows.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 针对涉及 Axios 的开发者工具安全事件给出应对措施，强调风险缓释、密钥轮换与滥用监控等关键步骤，反映出在 AI 工作流中对供应链与第三方工具的持续关注。

items.title_en: NASA Artemis Posters
items.title_zh: NASA 阿尔忒弥斯计划海报
items.summary_en: NASA released Artemis posters featuring themes of lunar exploration and mission design, useful for outreach and education.
items.summary_zh: NASA 发布了阿尔忒弥斯计划的海报，凸显月球探测与任务设计主题，适用于科普与教育传播。

items.title_en: Stripe's Payment APIs: the first 10 years (2020)
items.title_zh: Stripe 的支付 API：自 2020 年起的前十年
items.summary_en: A retrospective on Stripe's payment API design as it marks a decade since 2020, outlining core principles that guided API evolution. It discusses lessons around developer ergonomics, reliability, versioning, and how to support growing payments without breaking integrations.
items.summary_zh: 回顾自 2020 年以来 Stripe 支付 API 的设计演进，披露驱动其发展的核心原则。探讨在开发者体验、可靠性、版本控制等方面的经验，以及在不破坏现有接入的前提下扩展支付能力的策略。

items.title_en: Google banks on AI edge to catch up to cloud rivals Amazon and Microsoft
items.title_zh: 谷歌押注 AI 边缘以追赶云竞争对手
items.summary_en: Reports that Google is betting on AI edge computing to close the gap with Amazon and Microsoft, aiming to reduce latency, boost privacy-preserving inference, and unlock new workloads at the edge. The strategy signals a shift toward hybrid cloud and on-device intelligence.
items.summary_zh: 报道指出谷歌正在押注 AI 边缘计算以缩短与 AWS、Microsoft 的差距，目标是降低延迟、提升隐私保护推理能力，并在边缘释放新工作负载。这一策略预示云端与边缘融合、以及设备内智能的新趋势。

items.title_en: Nobody Got Fired for Uber's $8M Ledger Mistake?
items.title_zh: Uber 的 800 万美元账本错误事件：无人被解雇？
items.summary_en: An analysis questions accountability after Uber’s $8 million ledger mistake, noting that no executives were publicly fired and exploring governance consequences and accountability in large tech companies.
items.summary_zh: 在 Uber 的800万美元账本错误事件后，探讨问责与治理问题，指出并未有高管被公开解雇，分析大型科技公司中的问责与治理影响。

items.title_en: Swiss AI Initiative (2023)
items.title_zh: 瑞士 AI 倡议（2023）
items.summary_en: An overview of Switzerland's 2023 national AI initiative, covering governance, ethics, funding, and industry collaboration. It underscores a commitment to responsible AI and workforce upskilling.
items.summary_zh: 这份 2023 年的瑞士 AI 倡议概括了国家层面的治理框架、伦理原则、研究资助与产业协作等要点。突出强调对负责任 AI 的追求以及相关人才再培训与产业生态建设。

items.title_en: Used La Marzocco machines are coveted by cafe owners and collectors
items.title_zh: 二手 La Marzocco 咖啡机受店主与收藏家追捧
items.summary_en: Used La Marzocco espresso machines command strong demand among cafe owners and collectors, creating a vibrant secondary market built on durability and consistent performance. Scarcity and prestige drive rising prices and a blend of professional gear with collectible value.
items.summary_zh: 二手 La Marzocco 意式咖啡机在咖啡馆经营者与收藏家之间需求强劲，二手市场因此繁荣，品牌的耐用性与稳定性是关键因素。供给稀缺和声望效应推高了价格，使专业设备逐渐具备收藏价值。

items.title_en: An amateur historian's favorite books about the Silk Road
items.title_zh: 一个业余历史学家推荐的丝绸之路书单
items.summary_en: An amateur historian curates accessible Silk Road reading, spanning archaeology, trade networks, and cross-cultural exchanges. The list helps readers understand how long-distance commerce shaped civilizations and historical narratives.
items.summary_zh: 这是一份业余历史学家精心挑选的丝绸之路书单，覆盖考古、贸易网络与跨文化交流。通过多学科视角，帮助读者理解远程贸易如何塑造文明。

items.title_en: How the Heck does Shazam work?
items.title_zh: Shazam到底是如何工作的？
items.summary_en: Shazam uses audio fingerprinting to identify songs from short samples, matching against a vast database with robust hashing that tolerates noise and pitch changes. The article breaks down the pipeline from capture to fingerprinting, database lookup, and confident results.
items.summary_zh: Shazam 通过音频指纹对短样本进行识别，与庞大数据库进行哈希比对，能在嘈杂环境和音高偏移中保持鲁棒性。文章梳理了从录制、指纹提取、到数据库检索和给出高置信度结果的全过程。

items.title_en: The Theory of Interstellar Trade [pdf] (1978)
items.title_zh: 星际贸易理论（1978）
items.summary_en: A classic 1978 thought experiment that extends trade theory to interstellar commerce, showing how transport costs and economies of scale shape exchanges between worlds. It serves as a playful yet instructive lens on macro modeling and international trade logic.
items.summary_zh: 这是1978年的经典思考实验，将贸易理论扩展到星际贸易，展示运输成本与规模经济如何影响星际间的交换。它以玩笑但具启发性的方式，帮助理解宏观模型和国际贸易逻辑。

items.title_en: 4-bit floating point FP4
items.title_zh: 4 位浮点数 FP4
items.summary_en: Introducing FP4, a compact 4-bit floating-point format for resource-constrained tasks, examining its precision, performance, and suitability for ML or embedded workloads. Discusses trade-offs between hardware simplicity and numerical accuracy.
items.summary_zh: 介绍 FP4，这是一种用于资源受限任务的四位浮点数格式，分析其精度、性能及在 ML 与嵌入式场景中的适用性，并探讨硬件简化与数值精度之间的权衡。

items.title_en: Exposing Floating Point – Bartosz Ciechanowski (2019)
items.title_zh: 揭示浮点数的局限——Bartosz Ciechanowski
items.summary_en: A deep dive into how floating-point representation leads to surprising rounding errors and precision pitfalls in everyday code. It offers pragmatic tips for writing numerically robust algorithms and understanding when to use integers, fixed-point, or higher precision.
items.summary_zh: 深入分析浮点数表示带来的舍入误差与精度陷阱，以及在日常编码中如何避免它们。提供写出数值鲁棒算法的实用建议，讲解何时使用整数、定点或更高精度的方法。

items.title_en: Ibuilt a tiny Unix‑like 'OS' with shell and filesystem for Arduino UNO (2KB RAM)
