items.title_zh: 用 Arduino UNO（仅 2KB RAM）构建的微型 Unix‑like 操作系统
items.summary_en: I built a tiny Unix-like OS with a shell and filesystem for Arduino UNO, constrained to 2KB RAM. It pushes the boundaries of what small microcontrollers can run and demonstrates minimalist OS design. A provocative example for embedded systems enthusiasts.
items.summary_zh: 在仅有 2KB RAM 的 Arduino UNO 上构建了一个微型的类 Unix 操作系统，包含 shell 与文件系统。此举挑战了微控制器的极限，展示了极简操作系统设计的可能性，适合嵌入式系统爱好者参考。

items.title_en: Lute: A Standalone Runtime for Luau
items.title_zh: Lute：一个独立的 Luau 运行时
items.summary_en: Lute provides a standalone runtime for Luau, enabling Luau scripting outside Roblox. It broadens the ecosystem for Luau developers building tools and games beyond Roblox.
items.summary_zh: Lute 提供 Luau 的独立运行时，使 Luau 脚本语言能够在 Roblox 之外使用。它提高了 Luau 的可移植性与性能，为在 Roblox 之外构建工具和游戏的开发者带来新选项。

items.title_en: Show HN: AI memory with biological decay (52% recall)
items.title_zh: Show HN：具生物衰减的 AI 记忆（52% 召回率）
items.summary_en: A Show HN project called YourMemory experiments with AI memory that decays over time, achieving about 52% recall. The approach prompts questions about long-term context management and memory-aligned AI behavior.
items.summary_zh: 一个名为 YourMemory 的 Show HN 项目在 AI 记忆中引入生物衰减机制，召回率约 52%。这一思路引发关于长期上下文管理与记忆对齐的讨论。

items.title_en: At least 10 people tied to sensitive US research have died or disappeared
items.title_zh: 与美国敏感研究相关的至少十人死亡或失踪
items.summary_en: Investigative report notes at least 10 individuals linked to sensitive US research have died or vanished in recent years.
items.summary_zh: 至少有10名与敏感美国研究相关的人员死去或失踪的报道暴露出研究安全和人身风险问题。此事引发对科研安全、监督与风险管理的关注。

items.title_en: nowhere: an entire website encoded in a URL
items.title_zh: nowhere：一个将整个网站编码在一个 URL 里的项目
items.summary_en: This project demonstrates a website fully encoded within the URL, relying on parameter length, compression, or inlined data. It serves as a provocative exploration of linkability and data packing, raising questions about URL limits, accessibility, and sharing long-lived content.
items.summary_zh: 该项目展示一个完全嵌入在 URL 中的网站，通过参数长度、压缩或内嵌数据实现。这是一场关于可分享性与数据打包的挑衅性探索，引发关于 URL 长度、可访问性和长期内容分享的讨论。

items.title_en: Sudo for Windows (2024)
items.title_zh: Windows 的 sudo
items.summary_en: Microsoft introduces a sudo-like tool for Windows, enabling non-root commands with elevated privileges and unifying developer workflows with Linux environments. It signals a shift toward more Linux-style privilege management on Windows.
items.summary_zh: 微软推出 Windows 的 sudo 工具，让在 Windows 上的命令提升权限更加类似 Linux 的 sudo 行为。该功能有助于统一开发工作流、提升权限管理的一致性，同时提升安全性。

items.title_en: Only one side will be the true successor to MS-DOS – Windows 2.x
items.title_zh: MS-DOS 的真正繼任者只有一個：Windows 2.x
items.summary_en: Explores an alternate-history angle where Windows 2.x could have been the true successor to MS-DOS, contrasting GUI-centric design with DOS's command-line heritage. The piece reflects on how early GUI decisions shaped modern Windows architecture and developer workflows.
items.summary_zh: 探討若 Windows 2.x 成為 MS-DOS 的真正繼任者，會如何改寫歷史，對比圖形介面導向設計與命令列遺產。文章反映早期 GUI 决策如何塑造現代 Windows 架構與開發者工作流程。

items.title_en: How Hard Is It to Open a File?
items.title_zh: 打开一个文件有多难？
items.summary_en: Open file operations can be surprisingly fiddly across languages and runtimes, with tradeoffs between low-level OS calls and high-level abstractions. The piece dissects how design choices affect reliability, performance, and developer experience, and provides mental models to reason about file access.
items.summary_zh: 跨语言和运行时打开文件的过程往往错综复杂，底层系统调用与高层抽象之间存在权衡。本文剖析了设计选择如何影响可靠性、性能与开发体验，并提供理解文件访问的思维模型。

items.title_en: PCR is a surprisingly near-optimal technology
items.title_zh: PCR竟然是接近最优的技术
items.summary_en: PCR is argued to be near-optimal given physical constraints, suggesting there may be limited room for dramatic efficiency gains over current PCR-based diagnostics and amplification methods.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为 PCR 在物理约束下接近最优，说明在现有 PCR 基础上的效率提升空间可能有限，尤其在诊断与扩增应用中。讨论了速度、成本和准确性之间的权衡，以及对现场检测的影响。

items.title_en: Global growth in solar "the largest ever observed for any source"
items.title_zh: 全球太阳能增长创历史最高纪录
items.summary_en: Global solar capacity growth is the largest ever observed for any energy source, driven by rapid deployment and falling costs. The surge accelerates the energy transition and has implications for grids, storage, and policy.
items.summary_zh: 全球太阳能容量增长速度达到有史以来任何能源来源的最高水平，得益于部署速度提升和成本下降。这一增长推动能源转型，对电网、储能和政策带来深远影响。

items.title_en: You don't want long-lived keys
items.title_zh: 你不该使用长期有效的密钥
items.summary_en: The piece argues for short-lived keys and frequent rotation to limit exposure from leaks or compromises. It warns that long-lived keys silently accumulate risk and proposes strategies like ephemeral credentials and automatic rotation in secure systems.
items.summary_zh: 文章主张使用短寿命密钥并频繁轮换，以降低被泄露或被攻破时带来的风险。长期密钥会悄然累积风险，建议在安全系统中采用短期凭证和自动轮换等策略。

items.title_en: The route from Prussian military headquarters to Gary Gygax’s basement
items.title_zh: 从普鲁士军事总部到 Gary Gygax 的地下室之路
items.summary_en: The article traces how military and strategic thinking from Prussian headquarters influenced the origin of modern tabletop gaming, culminating in Gary Gygax’s basement-era creations. It highlights how hierarchical planning and war-gaming culture seeded a hobby that evolved into RPGs and nerd culture.
items.summary_zh: 本文追溯普鲁士军事总部的战略思想如何影响现代桌面游戏的起源，最终在 Gary Gygax 的地下室中孕育出早期角色扮演游戏。揭示了等级化的规划与战争博弈文化如何催生这一爱好，并演变成如今的 RPG 与科幻次文化。

items.title_en: Spam in conversational replies to blog posts
items.title_zh: 博客文章对话式回复中的垃圾邮件
items.summary_en: The post analyzes how spam has infiltrated conversational reply threads on blogs, using bot-generated, human-like interactions to spread spam or harvest engagement. It covers tactics, detection strategies, and the need for better anti-spam tooling.
items.summary_zh: 文章分析了垃圾邮件如何渗透博客的对话式回复，利用类人机器对话来传播垃圾信息或刷取互动。介绍了作案手法、检测策略以及更强的反垃圾工具的必要性。

items.title_en: Borrow-checking without type-checking
items.title_zh: 无需类型检查的借用检查
items.summary_en: The piece proposes borrow-checking without relying on a full type checker, exploring lightweight or alternative mechanisms to enforce safe aliasing and mutation. It weighs trade-offs and potential performance gains for language design.
items.summary_zh: 文章提出在不依赖完整类型检查的前提下实现借用检查，探讨用轻量化或替代机制来强制正确的别名与变更控制。讨论了权衡、潜在的性能收益，以及此类思路对语言设计的影响。

items.title_en: How Motorola’s 2N2222 and 2N3904 transistors became the default NPNs
items.title_zh: 摩托罗拉的 2N2222 与 2N3904 晶体管如何成为默认的 NPN
items.summary_en: An historical look at how Motorola’s 2N2222 and 2N3904 transistors became the de facto standard NPN devices, shaping electronics for decades.
items.summary_zh: 回顾摩托罗拉的 2N2222 与 2N3904 如何成为默认的 NPN 晶体管，并影响了几十年的电子设计。

items.title_en: DeepSeek-V4 on Day 0: From Fast Inference to Verified RL with SGLang and Miles
items.title_zh: DeepSeek-V4 Day 0：从快速推理到使用 SGLang 与 Miles 的验证型强化学习
items.summary_en: DeepSeek-V4 debuts with fast inference capabilities and a path to verified RL using SGLang and Miles. It showcases how open-source tooling can bridge speed and safety in RL applications, with potential use in instruction following and planning.
items.summary_zh: DeepSeek-V4 首次亮相，提供快速推理能力并通过 SGLang 与 Miles 实现验证型强化学习路径。展示了开源工具如何在 RL 任务中兼顾速度与安全性，并对指令执行与规划等场景具备潜在应用。

items.title_en: Commenting and approving pull requests
items.title_zh: 评论和批准拉取请求
items.summary_en: Offers guidance on constructive code reviews: how to craft helpful comments, when to approve, and strategies to minimize review bottlenecks. Emphasizes respectful tone, actionable feedback, and aligning PRs with project goals.
items.summary_zh: 提供對程式碼審查的實用建議：如何給出有用的評論、何時批准，以及減少審查瓶頸的策略。強調禮貌、可執行的回饋，以及確保拉取請求符合專案目標。

items.title_en: U.S. banks may soon collect citizenship data from customers
items.title_zh: 美国银行或将开始收集客户公民身份信息
items.summary_en: US banks may start collecting citizenship data from customers, raising privacy concerns and regulatory questions about how this data is used and stored.
items.summary_zh: 美国银行可能开始向客户收集公民身份信息，引发隐私与监管问题，关注数据如何使用与存储。

items.title_en: Plants can sense the sound of rain, a new study finds
items.title_zh: 植物能感知雨声，一项新研究发现
items.summary_en: New research suggests plants can sense rain sounds, pointing to broader sensory capabilities in flora and potential implications for agriculture and plant science.
items.summary_zh: 新研究表明植物能够感知雨声，揭示植物可能具备更广泛的感知能力，并对农业与植物科学具有潜在启示。

items.title_en: Bring Your Agent to Teams
items.title_zh: 将你的代理带入 Teams
items.summary_en: Microsoft's Teams SDK now supports bringing your own agent into Teams, enabling AI-driven workflows and automated interactions inside channels and chats. The move foreshadows richer, agent-powered collaboration features and opens opportunities for developers to integrate custom assistants.
items.summary_zh: 微软 Teams SDK 现支持将自有代理带入 Teams，实现 AI 驱动的工作流和聊天中的自动化交互。这一举措预示着更丰富的智能协作功能，并为开发者提供了集成自定义助手的新机会。

items.title_en: California has more money than projected after admin miscalculated state budget
items.title_zh: 加州预算因行政计算失误而多出资金
items.summary_en: California revises its budget upward after an administration miscalculation, freeing additional funds for spending, debt management, or tax relief. The episode highlights how budgeting errors can ripple through state finances and policy planning.
items.summary_zh: 加州在行政预算计算失误后上调预算，释放更多资金用于支出、债务管理或减税等用途。这一事件凸显了预算误差对州财政与政策规划的连锁影响。

items.title_en: Zero-Copy Pages in Rust: Or How I Learned to Stop Worrying and Love Lifetimes
items.title_zh: Rust中的零拷贝页：从生命周期中解放出来
items.summary_en: A deep dive into implementing zero-copy pages in Rust, showing how careful lifetime and borrow management can avoid data copies in database-like workloads. The piece illustrates Rust techniques for safe, high-throughput memory layouts and the trade-offs involved.
items.summary_zh: 文章深入探讨在Rust中实现零拷贝页的技巧，展示如何通过小心的生命周期与借用管理避免数据拷贝，从而提升数据库等工作负载的吞吐率。还讨论了这种做法的权衡与安全性。

items.title_en: CSS as a Query Language
items.title_zh: 将 CSS 当作查询语言
items.summary_en: Proposes using CSS selectors as a formal query language for data extraction from HTML, highlighting how pattern matching with CSS can power scraping and data mining with a familiar syntax. The idea emphasizes declarative, browser-native querying.
items.summary_zh: 提出用 CSS 选择器作为对 HTML 进行数据提取的查询语言，展示用熟悉语法实现模式匹配、网页抓取和数据挖掘的潜力，强调声明式、浏览器原生的查询方式。

items.title_en: Optimizing Datalog for the GPU
items.title_zh: 在 GPU 上优化 Datalog
items.summary_en: A research paper detailing methods to map Datalog queries to GPU architectures, achieving parallel dataflow and speedups for logic programming workloads. It highlights the feasibility of GPU acceleration for deductive databases and potential uses in big data reasoning.
items.summary_zh: 论文介绍将 Datalog 查询映射到 GPU 架构的方法，通过并行数据流实现对逻辑编程工作负载的加速，展示在推理型数据库和大数据场景中使用 GPU 的可行性与潜在应用。

items.title_en: Jumping into cold water can stop your heart
items.title_zh: 跳入冷水可能使心脏停跳
items.summary_en: Cold-water immersion can trigger dangerous cardiac responses, especially within the first sixty seconds. The piece explains the physiology of cold shock and offers safety considerations for cold-water exposure.
items.summary_zh: 跳入冷水可能引发危险的心脏反应，尤其是在最初的几秒钟内。文中解释了冷水冲击的生理机制，并给出涉水安全建议。

items.title_en: When the cheap one is the cool one
items.title_zh: 便宜才酷：便宜也能精彩
items.summary_en: Argues that affordable hardware or services often deliver better value and design elegance than premium options, challenging consumer tech narratives. The piece looks at where price-performance tradeoffs outperform prestige brands and what this means for builders.
items.summary_zh: 主张经济实惠的硬件或服务往往提供更高性价比和更巧妙的设计，挑战了对豪华品牌的偏见。文章分析何时价格/性能的权衡超过品牌溢价，以及这对开发者意味着什么。

items.title_en: A quick look at Mythos run on Firefox: too much hype?
items.title_zh: Firefox 上 Mythos 的快速观察：炒作是否过头？
items.summary_en: A quick look at Mythos on Firefox casts doubt on the hype, highlighting gaps between promised capabilities and early real-world performance.
items.summary_zh: 对 Mythos 在 Firefox 上的快速评测显示，宣传与实际表现之间存在差距，质疑 hype 的说法。

items.title_en: I wrote a CHIP-8 emulator in my own programming language
items.title_zh: 我用自己的编程语言写了一个 CHIP-8 仿真器
items.summary_en: A CHIP-8 emulator was implemented using a self-made programming language, illustrating how language design can simplify implementing classic VM targets. The project demonstrates portability and the educational value of building language ecosystems around small, approachable targets. It offers a tangible example of how language features can map neatly to a simple emulator.
items.summary_zh: 作者用自创的编程语言实现了 CHIP-8 仿真器，展示了语言设计如何让实现简洁直观。此类练手项目有助于理解指令集、虚拟机实现与跨平台移植的要点。

items.title_en: Iran claims US exploited networking equipment backdoors during strikes
items.title_zh: 伊朗称美国在袭击中利用网络设备后门
items.summary_en: Iran alleges the US exploited backdoors in networking gear during strikes to conduct surveillance or disrupt communications. The claim underscores ongoing cyber security tensions and the importance of supply-chain resilience.
items.summary_zh: 伊朗声称在军事打击中美国利用网络设备的后门进行监视或干扰通信，凸显网络安全紧张局势与供应链韧性的重要性。

items.title_en: The Palantir's Stasi Protocols
items.title_zh: 帕兰蒂尔的斯塔西协议
items.summary_en: Critiques Palantir's data practices as reminiscent of Stasi-era protocols, raising concerns about surveillance, civil liberties, and accountability in data-driven software.
items.summary_zh: 批评 Palantir 的数据实践被比作斯塔西式协议，提出对监控、公民自由与问责的关切，尤其在数据驱动的软件环境下。

items.title_en: I spent years trying to make CSS states predictable
items.title_zh: CSS 状态可预测性探索
items.summary_en: I spent years trying to make CSS states predictable.
items.summary_zh: 作者指出 CSS 状态管理长期充满挑战，难以预测 UI 行为。文中给出模式、工具与思维模型，帮助开发者更好地控制状态变化。

items.title_en: Types and Neural Networks
items.title_zh: 类型与神经网络
items.summary_en: Types and Neural Networks debates how type systems and formalisms influence neural network design and ML practice. The post argues for explicit typing to improve safety, composability, and interpretability in ML models.
items.summary_zh: 《Types and Neural Networks》探讨类型系统如何影响神经网络的设计与机器学习实践。文中倡导显性类型以提升 ML 模型的安全性、组合性与可解释性。

items.title_en: What if database branching was easy?
items.title_zh: 如果数据库分支变得容易？
items.summary_en: Xata proposes making database branching easy to support experimentation without disrupting production data, potentially lowering risk for data science workflows.
items.summary_zh: Xata 提出让数据库分支更易用，以在不干扰生产数据的情况下进行实验，降低数据科学工作流的风险。

items.title_en: Redesigning the Recurse Center application to inspire curious programmers
items.title_zh: 重新设计 Recurse Center 的申请，激发好奇程序员
items.summary_en: Recurse Center redesigned its application to minimize credential bias and emphasize curiosity and learning potential. The update includes new prompts and evaluation criteria intended to surface creative problem solvers rather than résumés.
items.summary_zh: Recurse Center 重新设计申请流程，减弱对资历的依赖，强调好奇心与学习潜力。新流程引入新的问题和评估标准，旨在发现具备创造性解决问题能力的申请者。

items.title_en: ML supports existence of unrecognized transient astronomical phenomena
items.title_zh: 机器学习支持未被识别的瞬变天文现象的存在
items.summary_en: Machine learning models help identify transient astronomical events that are not cataloged, enabling discovery of rare phenomena and expanding observational capabilities.
items.summary_zh: 机器学习模型有助于识别尚未被编目、但可能存在的瞬变天文事件，推动发现稀有天体现象并扩展观测能力。

items.title_en: Chernobyl wildlife forty years on
items.title_zh: 切尔诺贝利四十年：野生动物的现状
items.summary_en: Forty years after the disaster, wildlife in and around Chernobyl demonstrates resilience and ecological shifts, offering nuanced insights into radiation's long-term ecological effects.
items.summary_zh: 切尔诺贝利灾难四十年后，区域内外的野生动物展现出韧性与生态变迁，为放射性长期影响提供了更细致的解读。

items.title_en: Claude Code Removed from $20-a-Month "Pro" Subscription for New Users
items.title_zh: Claude Code 将从 Pro 计划中移除？
items.summary_en: Anthropic appears to remove Claude Code from the Pro plan for new users, signaling a change in feature availability and pricing for code-generation. Existing customers may experience shifts in access or cost for that capability.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 似乎将新用户的 Pro 计划中的 Claude Code 移除，标志着功能与定价策略的调整。现有用户在该功能的可用性与成本方面可能会有所变化。

items.title_en: Verus is a tool for verifying the correctness of code written in Rust
items.title_zh: Verus：用于验证 Rust 代码正确性的工具
items.summary_en: Verus is a Rust verification framework that enables proving correctness properties of Rust programs, integrating formal methods with the Rust toolchain. It shows how rigorous proofs can coexist with practical Rust development.
items.summary_zh: Verus 是一个 Rust 验证框架，支持对 Rust 程序的正确性属性进行形式化证明，并与 Rust 工具链结合，展示形式化方法在实际开发中的应用潜力。

items.title_en: Tesla discloses $2B AI hardware company acquisition in filing
items.title_zh: 特斯拉披露20亿美元收购AI硬件公司
items.summary_en: Tesla disclosed a $2B acquisition of an AI hardware company in its latest filing, signaling a push to vertically integrate AI hardware for autonomous systems and energy products.
items.summary_zh: 特斯拉在最新披露中宣布以20亿美元收购一家 AI 硬件公司，标志着其在自主系统与能源产品上的 AI 硬件垂直整合策略。

items.title_en: Show HN: Ctx – a /resume that works across Claude Code and Codex
items.title_zh: Show HN：Ctx——一个可在 Claude Code 与 Codex 之间工作的简历工具
items.summary_en: Ctx is a Show HN project for a /resume that works across Claude Code and Codex, enabling a consistent resume workflow across multiple AI assistants. It reduces friction when moving between LLMs and demonstrates how cross-ecosystem tooling can streamline career documents. A practical example of multi-LLM tooling.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：Ctx 是一个在 Claude Code 与 Codex 之间可使用的 /resume 工具，使跨多大语言模型的简历工作流保持一致，降低在不同 AI 助手之间切换的摩擦。它展示了跨生态系统工具如何简化职业文档的编写与维护。

items.title_en: Reverse Engineering ME2's USB with a Heat Gun and a Knife
items.title_zh: 通过热风枪和刀具对 ME2 的 USB 进行逆向工程
items.summary_en: A writeup details reverse engineering the ME2 device's USB interface using simple tools like a heat gun and a knife. The approach highlights practical hardware-hacking techniques and the kinds of insights you can gain from low-cost teardown experiments.
items.summary_zh: 通过热风枪和刀具对 ME2 的 USB 进行逆向工程，展示了用基礎工具进行硬件分析的做法。此类拆解强调了低成本实验的可行性以及从中提取的设计线索。

items.title_en: Slava's Monoid Zoo
items.title_zh: 斯拉瓦的幺半群动物园
items.summary_en: Slava’s Monoid Zoo collects monoid examples used to illustrate algebraic ideas and programming patterns. It serves as a handy quick-reference for mathematicians and developers exploring the algebra of composition and effects.
items.summary_zh: 斯拉瓦的幺半群动物园收集了大量幺半群示例，用于阐释代数思想和编程范式。对于研究代数结构与组合运算的程序员和数学家来说，是一个便捷的速查参考。

items.title_en: Writing string.h functions using string instructions in asm x86-64 (2025)
items.title_zh: 在 x86-64 汇编中使用字符串指令编写 string.h 函数
items.summary_en: A write-up demonstrates implementing common string.h routines in x86-64 using string instructions to squeeze extra performance, highlighting micro-optimizations and the care needed to avoid pitfalls. It shows how low-level hand-optimized code can complement modern compiler optimizations. A practical read for systems programmers chasing micro-ops gains.
items.summary_zh: 文档展示了在 x86-64 汇编中利用字符串指令实现 string.h 常用函数，凸显微优化与避免坑点的要点。该内容说明手工优化的低级代码如何与现代编译器优化共存。对追求微优化的系统程序员具有实用价值。

items.title_en: CC-Canary: Detect early signs of regressions in Claude Code
items.title_zh: CC-Canary：在 Claude Code 中检测回归的早期信号
items.summary_en: CC-Canary is a Canary-like tool to detect early signs of regressions in Claude Code, helping maintain model quality and catch drift before it harms users.
items.summary_zh: CC-Canary 是一个用于在 Claude Code 中发现回归早期信号的工具，有助于维持模型质量并在问题显现前捕捉漂移。

items.title_en: Physicists revive 1990s laser concept to propose a next-generation atomic clock
items.title_zh: 物理学家复兴 1990 年代激光概念，提出下一代原子钟
items.summary_en: Physicists revived a 1990s laser concept to design a next-generation atomic clock with improved precision and stability. If realized, the clock could enable more accurate timekeeping for GPS, telecommunications, and fundamental physics tests.
items.summary_zh: 物理学家重新提出一项1990年代的激光概念，设计出更高精度和稳定性的下一代原子钟。如果落地，将提升全球定位、通信以及基础物理实验中的时间基准精度。

items.title_en: I spent 6 years building my Kanban as I hated how managers run the boards
items.title_zh: 我花了六年打造自己的看板系统，因为我讨厌管理者管理看板
items.summary_en: A long-form case study of building a personal Kanban tool as a response to manager-driven boards. It highlights friction with traditional Kanban governance and lessons for developer-led workflow tooling.
items.summary_zh: 作者用六年的时间打造自己的看板工具，以回应对传统看板管理的不满。文章揭示了以开发者为中心的工作流工具如何解决治理和协作中的痛点。

items.title_en: 8087 Emulation on 8086 Systems
items.title_zh: 8087 在 8086 系统上的仿真
items.summary_en: Software emulation of the 8087 FPU on 8086 hardware shows how early PCs handled floating-point operations without dedicated hardware. The piece surveys methods used to emulate the FPU, including inline software routines and timing considerations, and reflects on performance trade-offs. This is a nostalgic look at how compatibility was maintained in constrained systems.
items.summary_zh: 在没有硬件 8087 浮点协处理器的 8086 系统上，对 8087 的软实现曾经广泛使用。文章回顾了通过内联软件例程等技术来仿真浮点运算，并讨论了性能与时序的权衡。这也是对在受限环境中实现仿真层的有趣案例，适合对计算机体系结构感兴趣的读者。

items.title_en: Notepad++ for Mac – Independent community port
items.title_zh: Mac 版 Notepad++：独立社区移植
items.summary_en: Details the community-driven port of Notepad++ to macOS, covering compatibility adjustments, performance considerations, and licensing questions. It illustrates how community projects extend classic tools beyond their native ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: 讲述 Notepad++ 面向 macOS 的社区移植项目，涵盖兼容性调整、性能考量和许可问题，展示社区项目如何将经典工具带入新的生态系统。

items.title_en: TurboQuant: A First-Principles Walkthrough
items.title_zh: TurboQuant：基于第一性原理的完整解析
items.summary_en: A deep dive that rebuilds TurboQuant from first principles, stripping away hype to show how its core components fit together and where performance gains can be found. It offers practical guidance on architecture choices, data flow, and optimization strategies for developers. The takeaway is a practical blueprint for engineers evaluating or contributing to similar tooling.
items.summary_zh: 本文从基础原理出发，对 TurboQuant 进行从零到一的分解，揭示核心思想、数据流和组件之间的互动。强调按第一性原理构建、发现优化点，为评估或贡献类似工具的工程师提供实践蓝图。

items.title_en: The Nintendo Switch Switch (2019)
items.title_zh: 任天堂 Switch Switch（2019）
items.summary_en: A brief look at the Nintendo Switch's 2019 variant and its ethernet networking capabilities.
items.summary_zh: 简要回顾 2019 年版任天堂 Switch 的网络特性与设定。

items.title_en: Show HN: Broccoli, one shot coding agent on the cloud
items.title_zh: Show HN： Broccoli，一次性云端编码代理
items.summary_en: Show HN introduces Broccoli, a cloud-based one-shot coding agent that completes a coding task in a single run. It highlights the potential for lightweight, task-specific AI agents that reduce iteration and cloud costs.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 介绍 Broccoli，一款云端的一次性编码代理，能在一次运行中完成编码任务。体现了轻量级、面向任务的 AI 代理减少迭代和云端成本的潜力。

items.title_en: High-Fidelity KV Cache Summarization Using Entropy and Low-Rank Reconstruction
items.title_zh: 高保真键值缓存摘要：基于熵与低秩重建
items.summary_en: A method for summarizing large key-value caches uses entropy measures and low-rank reconstruction to reduce memory while preserving access patterns. It targets high-read, low-latency systems.
items.summary_zh: 通过利用熵度量和低秩重构，对大型键值缓存进行摘要，减少内存占用同时保留访问模式。该方法面向高读负载、低延迟要求的系统。

items.title_en: Her life savings mysteriously disappeared after a systems glitch
items.title_zh: 系统故障后她的全部积蓄神秘消失
items.summary_en: The life savings vanished after a systems glitch, exposing the fragility of automated financial systems and the difficulty of rectifying digital faults. The case highlights the need for stronger consumer protections and robust error-correction processes.
items.summary_zh: 系统故障导致她的全部积蓄神秘消失，暴露了自动化金融系统的脆弱性以及纠错的困难。事件凸显了加强用户保护与健全错误纠正机制的必要性。

items.title_en: Cheating at Tetris
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯方块中的作弊
items.summary_en: The article dissects how players cheat in Tetris and what it reveals about game design, anti-cheat, and the social dynamics of competitive puzzlers. It also reflects on how simple game quirks can expose weaknesses in detection and moderation.
items.summary_zh: 文章分析了《俄罗斯方块》中的作弊方式及其对游戏设计、反作弊与玩家社交动力的启示，揭示检测与治理中的漏洞。

items.title_en: Google Cloud customer wakes up to $18,000 bill despite $7 budget
items.title_zh: Google Cloud 客户设定7美元预算却被收1.8万美元
items.summary_en: A Google Cloud customer woke up to an $18k bill despite a $7 monthly budget after an attacker used a public API key to issue thousands of requests. It underscores the risk of unsecured keys and the need for better budget alerting and key hygiene.
items.summary_zh: 一名 Google Cloud 客户在预算仅为 7 美元的情况下，因公共 API 密钥被滥用、数万次请求而产生 1.8 万美元账单。说明了未保护的密钥风险，并需要改进预算告警与密钥管理。

items.title_en: Which one is more important: more parameters or more computation? (2021)
items.title_zh: 参数更多还是计算更多：哪个更重要？（2021）
items.summary_en: An analysis of the size- vs compute- trade-off in AI shows that more compute can outperform simply increasing model size under certain conditions. The takeaway challenges the notion that scaling parameters is always the best route to better performance.
items.summary_zh: 对 AI 的规模与计算资源之争进行了分析，结果在某些情境下提高计算能力比单纯增大模型参数更有效。结论挑战了‘一味扩展参数即可提升性能’的观点。

items.title_en: People Do Not Yearn for Automation
items.title_zh: 人们并不渴望自动化
items.summary_en: The Verge podcast argues that people do not yearn for automation; instead, they seek control and meaningful work, with AI debates focusing on autonomy, job design, and societal impact.
items.summary_zh: 这一集播客认为人们并不渴望普遍的自动化，而是追求掌控感和有意义的工作。讨论聚焦自动化对工作设计、自主性与社会影响的权衡。

items.title_en: GPT-5.5: Mythos-Like Hacking, Open to All
items.title_zh: GPT-5.5：类似 Mythos 的黑客文化，向所有人开放
items.summary_en: A provocateur stance argues for a Mythos-inspired hacking ethos around GPT-5.5, advocating open access, hands-on experimentation, and community-driven security research. The piece champions lowering barriers so more researchers and enthusiasts can probe, tinker, and improve AI safety and capability.
items.summary_zh: 文章主张在 GPT-5.5 周围建立类似 Mythos 的黑客文化，推动开放获取、动手实验和以社区为驱动的安全研究。强调降低门槛，让更多研究者和爱好者参与 AI 安全与能力提升的探索。

items.title_en: Sloppy Copies
items.title_zh: 马虎的拷贝
items.summary_en: A short note exploring the consequences of sloppy copies, including data duplication and issues with reproducibility.
items.summary_zh: 简要分析拷贝不慎造成的问题，包括数据重复与可重复性问题。

items.title_en: How the Tech World Turned Evil
items.title_zh: 科技世界为何走向邪恶
items.summary_en: A critical examination traces how tech platforms and AI ambitions have reshaped power dynamics, privacy norms, and public discourse, arguing that surveillance capitalism and hubris contributed to a corrosive tech culture. The piece calls for accountability and more humane design choices.
items.summary_zh: 文章从权力、隐私与公共话语的角度，批判性地审视科技平台和 AI 追求如何改变了行业生态。认为监控资本主义与行业自大促成了有害的科技文化，并呼吁问责与更具人性化的设计。

items.title_en: Modern Front end Complexity: essential or accidental?
items.title_zh: 现代前端复杂性：本质需求还是偶然产物？
items.summary_en: Modern Front end Complexity debates whether the complexity is intrinsic to building rich web interfaces or an accidental byproduct of tooling and abstractions. The piece argues that simplifying toolchains could unlock productivity while preserving capability. It prompts engineers to reassess unnecessary abstractions.
items.summary_zh: 现代前端的复杂性到底是构建丰富网页界面的本质还是工具链与抽象带来的副作用？该文认为简化工具链可能释放生产力，同时保留能力，并促使开发者重新评估哪些抽象确实必要。

items.title_en: A printing press for biological data
items.title_zh: 生物数据的印刷机
items.summary_en: A platform described as a 'printing press' for biological data aims to democratize how biology-related information is produced and shared. It promises scalable, reproducible generation of biological data artifacts—think DNA data storage, printed biological records, or lab outputs that can be mass-produced.
items.summary_zh: 一个被称为生物数据印刷机的系统，试图像印刷机一样放大生物数据的生成与传播。它可能实现生物信息的快速、可重复输出和分发，为研究和教育带来更高的可及性。

items.title_en: The Illuminated Man: an unconventional portrait of JG Ballard
items.title_zh: 《照亮的人》：对 J.G. Ballard 的非常规画像
items.summary_en: A hybrid portrait of J.G. Ballard that blends biography, criticism, and fiction to reveal a nontraditional reading of the writer's work and influence. The book challenges conventional life-story framing and emphasizes Ballard’s enduring relevance to technology, media, and modern urbanism.
items.summary_zh: 这本书以传记、评论与虚构混合的形式，给出对球尔德的非常规画像，挑战传统的生平叙事。文本强调 Ballard 对技术、媒介与城市生活的持续影响，重新评估他的文学地位。

items.title_en: Show HN: Atomic – Local-first, AI-augmented personal knowledge base
items.title_zh: Show HN: Atomic——本地优先、AI 增强的个人知识库
items.summary_en: Atomic offers a local-first personal knowledge base augmented by AI, enabling private, on-device indexing and search. It emphasizes offline readiness and user control over data, with AI providing suggestions without sending data to cloud.
items.summary_zh: Atomic 提供本地优先的个人知识库，结合 AI 增强的搜索与整理能力，数据始终在本地设备上。它强调离线可用性与数据控制，AI 给出建议时不需要上传到云端，提升隐私与响应速度。

items.title_en: Chernobyl's last wedding
items.title_zh: 切尔诺贝尔的最后一场婚礼
items.summary_en: A human-interest piece recounting the last wedding near the Chernobyl area, reflecting on memory, resilience, and the enduring footprint of the disaster. It foregrounds personal narratives amid historical tragedy.
items.summary_zh: 回顾在切尔诺贝尔区域举行的最后一场婚礼，关注记忆、韧性以及灾难留下的持续烙印。通过个人叙事揭示历史悲剧中的人性光芒。

items.title_en: Panipat: The rise of the Mughals
items.title_zh: 潘帕特：莫卧儿帝国的崛起
items.summary_en: Historical feature tracing how the Mughal empire rose to power, focusing on Panipat's strategic significance, key leaders, and political shifts that expanded imperial rule. The piece connects military campaigns with governance innovations that helped cement Mughal authority across much of the Indian subcontinent.
items.summary_zh: 本文梳理莫卧儿帝国崛起的歷史脈絡，聚焦潘帕特在地緣與軍事上的重要性、領袖與政治變革如何拓展統治。透過戰事與治理創新的敘述，揭示莫卧兒在印度次大陸建立帝國權威的過程。

items.title_en: AGPLv3§74 Empowers Users to Thwart Badgeware Like OnlyOffice
items.title_zh: AGPLv3 第74条：让用户有能力抵制徽章化软件，如 OnlyOffice
items.summary_en: AGPLv3 Section 74 empowers users to push back against 'badgeware'—excessive branding and tracking in software like OnlyOffice. The post argues this strengthens user rights and free-software norms, potentially reshaping how online services integrate branding.
items.summary_zh: AGPLv3 第74条赋予用户抵制“徽章化”现象的权利，针对像 OnlyOffice 这类软件中过度标识与追踪的问题提供保护。文章认为这加强了用户权利与自由软件准则，或推动线上服务在品牌整合方面的改变。

items.title_en: IPC medley: message-queue peeking, io_uring, and bus1
items.title_zh: IPC 快讯：消息队列窥探、io_uring 与 bus1
items.summary_en: A compact look at IPC topics including message-queue peeking, io_uring-based I/O, and the bus1 interface, illustrating practical approaches to high-performance interprocess communication.
items.summary_zh: 简要聚焦 IPC 主题：消息队列窥探、基于 io_uring 的 I/O 以及 bus1 接口，展示高性能进程间通信的实用做法。

items.title_en: Desmond Morris, 98, Dies; Zoologist Saw Links Between Humans and Apes
items.title_zh: Desmond Morris：98岁逝世，揭示人类与猿猴联系的动物学家
items.summary_en: Desmond Morris, a zoologist and author of The Naked Ape, died at 98. His work framed human behavior as rooted in primate evolution and highlighted continuities with other apes, influencing popular science and our understanding of biology.
items.summary_zh: 动物学家Desmond Morris去世，享年98岁。他的研究将人类行为置于灵长类进化的框架内，强调人与猿猴之间的共性，从而影响了公众对生物学和行为的认知。

items.title_en: Running Bare-Metal Rust Alongside ESP-IDF on the ESP32-S3's Second Core
items.title_zh: 在 ESP32-S3 的第二核心上并行运行裸机 Rust 与 ESP-IDF
items.summary_en: A practical case study demonstrates running Rust bare-metal alongside ESP-IDF on the ESP32-S3’s second core, highlighting how multi-language embedded stacks can co-exist and potentially boost performance.
items.summary_zh: 一个实用案例展示在 ESP32-S3 的第二核心上将裸机 Rust 与 ESP-IDF 并行运行，凸显多语言嵌入式栈的共存与潜在性能提升。

items.title_en: A cache-friendly IPv6 LPM with AVX-512 (linearized B+-tree, real BGP benchmarks)
items.title_zh: 基于 AVX-512 的缓存友好 IPv6 LPM（线性化 B+ 树，真实 BGP 基准测试）
items.summary_en: A cache-friendly IPv6 LPM designed around AVX-512 uses a linearized B+-tree to boost route lookups under real BGP workloads. Benchmarks show meaningful improvements for high-speed routers and network software, with implications for future data-plane design.
items.summary_zh: 基于 AVX-512 的缓存友好 IPv6 LPM 通过线性化 B+ 树提升实际 BGP 工作负载下的路由查找速度。基准测试显示对高带宽路由器和网络软件有显著提升，对未来数据平面设计具有潜在影响。

items.title_en: What's missing in the 'agentic' story: a well-defined user agent role
items.title_zh: “代理性”叙事中的缺失之处：需要明确定义的用户代理角色
items.summary_en: The piece argues that the 'agentic' AI narrative lacks a clearly defined user agent role, clarifying who sets goals, constraints, and responsibility. It calls for organizing agent behavior around explicit user-agent concepts and collective bargaining to manage autonomy and safety.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为当前的“代理性”叙事缺乏对用户代理角色的清晰定义，应该明确谁设定目标与约束、谁承担责任。主张将代理行为构建在拥有明确权利与义务的用户代理框架之上，以更好地管理自治与安全。

items.title_en: Insights into firewood use by early Middle Pleistocene hominins
items.title_zh: 早期中更新世人类对柴火使用的洞见
items.summary_en: New evidence sheds light on how early Middle Pleistocene hominins used firewood, suggesting fire management and cooked foods influenced diet and energy budgets. The findings have implications for social organization and cognitive evolution.
items.summary_zh: 新证据表明早期中更新世人类对柴火有系统性使用，涉及火源管理和烹煮食物。此类活动对能量获取、社会组织与认知演化有重要含义。

items.title_en: FreeBSD Device Drivers Book
items.title_zh: FreeBSD 设备驱动书
items.summary_en: A repository and overview of a FreeBSD device drivers book, covering kernel interfaces, driver architecture, and practical diagnostics. It serves as a structured path for developers getting into FreeBSD kernel development.
items.summary_zh: FreeBSD 设备驱动书的仓库与概览，涵盖内核接口、驱动架构及实际诊断方法，为进入 FreeBSD 内核开发的开发者提供系统化路径。

items.title_en: The end of responsive images
items.title_zh: 响应式图片的终结
items.summary_en: Argues that the classic responsive images paradigm is fading as container queries, per-element sizing, and modern image formats redefine how images are served. The post suggests adopting newer primitives and standards to balance performance with quality.
items.summary_zh: 文中认为传统的响应式图片思路正在消退，因为容器查询等新标准将重新定义图片的加载与显示。提出在实际开发中采用更新的原语和标准，以在性能和画质之间取得平衡。

items.title_en: The Neon King of New Orleans
items.title_zh: 新奥尔良的霓虹王
items.summary_en: A profile of a colorful local figure known as the Neon King who anchors New Orleans' neon-lit nightlife and brand. The piece threads history of signage, design, and street culture to show how a single personality can shape a city's glow and memory.
items.summary_zh: 文章聚焦新奥尔良一位被称为“霓虹王”的人物，如何塑造城市的霓虹夜景与文化形象。通过讲述灯光设计、街头文化与历史，展现个人魅力如何影响城市记忆。

items.title_en: Kuri – Zig based agent-browser alternative
items.title_zh: Kuri——基于 Zig 的代理浏览器替代方案
items.summary_en: Kuri is a Zig-based project offering an agent-style browser alternative, focusing on safety and performance from a systems-programming perspective. It aims to provide a minimal, fast browser-like toolchain with a focus on security and explicit control over resources.
items.summary_zh: Kuri 是一个基于 Zig 的代理浏览器替代方案，强调系统编程中的安全性与性能。它致力于提供一个简洁、快速的浏览器相关工具集，对资源的使用进行明确控制。

items.title_en: MoQ Boy
items.title_zh: MoQ Boy：MoQ 库的一个案例博客
items.summary_en: MoQ Boy showcases a case study around using the MoQ mocking library for .NET, illustrating common patterns, pitfalls, and testing ergonomics through a narrative design.
items.summary_zh: MoQ Boy 以 MoQ 模拟库在 .NET 中的应用为案例，通过叙事化设计展示常用模式、坑点与测试使用的便利性。

items.title_en: XOXO Festival Archive
items.title_zh: XOXO 节档案
items.summary_en: XOXO Festival Archive curates talks and artifacts from the indie tech festival, offering a window into early culture, design experiments, and the community that helped shape modern developer culture.
items.summary_zh: XOXO 节档案整理了独立科技节的演讲与资料，提供了对早期文化、设计实验以及塑造现代开发者文化的社区的洞见。

items.title_en: Zindex – Diagram Infrastructure for Agents
items.title_zh: Zindex：为智能体设计的图表基础设施
items.summary_en: Zindex provides a diagram infrastructure tailored for agents, enabling visual reasoning, planning, and interaction flows within multi-agent systems. By standardizing diagram primitives and tooling, it aims to speed up building, testing, and debugging agent behaviors.
items.summary_zh: Zindex 提供专为智能体设计的图表基础设施，支持多智能体系统中的可视化推理、规划与交互流程。通过对图表原语和工具链的标准化，旨在加速代理行为的设计、测试和调试。

items.title_en: Kasane: New drop-in Kakoune front end with GPU rendering and WASM Plugins
items.title_zh: Kasane：新一代 Kakoune 前端，支持 GPU 渲染与 WASM 插件
items.summary_en: Kasane is a drop-in Kakoune front end with GPU rendering and WASM plugins, aiming to speed up editing and enable extensibility. The project blends hardware acceleration with a modern plugin model to enhance performance and customization. It signals growing interest in high-performance editors.
items.summary_zh: Kasane 是一个可直接替换 Kakoune 前端的实现，支持 GPU 渲染和 WASM 插件，旨在提升编辑性能与扩展性。该项目将硬件加速与现代插件模型结合，提升了性能与可定制性，体现了对高性能文本编辑器的关注增多。

items.title_en: Could a Claude Code routine watch my finances?
items.title_zh: Claude Code 例程会监视我的财务吗？
items.summary_en: A blog post examines whether Claude's Code routine could monitor or infer user finances, highlighting privacy risks and the tension between automation and data exposure.
items.summary_zh: 博文探讨 Claude 的 Code 例程是否可能监视或推断用户的财务信息，强调隐私风险以及自动化与数据暴露之间的矛盾。

items.title_en: Show HN: Kloak, A secret manager that keeps K8s workload away from secrets
items.title_zh: Kloak：把 Kubernetes 工作负载与密钥分离的秘密管理器
items.summary_en: Kloak is a secret manager that keeps Kubernetes workloads away from raw secrets, reducing blast radius if a pod is compromised. It leverages controlled access patterns and encryption boundaries to separate secrets from running workloads, improving security posture.
items.summary_zh: Kloak 是一个秘密管理器，确保 Kubernetes 工作负载无法直接访问敏感密钥，从而降低容器被入侵时的影响。它通过受控访问模式和加密边界实现秘密与运行时的分离，提升安全性。

items.title_en: The great Scouse pasty war
items.title_zh: 伟大的斯卡斯馅饼之争
items.summary_en: A look at a local food quarrel in Liverpool around who makes the best Scouse pasty, highlighting how regional food debates reflect identity and community humor. The piece weaves history and everyday life to show how a pastry feud encodes local culture.
items.summary_zh: 利物浦本地美食话题：关于谁做的斯卡斯馅饼更正宗的辩论，折射出地区文化认同与社区幽默。文章梳理历史背景、商家观点与日常生活场景。

items.title_en: HEALPix
items.title_zh: HEALPix：球面均等像素网格
items.summary_en: HEALPix is a spherical pixelization scheme that partitions the sky into equal-area, iso-latitude pixels, enabling efficient storage and analysis of astronomical maps. It’s widely used for CMB and other all-sky surveys, supporting hierarchical refinement and fast transforms.
items.summary_zh: HEALPix 是一种把球面划分为等面积像素的网格方法，具备等纬度特性，便于天球图像的存储和分析。在宇宙学和天文观测地图处理中被广泛使用，支持分层细化和快速变换。

items.title_en: GitHub Merge Queue Silently Reverted Code
items.title_zh: GitHub 合并队列悄然回滚代码
items.summary_en: A GitHub Merge Queue incident silently reverted code, interrupting merges and deployments for affected projects. The episode illustrates the fragility of automated pipelines and the need for visible safeguards and reliable rollback mechanisms.
items.summary_zh: GitHub 合并队列发生了悄无声息地回滚代码的事件，干扰了相关项目的合并与部署。此事凸显自动化流水线的脆弱性，以及对可见性和可靠回滚机制的需求。

items.title_en: Why Musicians Are Manufacturing Sold-Out Shows
items.title_zh: 音乐人为何在制造‘售罄’演出
items.summary_en: Bands deploy pre-sales, venue strategies, and media polish to manufacture sold-out shows, shaping perceived demand and maximizing revenue via scarcity effects.
items.summary_zh: 乐队通过预售、场馆策略和形象包装来“制造”售罄效应，借助稀缺性提升需求感和收入潜力。

items.title_en: A Collection of Chronic Medical Conditions Common in Autistic and ADHD Adults [pdf] (2023)
items.title_zh: 成年自闭症与 ADHD 患者常见慢性疾病指南（2023）
items.summary_en: A 2023 clinician guide consolidates chronic conditions commonly found in autistic and ADHD adults, emphasizing integrated care and awareness of co-morbidity. It highlights conditions like sleep disorders, anxiety, and GI issues, with guidance for holistic management.
items.summary_zh: 2023年的临床指南汇总了成年自闭症和 ADHD 患者中常见的慢性疾病，强调需要综合照护并关注共病。内容涵盖睡眠障碍、焦虑、胃肠问题等，并提供整体管理的建议。

items.title_en: The Prompt API
items.title_zh: 提示 API
items.summary_en: Chrome's Prompt API defines a standardized way for apps to collect and manage prompts for AI features, aiming to simplify integration and improve user privacy controls. The post outlines typical usage patterns and what this means for developers building AI assistants in the browser. It signals a shift toward more uniform AI integration.
items.summary_zh: Chrome 的提示 API 为应用收集和管理 AI 提示提供了标准化接口，简化集成并强化用户隐私控制。文中概述了常见的使用模式，以及这对在浏览器中构建 AI 助手的开发者意味着什么，标志着 AI 集成趋于统一。

items.title_en: QNX on the Commodore 900 – Raiders of the lost hard drive [video] (2025)
items.title_zh: Commodore 900 上的 QNX——迷失硬盘的寻踪 [视频]
items.summary_en: A retro-computing demonstration ports QNX to the Commodore 900, showcasing how modern OS concepts can run on vintage hardware. The video offers a glimpse into hardware-software porting, bootstrapping challenges, and community curiosity around legacy machines.
items.summary_zh: 该视频演示在 Commodore 900 上移植 QNX，展示了把现代操作系统理念应用到老硬件上的可行性。内容涉及端口、引导与维护老机的挑战，以及社区对遗留设备的兴趣。

items.title_en: Show HN: Daemons – we pivoted from building agents to cleaning up after them
items.title_zh: Show HN：Daemons——我们从构建代理转向为它们清理
items.summary_en: Daemons pivots from building agents to cleaning up after them, shifting focus to maintenance and governance of automated systems. The pivot reflects broader reliability and safety considerations in AI and automation projects. It presents a practical angle on building sustainable automation ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: Daemons 将焦点从构建代理转向为代理进行清理，转而关注自动化系统的维护与治理。此转变体现了在 AI 与自动化项目中对可靠性与安全性的更广泛关注，提供了构建可持续自动化生态的实际视角。

items.title_en: The Long Reply
items.title_zh: 长回复
items.summary_en: An essay about the virtue of long-form replies in online discourse, arguing they foster clearer thinking and more helpful guidance. It offers practical tips for writing thorough, considerate responses.
items.summary_zh: 这篇反思文章讨论在线讨论中长篇回复的价值与写作要点，主张透彻的论述胜过速评，有助于更清晰的思考与更有价值的回答，并给出写作建议。

items.title_en: The fastest Linux timestamps
items.title_zh: Linux 时间戳之最速
items.summary_en: Explores high-precision timestamps in Linux, including options like monotonic clocks and their performance tradeoffs. The piece helps developers pick the right clock source for latency-sensitive applications.
items.summary_zh: 探讨 Linux 的高精度时间戳选项（如单调时钟）及其性能权衡，帮助开发者为对延迟敏感的应用选择合适的时钟源。

items.title_en: My practitioner view of program analysis
items.title_zh: 程序分析的从业者视角
items.summary_en: The practitioner’s view on program analysis argues for pragmatic, field-tested approaches over purely theoretical methods, acknowledging real-world constraints and toolchain realities. It emphasizes balancing soundness with scalability and usefulness in industry settings.
items.summary_zh: 作者以从业者视角讨论程序分析，主张在现实约束与现有工具链中采用务实的方法，而非纯理论。强调在可靠性、可扩展性和实用性之间取得平衡，以适应实际工业环境。

items.title_en: Year of the IPv6 Overlay Network
items.title_zh: IPv6 覆盖网络之年
items.summary_en: Year of the IPv6 Overlay Network argues that overlay networking based on IPv6 is finally reaching critical mass, enabling scalable, addressable networks without NAT.
items.summary_zh: 《IPv6 覆盖网络之年》认为基于 IPv6 的覆盖网络正在成熟，能实现无 NAT 的可扩展网络。文章探讨对隐私、路由及未来互联网架构的影响。

items.title_en: macOS 27 won’t be supporting Intel anymore
items.title_zh: macOS 27 将停止对 Intel 的支持
items.summary_en: Apple confirms macOS 27 will drop Intel support, accelerating the transition to Apple Silicon and impacting developers with legacy apps.
items.summary_zh: 苹果确认 macOS 27 将停止对 Intel 的支持，加速向 Apple Silicon 的过渡，影响开发者与遗留应用。

items.title_en: Oxford All Souls College General Examination (2025) [pdf]
items.title_zh: 牛津All Souls学院2025年通用考试（PDF）
items.summary_en: Oxford All Souls General Examination 2025 PDF provides the exam framework and sample questions for the college's famously challenging general papers. The document offers a glimpse into the expectations for candidates pursuing research-level scholarship.
items.summary_zh: 牛津 All Souls 学院 2025 年通用考试的 PDF 展示了考试框架和常用题型，反映该学院对研究性学术的高度要求。该文件让人一窥考生应对高深学术考核的预期。

items.title_en: Approximating Hyperbolic Tangent
items.title_zh: 近似双曲正切函数（tanh）的实现方法
items.summary_en: It surveys common approximations and their precision-speed trade-offs.
items.summary_zh: 文章介绍在高性能场景下近似双曲正切函数的实用方法，评估不同近似在精度与速度上的取舍，提供可直接应用的实现思路。

items.title_en: OpenAI: Workspace Agents for Business
items.title_zh: OpenAI 面向企业的工作区代理
items.summary_en: OpenAI announces Workspace Agents aimed at business contexts, letting teams deploy agents that act across apps to automate workflows. It signals a push toward enterprise automation, with governance and data-access considerations.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出面向企业的工作区代理，允许团队在跨应用场景中部署代理以自动化工作流。代表企业级自动化的推进，同时需要关注治理与数据访问等要点。

items.title_en: Prefill-as-a-Service:KVCache of Next-Generation Models Could Go Cross-Datacenter
items.title_zh: 预填充即服务：下一代模型的KV缓存或将跨数据中心
items.summary_en: The paper proposes a cross-datacenter KV cache for model prefill, enabling faster cold-start and consistent latency across regions for next-gen models. It discusses architecture trade-offs, consistency, and potential cost implications.
items.summary_zh: 论文提出了一个跨数据中心的 KV 缓存用于模型预填充，提升新一代模型的冷启动速度和跨区域的一致性延迟。讨论了架构权衡、一致性以及潜在的成本影响。

items.title_en: $8800 house design helps prevent fatal diseases in African children
items.title_zh: 8800 美元房屋设计有助于预防非洲儿童致命疾病
items.summary_en: An affordable housing design around $8,800 focuses on ventilation, lighting, and sanitation to reduce disease exposure in African children, potentially lowering fatal disease risk. The concept demonstrates how low-cost architecture can improve health outcomes.
items.summary_zh: 一款约 8800 美元的低成本房屋设计，着重于通风、光照与卫生条件，以降低非洲儿童暴露于疾病的风险，可能有助于减少致命疾病的发生。该概念展示了低成本建筑如何改善健康结果。

items.title_en: Colorado River disappeared record for 5M years: now we know where it was
items.title_zh: 五百万年前消失的科罗拉多河：如今揭示它的曾经位置
items.summary_en: Geologists reconstruct where the Colorado River flowed over 5 million years, revealing the river's route as it vanished from the landscape. The work uses sedimentology and basin analyses to map ancient drainage patterns. It enriches our understanding of regional geology and landscape evolution.
items.summary_zh: 地质学家追踪五百万年前科罗拉多河的河道走向，揭示了它在地表消失前的路线。研究通过沉积学和盆地分析重建了古河道分布，拓展了对区域地质与地貌演化的理解。

items.title_en: Show HN: A working reference implementation of context engineering
items.title_zh: Show HN：一个可工作的上下文工程参考实现
items.summary_en: Showcase of a working reference implementation for context engineering in prompts, focusing on managing context, chunking, and retrieval to improve robustness of AI assistants.
items.summary_zh: 展示一个可运行的上下文工程参考实现，聚焦于提示上下文的管理、分块与检索等能力，帮助构建更稳健的 AI 助手。

items.title_en: A Man Who Invented the Future
items.title_zh: 一个发明未来的人
items.summary_en: An insightful portrait of a historical figure whose ideas anticipated the modern tech world, blending biography with reflections on innovation, ethics, and societal impact. The piece draws connections between early breakthroughs and today’s digital landscape, asking what it means to shape the future.
items.summary_zh: 透過對在歷史上被認為『發明未來』人物的生平與思想進行剖析，揭示其創見如何預示當代科技格局以及對倫理與社會影響的思考。文章將早期突破與今日數位生態系統聯繫起來，探討塑造未來的意義。

items.title_en: EvanFlow – A TDD driven feedback loop for Claude Code
items.title_zh: EvanFlow：面向 Claude Code 的测试驱动开发反馈循环
items.summary_en: EvanFlow uses TDD to drive feedback loop for Claude Code, enabling automated tests and regression checks. This approach helps steer prompt engineering and improve reliability of AI-generated code. It demonstrates how short, repeatable tests can guide model usage effectively.
items.summary_zh: EvanFlow 通过测试驱动开发推动 Claude Code 的反馈循环，支持自动化测试与回归检查。这种方法有助于引导提示工程并提升 AI 产出代码的可靠性，展示了如何用短小、可重复的测试来有效引导模型使用。

items.title_en: If more than 50% press blue, everyone survives. Red pressers always survive
items.title_zh: 如果超过一半人按蓝色按钮，大家都能生存；按红色的人总能生存
items.summary_en: A thought-provoking thought experiment explores how collective action and signaling affect survival in a stylized scenario, revealing surprising dynamics around coordination and information flow.
items.summary_zh: 一个发人深省的思维实验，探讨在一个极 simplified 场景中，集体行动与信号传递如何影响生存概率，揭示协作与信息流动的出人意料的动态。

items.title_en: Larry Tesler: A Personal History of Modeless Text Editing and Cut/Copy-Paste (2012)
items.title_zh: Larry Tesler：无模文本编辑与剪切/复制粘贴的个人史
items.summary_en: A personal history of modeless text editing and the birth of cut/copy-paste, highlighting early UI decisions that shaped modern editing workflows. It offers lessons on how simple design choices can have lasting impact.
items.summary_zh: 关于无模文本编辑、以及剪切/复制粘贴的个人历史，回顾早期 UI 如何改变了现代编辑工作流。揭示简单设计决策的深远影响。

items.title_en: APL is more French than English
items.title_zh: APL 比英语更偏向法语
items.summary_en: The piece revisits APL's cultural lineage, arguing that its history and usage are more rooted in French-speaking communities than English-speaking ones. It sheds light on the sociolinguistic aspects of programming language ecosystems and how design decisions propagate.
items.summary_zh: 文章追溯 APL 的文化脉络，认为其历史与使用更深植于法语社群而非英语世界。它揭示了编程语言生态中语言和地区文化的影响，以及设计选择如何在社区中流传。

items.title_en: Advanced Packaging Limits Come into Focus
items.title_zh: 高级封装极限开始显现
items.summary_en: The industry is turning its attention to the limits of advanced packaging, including 3D-IC integration, thermal constraints, and interconnect bottlenecks. These limits affect yield, cost, and performance, prompting material and process innovations to push Moore’s law in new directions.
items.summary_zh: 业界开始聚焦高级封装的极限，包括3D-IC 整合、热管理与互连瓶颈。这些限制影响良率、成本与性能，正推动材料与工艺创新，将摩尔定律推向新的发展方向。

items.title_en: Tim Cook Stepping Down
items.title_zh: 蒂姆·库克将卸任
items.summary_en: Tim Cook is stepping down as Apple CEO, with leadership transition underway. The report notes that John Ternus is slated to take the helm, signaling a generational shift. The move could influence Apple’s strategic priorities and culture as the company navigates future product cycles and competitive pressures.
items.summary_zh: 蒂姆·库克将卸任苹果公司 CEO，领导层正在进行交接。据称约翰·特诺斯将接任，这标志着代际转型。此举可能在未来的产品路线和企业文化上对苹果产生影响。

items.title_en: Reverse-engineering infrared-based electronic shelf labels
items.title_zh: 逆向工程基于红外的电子货架标签
items.summary_en: Reverse-engineering infrared-based electronic shelf labels exposes how these labels operate and where the security weaknesses lie. The work uncovers protocols and IR schemes used, informing security researchers and retailers about potential spoofing, eavesdropping, or denial-of-service risks.
items.summary_zh: 揭示基于红外的电子货架标签的工作原理及潜在安全弱点。分析了它们所用的协议与红外方案，为安全研究人员和零售商提供警示，涉及潜在的欺骗、窃听或拒绝服务风险。

items.title_en: Show HN: Tiao, A two-player turn-based board game
items.title_zh: Show HN：Tiao，一款双人回合制棋盘游戏
items.summary_en: Introducing Tiao, a new two-player turn-based board game with online play and potential AI opponents. The project highlights approachable game design and opportunities for algorithmic competition.
items.summary_zh: 推出新作 Tiao，一款双人回合制棋盘游戏，支持线上对战并可能有 AI 对手。该项目聚焦易上手的游戏设计与潜在的算法对战机会。

items.title_en: Tell HN: Claude 4.7 is ignoring stop hooks
items.title_zh: Claude 4.7 忽略停止钩子
items.summary_en: A user reports that Claude 4.7 ignores stop hooks, bypassing safety and content controls in interactive prompts. This raises concerns about policy enforcement and reliability for developers integrating Claude into apps.
items.summary_zh: 用户反馈称 Claude 4.7 会忽略停止钩子，绕过对话中的安全控制。这表现出在将 Claude 集成到应用中时，对策略执行与可靠性的一些担忧。

items.title_en: Ben Lerner's Big Feelings
items.title_zh: 本·勒纳的强烈情感
items.summary_en: Ben Lerner discusses how strong emotions drive his writing, linking intimate moments to the craft of language. The interview highlights his approach to form, voice, and the inside/outside balance of a public writer.
items.summary_zh: 本·勒纳谈及强烈情感如何推动写作，将亲密时刻与语言技艺联系起来。访谈聚焦他在形式、声音以及公众人物身份之间的张力与平衡的做法。

items.title_en: Knitout and Kniterate 3
items.title_zh: Knitout 与 Kniterate 3
items.summary_en: A hands-on look at Knitout and Kniterate 3, two tools for programmable knitting, showing how updates affect usability and fabric outcomes.
items.summary_zh: 聚焦可编程织造工具 Knitout 与 Kniterate 3 的应用更新，展示改动如何提升易用性与织物效果，涵盖工作流程改进、图案传输，以及硬件与软件的协同。

items.title_en: Anker made its own chip to bring AI to all its products
items.title_zh: 安克自研芯片让 AI 覆盖所有产品
items.summary_en: Anker unveiled a custom AI chip to enable on-device AI across its product line, enabling faster, private features without relying on cloud inference. It signals a broader shift to edge AI in consumer electronics.
items.summary_zh: 安克公布自研 AI 芯片，使其产品线具备本地化 AI 功能，提升速度和隐私，降低对云端推理的依赖。这体现了消费电子领域向边缘 AI 的趋势。

items.title_en: The Overtom Chess Computer Museum
items.title_zh: Overtom 国际象棋计算机博物馆
items.summary_en: The museum showcases the history of chess computers, preserving early hardware and software, and illustrating how algorithmic approaches evolved from brute-force to specialized hardware and AI.
items.summary_zh: 该博物馆展示国际象棋计算机的历史，保存早期硬件与软件，展示从暴力穷举到专用硬件和人工智能的算法演进。

items.title_en: Orinoco: Young Generation Garbage Collection
items.title_zh: Orinoco：年轻代垃圾回收
items.summary_en: Orinoco introduces a parallel scavenger for the young generation in V8, enabling faster GC pauses and higher throughput for JavaScript workloads.
items.summary_zh: Orinoco 为 V8 引入年轻代并行清理器，使 JavaScript 工作负载在垃圾回收时的暂停更短、吞吐更高。

items.title_en: Hot-wiring the Lisp machine
items.title_zh: 热连 Lisp 机：动手改造早期 Lisp 机器
items.summary_en: A hands-on exploration of reviving or modifying a Lisp machine, a historic Lisp-oriented computer. Discusses hardware hacks, OS considerations, and lessons for retrocomputing enthusiasts.
items.summary_zh: 介绍对 Lisp 机器的复兴或改造，聚焦硬件改装、操作系统以及在复古计算社群中的实践经验。

items.title_en: Meta to start capturing employee mouse movement, keystrokes for AI training data
items.title_zh: Meta 将开始捕获员工鼠标移动与按键用于 AI 训练数据
items.summary_en: Meta plans to start capturing employee mouse movements and keystrokes for AI training data, raising workplace privacy concerns and governance questions. The policy could influence enterprise data practices and worker autonomy across tech firms. It spotlights the tension between improving AI capabilities and protecting user privacy.
items.summary_zh: Meta 将开始收集员工鼠标移动和按键以用于 AI 训练数据，引发对职场隐私与治理的担忧。此举可能影响科技公司层面的数据实践与员工自治权，凸显提升 AI 能力与保护隐私之间的矛盾。

items.title_en: Show HN: Holos – QEMU/KVM with a compose-style YAML, GPUs and health checks
items.title_zh: Show HN: Holos——使用类似 compose 的 YAML、GPU 与健康检查的 QEMU/KVM
items.summary_en: Holos introduces a compose-like declarative YAML for configuring QEMU/KVM deployments, including GPU passthrough and health checks. It aims to simplify complex virtualization setups and improve reliability through automated validation.
items.summary_zh: Holos 引入类似 compose 的 YAML 声明式配置来管理 QEMU/KVM 虚拟化环境，支持 GPU 直通和健康检查。目标是简化复杂的虚拟化部署并通过自动化校验提高可靠性。

items.title_en: AI chatbots could be making you stupider
items.title_zh: AI 聊天机器人可能让你变得更愚蠢
items.summary_en: BBC Future warns that AI chatbots could erode critical thinking and memory, urging design and literacy strategies to keep minds sharp. It emphasizes balancing convenience with cognitive skills.
items.summary_zh: BBC 未来专栏警示 AI 聊天机器人可能削弱批判性思维与记忆力，呼吁通过设计与数字素养策略维持认知能力。强调在便利性与认知技能之间寻求平衡。

items.title_en: Rediscovering the Handcart
items.title_zh: 重新发现手推车
items.summary_en: A deep dive into the handcart, showing how a simple, human-powered transport tool can inform discussions about energy, climate, and resilient design. The piece reflects on how low-tech approaches can complement modern systems.
items.summary_zh: 文章重新审视手推车这种简单的人力运输工具，探讨其在能源、气候与韧性设计方面的启示。指出低科技方法可以在现代系统中发挥互补作用。

items.title_en: Leonardo, Borgia, and Machiavelli: A Fateful Collusion
items.title_zh: 列奥纳多、波吉亚与马基雅维利：一次命运般的勾结
items.summary_en: A historical look at how Leonardo, the Borgia faction, and Machiavelli intersected to shape Renaissance politics and art.
items.summary_zh: 本文梳理了列奥纳多、波吉亚家族与马基雅维利之间错综复杂的关系，以及它们如何塑造文艺复兴时期的政治与艺术。通过分析赞助、策略与权力博弈，揭示关键文化转折背后的动因。

items.title_en: When Your Digital Life Vanishes
items.title_zh: 当你的数字生活消失
items.summary_en: A meditation on data loss and digital fragility in modern life, urging readers to consider portability, offline backups, and resilient identity management.
items.summary_zh: 反思现代生活中数据丢失的脆弱性，强调数据可携带性、离线备份和健壮的身份管理的重要性。文中给出在互联世界中保护个人信息的实际建议。

items.title_en: The George Business, by Roger Zelazny (1980)
items.title_zh: 罗杰·泽拉兹尼的《乔治的生意》（1980）
items.summary_en: A 1980 Roger Zelazny short story that blends witty world-building with speculative commerce and power dynamics. The piece showcases Zelazny's trademark flair for satirical, genre-bending storytelling.
items.summary_zh: 这是一篇1980年的泽拉兹尼短篇，结合机智的世界观构建、科幻商务与权力博弈的主题。展现了泽拉兹尼一贯的讽刺笔触与跨体裁叙事风格。

items.title_en: Epicycles All the Way Down (2025)
items.title_zh: Epicycles 全部向下：2025 年的复杂性与自我强化
items.summary_en: A reflective piece on how layers of complexity accumulate in tech, using epicycles as a metaphor for the recursive, self-reinforcing cycles seen through 2025.
items.summary_zh: 对科技领域不断叠加的复杂性进行反思，用“内圈套外圈”的隐喻讨论到2025年的循环与挑战。

items.title_en: The handmade beauty of Machine Age data visualizations
items.title_zh: 机器时代数据可视化的手工之美
items.summary_en: Celebrates the handmade aesthetics of Machine Age data visualizations, contrasting artisanal charts with modern digital graphics. The piece argues crafted techniques can improve clarity, storytelling, and accessibility in data visualization.
items.summary_zh: 探讨机器时代的手工数据可视化，赞美手工绘制的图表与有触感的界面，对比现代数字图形。文章认为传统工艺元素能帮助设计师提升数据可视化的清晰度、叙事性与可访问性。

items.title_en: Prediction markets are breaking the news and becoming their own beat
items.title_zh: 预测市场正在打破新闻格局，成为自己的报道线
items.summary_en: Prediction markets are breaking news and becoming their own beat, as traders and researchers mine events for probabilities and monetize forecasts. The shift challenges traditional newsroom models and raises questions about credibility, latency, and bias.
items.summary_zh: 预测市场正在成为新闻源并逐渐形成独立的报道板块，参与者通过对事件结果的概率进行交易与分析。此趋势对传统新闻业提出挑战，也引发关于可信度、时效性与偏见的问题。

items.title_en: Show HN: A lightweight way to make agents talk without paying for API usage
items.title_zh: Show HN：一种轻量化方式让代理无需依赖付费 API 就能对话
items.summary_en: Presents a lightweight approach to enabling agents to talk without paid API usage, likely using local models or offline reasoning. Discusses trade-offs in performance, privacy, and cost.
items.summary_zh: 介绍一种轻量化的方法让代理可以在本地模型或离线环境中对话，避免昂贵的 API 调用。同时讨论了性能、成本和隐私方面的取舍。

items.title_en: Who Is Blake Whiting?
items.title_zh: Blake Whiting 是谁？
items.summary_en: A profile exploring Blake Whiting, examining their background, work, and impact in their field.
items.summary_zh: 对 Blake Whiting 的背景、工作与影响进行的深度探索。

items.title_en: It's time to reclaim the word "Palantir" for JRR Tolkien
items.title_zh: 是时候把“Palantir”这个词重新归给托尔金的世界
items.summary_en: The piece argues for reclaiming Palantir for Tolkien's lore, pushing back against the tech company's appropriation of the name. It suggests the mythic term should be kept close to its literary roots, offering fans and creators a clearer cultural reference.
items.summary_zh: 本文主张把 Palantir 这个词重新归属于托尔金的世界，抵制现代科技公司对该名的借用。作者认为该名称的神话意义应回归文学根源，便于粉丝与创作者保留明确的文化参照。

items.title_en: Anonymous credentials: an illustrated primer (Part 2)
items.title_zh: 匿名凭证的图解入门（第2部分）
items.summary_en: Part 2 explains anonymous credentials with visual explanations, covering how proofs, revocation, and privacy guarantees work in practice. It compares schemes and clarifies trade-offs for real-world digital identities.
items.summary_zh: 第二部分通过图解讲解匿名凭证的工作原理，包括证明、撤销与隐私保障等，并对不同方案进行对比，帮助理解数字身份的取舍。

items.title_en: Vera C. Rubin Observatory has Discovered 11,000 New Asteroids
items.title_zh: 范拉·C·鲁宾天文台已发现1.1万颗新小行星
items.summary_en: The Vera C. Rubin Observatory has cataloged roughly 11,000 newly discovered asteroids as its survey ramps up, signaling the scale of data to come for planetary science and defense planning.
items.summary_zh: 鲁宾天文台在观测工作逐步展开的过程中，约新增一万一千颗小行星的发现量，预示行星科学与潜在威胁评估将迎来海量数据。

items.title_en: Reviving BrowserID in 2026
items.title_zh: 在2026年重振 BrowserID
items.summary_en: Reviving BrowserID in 2026 envisions a privacy-friendly, decentralized login alternative gaining traction again. The proposal weighs benefits over existing federated schemes and outlines practical steps for reintroducing the system.
items.summary_zh: 在2026年再度推动 BrowserID，设想以更注重隐私的去中心化登录方案重新获得关注。文中比较了其相对于现有联合身份的优势，并概述了重新引入的实际步骤。

items.title_en: Flipdiscs
items.title_zh: Flipdiscs：翻转圆盘
items.summary_en: Introducing Flipdiscs, a minimalist flipping-disk puzzle that challenges strategy with simple rules. The post delves into core mechanics, potential AI challenges, and how small rule sets can yield deep, emergent gameplay. It’s a case study in design restraint and replayability.
items.summary_zh: 介绍了 Flipdiscs 这款极简翻转圆盘的拼图游戏，靠简单规则考验策略。文章探讨了核心机制、潜在的 AI 挑战，以及如何通过小规则集实现深度和高可玩性，成为设计克制与可重玩性的案例。

items.title_en: My .config Ship of Theseus
items.title_zh: .config 的特修斯之船
items.summary_en: The author recounts migrating and gradually replacing parts of their ~/.config to achieve a stable, personal setup.
items.summary_zh: .config 的特修斯之船，作者分享在多台机器间逐步替换配置项以实现稳定、个性化环境的过程。文中讨论了配置漂移、可移植性挑战，以及在可复现性与个性化之间的权衡。

items.title_en: A disabled kea parrot is the alpha male of his circus
items.title_zh: 一只残疾的kea鹦鹉成了马戏团的领头鸟
items.summary_en: A disabled kea parrot unexpectedly acts as the alpha figure in a circus troupe, offering insights into resilience and social dynamics in intelligent birds. The study highlights how individual variation can redefine roles in a group.
items.summary_zh: 一只残疾的kea鹦鹉意外成为马戏团中的领头者，揭示了高智商鸟类的社会动力与韧性。研究强调个体差异如何重塑群体中的角色分工。

items.title_en: Plexus P/20 Emulator
items.title_zh: Plexus P/20 仿真器
items.summary_en: An open-source emulator recreates the Plexus P/20 architecture, letting enthusiasts run vintage software on modern machines. The project underscores how emulation preserves legacy computing and the engineering challenges of accurate hardware recreation.
items.summary_zh: 这是一个开源的 Plexus P/20 架构仿真器，允许爱好者在现代硬件上运行旧时软件。该项目体现了仿真在保存遗留计算系统方面的作用，并可能揭示实现中的挑战与性能细节。

items.title_en: Effectful Recursion Schemes
items.title_zh: 带效应的递归方案
items.summary_en: Effekt blog explores effectful recursion schemes, combining recursion schemes with algebraic effects to modularize control of side effects in functional programming. It presents concepts and potential language design implications.
items.summary_zh: Effekt 博客探讨带效应的递归范式，将递归范式与代数效应结合，以模块化管理函数式编程中的副作用，讨论相关概念与对语言设计的启示。

items.title_en: Design.md: A format spec for describing a visual identity to coding agents
items.title_zh: Design.md：一种将视觉识别描述给编码代理的格式规范
items.summary_en: Design.md proposes a machine-readable format to describe a brand's visual identity for coding agents and AI systems. This enables automated design reasoning, synthesis of branding assets, and more predictable branding across AI-powered workflows.
items.summary_zh: Design.md 提出一种机器可读的格式，用于向编码代理描述品牌的视觉识别要素。这有助于 AI 驱动的设计推理、品牌资产的自动生成，以及在工作流中实现更可预测的品牌一致性。

items.title_en: Fields Medal Video: Maryna Viazovska (2022)
items.title_zh: 菲尔兹奖视频：玛丽娜·维亚佐斯卡（2022）
items.summary_en: Maryna Viazovska's Fields Medal video offers a window into her groundbreaking work on sphere packing in dimension 8, and her mathematical approach combining creativity and rigor. The talk underscores how deep problems can be cracked with a blend of intuition and formalism.
items.summary_zh: 玛丽娜·维亚佐斯卡在菲尔兹奖视频中介绍了她在8维球体打包问题上的突破，以及她把直觉与严格证明相结合的研究方法。视频展示了纯数学研究中深意和美感。

items.title_en: Escrow Security for iCloud Keychain
items.title_zh: iCloud 钥匙串托管的安全性
items.summary_en: Explains escrow security for iCloud Keychain, including how recovery keys work and the trust chain between devices and Apple's servers. Highlights security implications for password recovery, cross-device syncing, and potential attack considerations.
items.summary_zh: 解釋 iCloud 钥匙串的托管安全機制，包括恢復密鑰如何運作與設備與伺服器之間的信任鏈。強調對密碼找回、跨設備同步及潛在攻擊面的安全性考量。

items.title_en: A History of Erasures Learning to Write Like Leylâ Erbil
items.title_zh: 抹去的历史：向 Leylâ Erbil 学写作
items.summary_en: Explores erasures as a literary method and how to write in the style of Leylâ Erbil, a modernist Turkish author. It delves into memory, marginalization, and the politics of language, offering readers a method for engaging with erased histories.
items.summary_zh: 本文将抹去作为文学手法进行探讨，并尝试以 Leylâ Erbil 的写作风格进行创作。通过对记忆、边缘化与语言政治的解读，提供理解被抹去历史的路径与写作方法。

items.title_en: Show HN: leaf – a terminal Markdown previewer with a GUI-like experience
items.title_zh: leaf：一个带 GUI 风格体验的终端 Markdown 预览器
items.summary_en: Leaf offers a terminal-based Markdown preview with a GUI-like experience, blending keyboard-driven efficiency with visual cues. It shows how to deliver rich, WYSIWYG-like feedback in a terminal, useful for developers who want fast tooling without leaving the command line.
items.summary_zh: Leaf 提供一个带有 GUI 风格体验的终端 Markdown 预览器，在终端中实现实时渲染。它展示了如何在不离开命令行的情况下，提供丰富、所见即所得式的反馈，适合追求高效工具链的开发者。

items.title_en: Hunting a 34 year old pointer bug in EtherSlip
items.title_zh: 追踪 EtherSlip 中一处持续34年的指针漏洞
items.summary_en: A long-running pointer bug in EtherSlip ARP code is traced, showcasing debugging detective work across decades of software. The write-up highlights subtle aliasing and memory-safety traps, and the importance of disciplined debugging practices in complex systems.
items.summary_zh: 在 EtherSlip 的 ARP 实现中追踪到一个持续了34年的指针漏洞，展示了跨久的调试侦探过程。文章强调了内存安全、别名及指针相关的陷阱，以及在复杂系统中进行细致调试的重要性。

items.title_en: What the FCC router ban means for FOSS
items.title_zh: FCC 路由器禁令对自由与开源软件的影响
items.summary_en: FCC's router ban could reshape how freely open-source firmware and software can be installed on devices, affecting user control and the viability of projects like OpenWrt. The post analyzes implications for FOSS router ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: FCC 的路由器禁令可能重塑设备上自由开放固件和软件的安装方式，影响用户控制权以及像 OpenWrt 之类项目的可行性。文中分析了对自由软件路由器生态的潜在影响。

items.title_en: SteamOS now runs on every AMD handheld
items.title_zh: SteamOS 现已在所有 AMD 手持设备上运行
items.summary_en: SteamOS now runs on every AMD handheld, a discovery that Valve quietly enabled across devices. This broadens Linux gaming availability on portable hardware and lowers barriers for developers targeting handheld form factors.
items.summary_zh: SteamOS 现在在所有 AMD 手持设备上可用， Valve 并未做广泛宣传。此举扩大了便携硬件上的 Linux 游戏生态，可能影响独立手持市场和开发者的设备选择。

items.title_en: Arch Linux now has a bit-for-bit reproducible Docker image
items.title_zh: Arch Linux 现已推出逐比特可重复的 Docker 镜像
items.summary_en: Arch Linux now offers a bit-for-bit reproducible Docker image, ensuring deterministic builds across environments. This enhances reproducibility for CI pipelines, debugging, and compliance, making Arch deployments more predictable.
items.summary_zh: Arch Linux 现已提供逐比特可重复的 Docker 镜像，确保跨环境的确定性构建。这提升了持续集成、调试和合规性方面的可重复性，使 Arch 的部署更加可预测。

items.title_en: Tim Davis – Probabilistic engineering and the 24-7 employee
items.title_zh: Tim Davis：概率工程学与 24/7 员工
items.summary_en: Tim Davis discusses probabilistic engineering and the 24-7 employee concept, arguing for probabilistic thinking in reliability and availability.
items.summary_zh: Tim Davis 探讨概率工程学与“24/7 员工”理念，主张在可靠性和可用性中纳入概率思维。文章分析用统计方法在系统中构建韧性、降低对人力的依赖并实现全天候运维。

items.title_en: Show HN: Backlit Keyboard API for Python
items.title_zh: Show HN：Python 的背光键盘 API
items.summary_en: A Python API to control backlit keyboards opens up programmable lighting for productivity and accessibility, enabling dynamic visual cues or aesthetic customization within Python apps. It lowers the barrier to hardware automation by offering a clear interface.
items.summary_zh: 一个用于控制背光键盘的 Python API，为生产力与无障碍提供可编程灯效，允许在 Python 应用中实现动态视觉提示或外观自定义。提供清晰的接口，降低硬件自动化门槛。

items.title_en: Show HN: The Unix Magic poster, annotated (updated)
items.title_zh: Show HN：Unix 魔法海报，带注解（更新）
items.summary_en: Presents an annotated Unix Magic poster with updated notes, clarifying classic command-line techniques and their practical applications. The project serves as a teaching tool and nostalgia piece for seasoned developers.
items.summary_zh: 展示带注解的 Unix Magic 海报并更新了笔记，澄清经典命令行技巧及其实际应用，既是教学工具也是对老练开发者的致敬。

items.title_en: Show HN: Startup Equity Adventure Game
items.title_zh: Show HN：创业股权探险游戏
items.summary_en: Showcases a browser-based game simulating startup equity and cap table dynamics, offering a playful lens on fundraising math and founder decisions. It presents an approachable way to explore equity scenarios.
items.summary_zh: 展示一个基于浏览器的游戏，模拟创业公司股权与股权表的动态，提供对募资算术与创始人决策的趣味化视角，便于理解各种股权情景。

items.title_en: MiniZinc, constraint modelling language solve discrete optimisation problems
items.title_zh: MiniZinc：求解离散优化问题的约束建模语言
items.summary_en: MiniZinc provides a high-level language for constraint modeling to solve discrete optimization problems, with broad applicability from scheduling to resource allocation and support for multiple solvers.
items.summary_zh: MiniZinc 是一种用于约束建模的高级语言，适用于排程、资源分配等离散优化问题，支持多种求解器，应用广泛。

items.title_en: Sergey Brin Confronted Gavin Newsom
items.title_zh: 谢尔盖·布林对加州州长 Gavin Newsom 进行当面对质
items.summary_en: Sergey Brin publicly confronted Gavin Newsom over tech policy, illustrating how big tech influence intersects with state politics and policy decisions.
items.summary_zh: 谢尔盖·布林就科技政策公开质问加州州长 Gavin Newsom，揭示科技巨头对州级政治与政策决策的影响力。

items.title_en: Flow Map Learning via Nongradient Vector Flow [pdf]
items.title_zh: 通过非梯度向量场进行流图学习（PDF）
items.summary_en: Presents a method for learning flow maps from vector fields using nongradient flows, with a PDF available. The approach could advance how researchers model dynamic systems, visualize flows, and infer underlying physics.
items.summary_zh: 介绍一种利用非梯度向量场来学习流图的方法，随文附带 PDF。此方法有望推动对动态系统的建模、流动可视化以及潜在物理规律的推断。

items.title_en: Expansion Artifacts
items.title_zh: 扩展产物
items.summary_en: A thoughtful exploration of expansion artifacts—the unintended byproducts and frictions that appear as systems scale—from evolving interfaces to process drift.
items.summary_zh: 对扩展过程中的产物进行深度探讨，揭示系统扩展时出现的意外副作用与摩擦，如界面演化和流程漂移。

items.title_en: 98% of all recent environmental claims can be categorized as "greenwashing"
items.title_zh: 近年环境声明的 98% 可归为绿色漂洗
items.summary_en: A new analysis argues that about 98% of recent environmental claims are greenwashing, signaling widespread misrepresentation of sustainability efforts. The piece underscores the need for verifiable metrics and stricter regulatory oversight of corporate environmental marketing.
items.summary_zh: 一项新研究认为近 98% 的环境声明属于绿色漂洗，揭示企业在可持续性宣传中的广泛歪曲。文章强调需要可核验的指标和更严格的监管来约束企业环境营销。

items.title_en: Rip language. Compiles to ES2022. Built-in reactivity
items.title_zh: Rip 语言：编译到 ES2022，内置响应式特性
items.summary_en: Rip is a new language that compiles to ES2022 with built-in reactivity, aiming to simplify building reactive web apps. The design focuses on ergonomic syntax and frontend performance for modern developers.
items.summary_zh: 介绍 Rip 语言——一门将目标编译为 ES2022、内置响应式特性的全新语言，旨在简化构建响应式网页应用的工作。设计重点在于提升前端开发者的编码体验与性能。

items.title_en: Qwen/Qwen3.6-27B · Hugging Face
items.title_zh: Qwen3.6-27B · Hugging Face
items.summary_en: Qwen3.6-27B is now hosted on Hugging Face, offering researchers and developers access to a compact, capable coding-and-general-purpose model with community trust and ecosystem tooling.
items.summary_zh: Qwen3.6-27B 已在 Hugging Face 上架，供研究者和开发者使用，提供紧凑但强大的编码与通用模型，并受社区工具与生态支撑。

items.title_en: Lessons from building multiplayer browsers
items.title_zh: 从构建多人游戏浏览器学到的经验
items.summary_en: Shares practical lessons from building multiplayer browser experiences, covering latency compensation, state synchronization, and UX tradeoffs. The piece distills actionable patterns for real-time web apps.
items.summary_zh: 分享在构建多人浏览器体验中的实用经验，涉及延迟补偿、状态同步和用户体验取舍等要点，总结出可直接落地的实时网页应用设计模式。

items.title_en: TIPSv2: Advancing Vision-Language Pretraining with Enhanced Patch-Text Alignment
items.title_zh: TIPSv2：通过增强 Patch-Text 对齐推进视觉-语言预训练
items.summary_en: TIPSv2 introduces improved patch-text alignment to strengthen vision-language pretraining, enabling better cross-modal representations and more efficient learning.
items.summary_zh: TIPSv2 通过改进 Patch-Text 对齐，提升视觉-语言预训练效果，带来更强的跨模态表示能力与更高效的学习。

items.title_en: AI agents that argue with each other to improve decisions
items.title_zh: 互相辩论的AI代理以提升决策
items.summary_en: AI agents that argue with each other can surface better explanations and catch errors, pushing decisions toward higher quality outcomes. The approach shows promise for decision support, though it raises calibration and safety questions.
items.summary_zh: 让 AI 代理相互辩论以改进决策的思路显示出提高解释力与发现错误的潜力，可能成为支持决策的有力工具。此方法前景乐观，但也需关注校准和安全性等挑战。

items.title_en: Larry McMurtry's Tall Tales
items.title_zh: 拉里·麦克默特里的 Tall Tales
items.summary_en: Profile of Larry McMurtry, focusing on how his storytelling blends myth, memory, and social critique.
items.summary_zh: 本篇聚焦作家拉里·麦克默特里，探討其敘事如何糅合神話、記憶與社會批評，並分析其長篇故事對美國文學與文化討論的影響。

items.title_en: An MCP Server for Fastmail – National Email Day
items.title_zh: 为 Fastmail 构建 MCP 服务器
items.summary_en: Details a Fastmail MCP server, illuminating improvements to protocol handling or features for their mail service. The piece ties into National Email Day, underscoring ongoing work to enhance email infrastructure and self-hosted options.
items.summary_zh: 介绍用于 Fastmail 的 MCP 服务器，聚焦提升邮件协议处理与功能。文中以“全国邮箱日”为背景，强调改进邮件基础设施和自托管能力的持续努力。

items.title_en: The Forgotten History of Hershey's Electric Railway (1916) in Cuba
items.title_zh: 赫希在古巴的1916年电气铁路：被遗忘的历史
items.summary_en: The piece recounts Hershey's involvement in building an electric railway in Cuba in 1916, blending corporate ambition with political and social context, and how it reflects the intersection of technology and colonial enterprise. It highlights the enduring footprint of industrial experiments in colonial settings.
items.summary_zh: 本文回顾了 1916 年可可力在古巴建设电气铁路的历史，揭示企业野心与政治、社会背景之间的关系，以及科技与殖民开发之间的相互作用。

items.title_en: Linux 7.1 Removes Drivers for Bus Mouse Support
items.title_zh: Linux 7.1 移除对总线鼠标的驱动支持
items.summary_en: This release drops the legacy bus mouse drivers, reflecting Linux's ongoing pruning of old hardware support. It could impact users still relying on ancient mice and invites alternative input methods, like USB or PS/2, but marks a trend toward modern peripherals.
items.summary_zh: 该版本移除了对总线鼠标的驱动，显示出 Linux 在精简对旧硬件的支持。这对仍依赖老式鼠标的用户可能造成不便，同时推动改用 USB/PS2 等现代输入方式，但也体现了向现代外设的转变趋势。

items.title_en: Middle Eastern News Sites Are U.S. Government Propaganda Ops
items.title_zh: 中东新闻网站被美国政府宣传行动所驱动？
items.summary_en: The Intercept reports that some Middle Eastern news sites function as propaganda outlets for U.S. government messaging; the piece examines tools, funding, and implications for press freedom.
items.summary_zh: 据报道，部分中东新闻网站被视为美国政府宣传渠道，揭示资金与工具来源及对新闻自由的潜在影响。

items.title_en: Canonical Releases Ubuntu 26.04 LTS Resolute Raccoon
items.title_zh: Canonical 发布 Ubuntu 26.04 LTS Resolute Raccoon
items.summary_en: Canonical releases Ubuntu 26.04 LTS 'Resolute Raccoon,' a long-term support release with updated kernel, desktop, and security features, signaling stability for enterprises and enthusiasts.
items.summary_zh: Canonical 发布 Ubuntu 26.04 LTS（Resolute Raccoon），提供长期支持、更新的内核、桌面环境和安全特性，面向企业及爱好者的稳定性需求。

items.title_en: LLM pricing has never made sense
items.title_zh: LLM 定价从未讲得通
items.summary_en: The article contends that current large language model pricing lacks a coherent rationale, mixing per-token costs, inference vs training, and platform fees in confusing ways. It proposes conceptual fixes or practical guidance for builders and buyers navigating model access.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为当前大语言模型的定价缺乏连贯的逻辑，混合了按 token、推理/训练成本和平台费等多种维度，导致定价难以理解。提出了可能的改进思路和对开发者与买家的建议。
